name: Lofgren for Congress
subject: Every little amount makes a difference, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lofgren for Congress
body:
Dear Peter,

Sorry to reach out again, but we’re just a few days away from our next deadline, and we’re hoping we can count on you to help us reach our mid-month goal.

Last month, our average donation was just $20 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-zoe-lofgren-q32025?refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FR_1_2025-07-11_AVG_MID_ES-27439&amount=20] .

And just $20 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-zoe-lofgren-q32025?refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FR_1_2025-07-11_AVG_MID_ES-27439&amount=20] will help us get even closer to taking back the

House majority next fall and BLOCKING the rest of Trump’s extremist agenda . So Peter, can you chip in $20 or whatever you can today to help us reach our mid-month goal? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-zoe-lofgren-q32025?refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FR_1_2025-07-11_AVG_MID_ES-27439&amount=20]

If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately:

EXPRESS DONATE: $20 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-zoe-lofgren-q32025?expresslane=true&refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FR_1_2025-07-11_AVG_MID_ES-27439&amount=20]
OR CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT NOW >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-zoe-lofgren-q32025?refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FR_1_2025-07-11_AVG_MID_ES-27439&amount=25]

Trump’s cronies in the House just helped pass his devastating spending bill, which guts Medicaid and SNAP benefits, increases the budget for ICE, all while giving ridiculous tax breaks to his far-right friends.

But don’t forget, Republicans have one of the slimmest House majorities in decades, so Democrats have a real shot at flipping the House blue.

And last year, as Chair of the California Democratic Congressional Delegation, Rep. Zoe Lofgren helped flip three seats from red to blue – so with your help, we flip even more seats and take back the House majority!

Remember, even just $20 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-zoe-lofgren-q32025?refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FR_1_2025-07-11_AVG_MID_ES-27439&amount=20] can help us cross the finish line next November. So please chip in $20 or another amount now to help keep Zoe in Congress and help elect California Democrats who will flip the House blue. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-zoe-lofgren-q32025?refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FR_1_2025-07-11_AVG_MID_ES-27439&amount=20]

If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately:

EXPRESS DONATE: $5 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-zoe-lofgren-q32025?expresslane=true&refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FR_1_2025-07-11_AVG_MID_ES-27439&amount=5]

Every little amount makes a difference, Peter – chip in $20 before you go.

Friends of Lofgren

Congresswoman Zoe Lofgren is a strong fighter for California’s values in Washington. As the Chair of the California Democratic Congressional Delegation, she has been on the front lines of expanding and protecting the Democratic Majority. Zoe has dedicated her career to fighting for our diverse communities and needs your help.
Click here to donate to Zoe’s campaign → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-zoe-lofgren-q32025?refcode=emfooter&amount=25]

PO Box 913
San Jose, CA 95113
United States

name: GOTV PAC
subject: Let’s make this blow up in Republican faces
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email06302025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email06302025&amount=25]
Peter ,
Donald Trump and Texas Gov. Greg Abbott just launched a brazen mid-cycle redistricting scheme and it could blow up in their faces.
If you haven't heard, they're trying to redraw the map in Texas to give Republicans even more congressional seats. Why? Because they know their House majority is on the brink and they're scared of what 2026 could bring.
But here's the thing: even Republican strategists are warning that Abbott's plan could backfire badly.
📉 To gerrymander more GOP seats, they'll have to drain Republican voters from existing red districts, making every seat more competitive.
📊 They're using outdated census data that undercounts millions of Texans.
That's where we come in. If they're going to roll the dice with this gerrymander, then we're going to be ready to flip every vulnerable seat they create.
Can you chip in $15, $25, or whatever you can right now to help GOTV PAC gear up for a wave election and defeat Trump's rigged map? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email07112025&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Let's turn their greed into our opportunity.
GOTV PAC

Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]

Washington, DC 20002

Our mission is to Flip the House by supporting targeted Congressional districts and down-ballot races within those districts. Our internal research evidences that the impact of a Dollar invested in this manner amplifies the top and bottom of the ticket.

name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: ICYMI →
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250711-1425-foote&t=1001&akid=1425%2E342411%2EP7vqf- ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

ICYMI: The Trump-backed tax bill includes a dangerous provision that bans
Medicaid funding for Planned Parenthood for an entire year, which could
force about 200 affiliated clinics to close nationwide.^1

This isn’t just a budget detail — it’s a deliberate attack on reproductive
freedom, targeting millions of people, especially in underserved
communities who rely on Planned Parenthood for essential care.

This is how the far right governs: Through bans and authoritarian power
grabs. It’s all part of Trump’s broader plan to roll back our rights and
consolidate power — and we will not let it happen.

Here’s the good news: After Planned Parenthood filed a lawsuit, a federal
judge has temporarily frozen the funding ban — a win, for now.^2 But we
know how this works. Republicans won’t stop, and neither will we.

We’re building progressive power at every level, and that takes all of us.
The Squad has never backed down from a fight like this, and we won’t start
now. That’s why we’re coming to you today:

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250711-movement.eayrhU&refcode=em20250711-1425&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1425%2E342411%2EP7vqf- ]Will you chip in $3 to the Squad Victory Fund to fight
back against these authoritarian efforts to control our bodies and
choices, and elect leaders who will never compromise on our rights?

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250711-movement.eayrhU&refcode=em20250711-1425&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1425%2E342411%2EP7vqf- ]Contribute ››

In Solidarity,

Squad Victory Fund

1 - [ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19782?t=1022&akid=1425%2E342411%2EP7vqf- ]Axios
2 - [ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19782?t=1023&akid=1425%2E342411%2EP7vqf- ]Axios

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1425%2E342411%2EP7vqf-

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Politivist PAC, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

body:
---
## **[Jim Jordan hit one top Trump's top enemies with one nasty surprise](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=uk4synlcet26madhce0dg5mjuurjska4mfbzmgpms5bxx6hccxmyrjr1qp92r8tw4ofuo4kjyurhr7wg20dqjsh9f54drzxgkcrqvysui53ayp3lgeqlzi1r00s9nqbddf96axvd54aomn566ld1h9esor0ff55qkhxtua75vbxhqg0b6ctxnm82ydo7yeyt02mutms2v3wlhswhtoah5kgbotvlth&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sz9gdu&__onlt=h&__lnam=\[Read More...\])**
In Donald Trump’s first term, his adversaries thought they could get away with anything in the pursuit of stopping Trump. That’s not the case now. And Jim Jordan hit one top Trump enemy with one really nasty surprise. name: Tom Fitton
subject: Epstein Scandal Update
body:
New Court Filings Shock Washington!

[INSIDE JW]

JUSTICE DEPARTMENT REVIEWING FBI/DOJ EPSTEIN RECORDS FOR POSSIBLE
RELEASE

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75198&L=35632&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj1UX3NxeFlkVUNaSSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=6b9b1f6ab38439b6efa76f7c85f5e0ca3c5261acaaf6ddc7809d8db007d6de8d]

Judicial Watch filed a “joint status report
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75198&L=35615&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWVwc3RlaW4tZmlsZXMtanNyLTAxMDU2L13igJ0/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=7c77d69638ebf27daafce7df4de8dde5f0c927d817978ee97eb3721892bb77cb
on July 7 in federal court reporting that the Justice Department and
the FBI continue to search for and review records in response to our
FOIA lawsuit for records regarding Jeffrey Epstein.

The lawsuit requests any records on the identities of Epstein clients
or associates. The Justice Department’s disclosure is at odds with
the leaked, unsigned and undated Justice Department/FBI memo
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75198&L=35616&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVzdGljZS5nb3Yvb3BhL21lZGlhLzE0MDcwMDEvZGw/aW5saW5lJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=805564b89b9de3b63a7154eca9cf68f7c0d73088102489da1dec1cdd26b511c3]
that suggests no
more Epstein records would be disclosed to the American public. The
memo was first disclosed late on July 6
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75198&L=35617&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYXhpb3MuY29tLzIwMjUvMDcvMDcvamVmZnJleS1lcHN0ZWluLXN1aWNpZGUtY2xpZW50LWxpc3QtdHJ1bXAtYWRtaW5pc3RyYXRpb24/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=fa9f7a016f7f0247272d9c58a424005a28d4a5323460d8a8305c69add0c501ac].

Judicial Watch sued
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75198&L=34969&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZXBzdGVpbi1jbGllbnQtbGlzdHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=34eda6c9d9b0ef21bf1e05bfa61d1548434959d0905106eadc7bba0a77797d23]
the Justice
Department and FBI in April 2025 after they failed to adequately
respond to separate FOIA requests for records filed in February 2025
concerning Epstein, including a specific request for records
“depicting the identities of clients or associates of Epstein.”
Epstein document requests were sent to the Justice Department’s
Office of Information Policy, the Criminal Division, and two separate
requests were sent to the Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI)
(_Judicial Watch Inc. v. U.S. Department of Justice_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75198&L=34954&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWVwc3RlaW4tZmlsZXMtY29tcGxhaW50LTAxMDU2L11fP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=2f5fa0d5eedade583f3a45dca14271dcd1ec74c0676e9b71671d302e298838b7
_(No.
1:25-cv-01056)).

The joint status report states:

> Plaintiff Judicial Watch, Inc. and Defendant U.S. Department of
> Justice, by counsel and pursuant to the Court’s June 12, 2025,
> order, respectfully submit this joint status report:
>
> ***
>
> (2)(3) the anticipated number of documents responsive to
> Plaintiff’s FOIA request, and the anticipated date(s) for release
> of the documents requested by Plaintiff

Federal Bureau of Investigation

* For 1662669-0 (any/all Epstein records), the FBI has run its
initial searches and is in the process of reviewing those search
results.
* For 1662711-0 (Communications of Director Patel’s regarding
Epstein client list), the FBI’s search efforts are ongoing.
* The FBI does not yet have an anticipated number of documents or
anticipated dates for release.

Executive Office of United States Attorneys

* EOUSA’s initial search efforts are ongoing.
* EOUSA does not yet have an anticipated number of documents or
anticipated dates for release.

Office of Information Policy

* OIP issued a final response to FOIA-2025-02863 on April 15, 2025,
informing Plaintiff that no responsive to its request were located.
[Available here
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75198&L=35618&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWVwc3RlaW4tZmlsZXMtb2FnLWFwcmlsLXJlc3BvbnNlLTAxMDU2Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=eae7bccadef7395f50adb964f3033fdcba7dbbc8741bd743721b616a1256ce8e]]

The government has yet to turn over one document, nor has it disclosed
when any documents might be released.

Our complaint references a February 24, 2025, Fox News report
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75198&L=34955&F=T&&hash=537064ad96ce03bce3501d683ca2d243529e0d8e1f58ff89c6b43ecadde62a83],
which states that President Trump’s “return to the Oval Office
came with the prospect of the public finally being able to see
Epstein's long-awaited ‘black book’ amid inquiries into the
deceased financier and sex trafficker.”

Epstein died in federal custody in 2019 while awaiting trial on sex
trafficking charges.

The Justice Department on February 27, 2025, released a long-awaited
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75198&L=34958&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9ueXBvc3QuY29tLzIwMjUvMDIvMjcvdXMtbmV3cy9qZWZmcmV5LWVwc3RlaW4tY29udGFjdC1saXN0LXJlbGVhc2VkLWJ5LXRydW1wLWRvai8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=ad36965813d2b50eaf17f25b5e510812eb99948548c7f380ab59d9298378481f]

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75198&L=34956&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9ueXBvc3QuY29tLzIwMjUvMDIvMjcvdXMtbmV3cy9qZWZmcmV5LWVwc3RlaW4tY29udGFjdC1saXN0LXJlbGVhc2VkLWJ5LXRydW1wLWRvai9ddHJvdmU/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=bc49232c74988709557b7ddc4568a9a0b54639f91cc7331e4d756749e6ac7134
of documents related to Epstein. As stated by the _New York Post_:
“But the much-hyped, roughly 200-page document dump provided no big
revelations, instead listing celebrities and politicians who were
already known to have palled around with the notorious pedophile.”

But the recent Justice Department memo
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75198&L=35616&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVzdGljZS5nb3Yvb3BhL21lZGlhLzE0MDcwMDEvZGw/aW5saW5lJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=805564b89b9de3b63a7154eca9cf68f7c0d73088102489da1dec1cdd26b511c3]
suggests there
will be no more public disclosures:

> To that end, while we have labored to provide the public with
> maximum information regarding Epstein and ensured examination of any
> evidence in the government’s possession, it is the determination
> of the Department of Justice and the Federal Bureau of Investigation
> that no further disclosure would be appropriate or warranted.

The Justice Department and FBI are sending out contradictory messages:
telling the American people that no more Epstein material will be
released, while telling the federal court in our case that the Epstein
FOIA review is proceeding. But no matter, our FOIA lawsuit for the
Epstein material continues. We will be relentless in demanding
transparency under law.

JUDICIAL WATCH SUES FOR FBI RECORDS ON BIDEN SCHEME TO JAIL TRUMP

Judicial Watch is after the full truth of the Biden administration’s
abuse of our judicial system in its zeal to stop Donald Trump.

Our legal team filed a FOIA lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75198&L=35586&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWFyY3RpYy1mcm9zdC1jb21wbGFpbnQtMDIwMTEvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=9eb3a2d2f90b4365f49ddf0f208d3404fbc5eabb70135ab564cfd8b2ba8727a4]
against the U.S. Department of Justice for records about the FBI’s
investigation of Trump codenamed “Arctic Frost,” which was part of
an unprecedented effort by the Biden administration to prosecute and
jail President Trump for disputing Biden’s controversial election
victory (_Judicial Watch, Inc. v. U.S. Department of Justice_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75198&L=35586&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWFyY3RpYy1mcm9zdC1jb21wbGFpbnQtMDIwMTEvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=9eb3a2d2f90b4365f49ddf0f208d3404fbc5eabb70135ab564cfd8b2ba8727a4]
(No. 1:25-cv-02011)).

Judicial Watch sued in the U.S. District Court for the District of
Columbia after the FBI, a component of the Justice Department, failed
to respond to a January 30, 2025, FOIA request for:

> All reports, notes, summaries, interview transcripts, or similar
> records pertaining to the FBI investigation Arctic Frost.

In January 2025, U.S. Senators Chuck Grassley (R-IA) and Ron Johnson
(R-WI) publicized records about the targeting of Trump
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75198&L=35587&F=T&&hash=79aebe34af6840221b7b24644e69916701037f84b337d2c2b7f4e673e14012b6

> Internal FBI emails and predicating documents provided to Grassley
> and released jointly by the two senators show Timothy Thibault, a
> former FBI Assistant Special Agent in Charge (ASAC) who was forced
> to retire
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75198&L=35588&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZ3Jhc3NsZXkuc2VuYXRlLmdvdi9uZXdzL3JlbWFya3MvZ3Jhc3NsZXktdGhpYmF1bHQtcmVzaWduYXRpb24tYW5kLW1lZGlhLW1pc3JlcG9ydGluZz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=59787fdc9149e2307a01c7029cad0ee8b570635e57671709034f3daa8eff0f50]
> from the Bureau after Grassley exposed
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75198&L=35589&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZ3Jhc3NsZXkuc2VuYXRlLmdvdi9pbW8vbWVkaWEvZG9jL0NFRyB0byBET0ogRkJJIChXRk8pLnBkZj91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=a5f7bdf2104d8799ffa3f213a704244633f2435fe80e8c29686069b5a843f73b]
> his public anti-Trump bias, authored the initial language for what
> ultimately became Jack Smith’s federal case against Trump
> regarding the 2020 presidential election. Records show Thibault
> essentially opened and approved his own investigation. The FBI
> titled the ensuing investigation “Arctic Frost.”

> Records further reveal Richard Pilger, an official in the Justice
> Department (DOJ)’s Public Integrity Section, reviewed and approved
> the FBI’s Arctic Frost investigation, authorizing DOJ to move
> forward with a full field criminal and Grand Jury investigation that
> ultimately transformed into the Trump elector case. Grassley
> published a 2021 report
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75198&L=35590&F=T&&hash=df592b666fd49f008085e7f14cfe4e36a00f1d1bad17201fad42326a66303330]
> that raised concerns regarding Pilger’s troubling record at DOJ.

Judicial Watch shouldn’t have to sue to get these records about
how the Biden gang at the FBI and DOJ tried to rig an election by
jailing Trump for disputing the 2020 election. Attorney General Bondi
and FBI Director Patel should focus on transparency under law so the
American people can know the full truth of this law attack on Trump
– and our constitutional republic.

JUDICIAL WATCH SUES FOR FBI RECORDS ON EPSTEIN VICTIM VIRGINIA GIUFFRE

Our Epstein investigation is expanding. Judicial Watch just filed a
FOIA lawsuit

We sued the FBI after it failed to respond to an April 26, 2025 FOIA
request for all records regarding:

> A deceased individual named Virginia Louise Giuffre, née Virginia
> Louise Roberts. For purposes of identification, Ms. Giuffre was born
> on August 9, 1983, in Sacramento, California and died on April 25,
> 2025, in Neergabby, Australia....
>
> This request includes, but is not limited to, all reports,
> transcripts, summaries, or similar records documenting any
> interviews of or other conversations with Ms. Giuffre, as well as
> all records she provided to the FBI. In addition, this request
> includes, but is not limited to, all records of communication
> between any official or employee of the FBI and any official or
> employee of any other federal, state, or local government agency or
> office regarding or mentioning Ms. Giuffre.

Giuffre reportedly
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75198&L=35625&F=T&&hash=3443bfa78b61f2c329ced639a3d16f3480dab4ccd197c059fc6d44c94f2a086c]
committed suicide on April 25, 2025:

> Virginia Giuffre, one of the most prominent survivors of Jeffrey
> Epstein’s sexual abuse, has died by suicide, her family said
> Friday.
>
> Giuffre, 41, died in Neergabby, Australia, where she had been living
> for several years.
>
> Giuffre was one of the earliest and loudest voices calling for
> criminal charges against Epstein and his enablers. Other Epstein
> abuse survivors later credited her with giving them the courage to
> speak out.

In 2015, Giuffre, who held U.S. citizenship at birth, was among the
first Epstein victims to go public
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75198&L=35626&F=T&&hash=83c8c00db0042270df885609cd55c5f7252b950baf70de65f9239ba2f160a79d].

A MISSED OPPORTUNITY TO UPHOLD THE FIRST AMENDMENT

The U.S. Supreme Court denied Judicial Watch’s petition challenging
a lower court decision against Kari MacRae, a Massachusetts high
school teacher who was fired in retaliation for social media posts,
which decried woke values such as critical race theory being taught in
schools.

The posts predated her employment at Hanover High School in
Massachusetts. We argued that the Supreme Court should take up the
case as the lower courts misapplied the First Amendment and Supreme
Court precedent.

MacRae was fired because she spoke out against critical race theory
before she was hired. The Supreme Court’s decision not to take up
her case is a missed opportunity to uphold the First Amendment.

Justice Clarence Thomas in a concurring opinion raised significant
concerns
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75198&L=35581&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL3N1cHJlbWUtY291cnQtZGVjaXNpb25zLWp1bmUtMjAyNS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=f3cab9fe3ff4d72099d5bf8a65402ac0699dc1716f2bf953a910b26992ac04d7]
about what happened to MacRae:

> The First Circuit’s analysis strikes me as deeply flawed. To
> start, I do not see how the tone of MacRae’s posts can bear on the
> weight of her First Amendment interest. “Speech on matters of
> public concern is at the heart of the First Amendment’s
> protection.” ... And, “[t]he inappropriate or controversial
> character of a statement is irrelevant to the question whether it
> deals with a matter of public concern.” ... “[H]umor, satire,
> and even personal invective can make a point about a matter of
> public concern.”
>
> ***
>
> It undermines core First Amendment values to allow a government
> employer to adopt an institutional viewpoint on the issues of the
> day and then, when faced with a dissenting employee, portray this
> disagreement as evidence of disruption. And, the problem is
> exacerbated in the case of an employee such as MacRae, who expressed
> her views only outside the workplace and before her employment

clean_body: New Court Filings Shock Washington! [INSIDE JW] JUSTICE DEPARTMENT REVIEWING FBI/DOJ EPSTEIN RECORDS FOR POSSIBLE RELEASE [] Judicial Watch filed a “joint status report [ on July 7 in federal court reporting that the Justice Department and the FBI continue to search for and review records in response to our FOIA lawsuit for records regarding Jeffrey Epstein. The lawsuit requests any records on the identities of Epstein clients or associates. The Justice Department’s disclosure is at odds with the leaked, unsigned and undated Justice Department/FBI memo [] that suggests no more Epstein records would be disclosed to the American public. The memo was first disclosed late on July 6 []. Judicial Watch sued [] the Justice Department and FBI in April 2025 after they failed to adequately respond to separate FOIA requests for records filed in February 2025 concerning Epstein, including a specific request for records “depicting the identities of clients or associates of Epstein.” Epstein document requests were sent to the Justice Department’s Office of Information Policy, the Criminal Division, and two separate requests were sent to the Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) (Judicial Watch Inc. v. U.S. Department of Justice [ (No. 1:25-cv-01056)). The joint status report states: Plaintiff Judicial Watch, Inc. and Defendant U.S. Department of Justice, by counsel and pursuant to the Court’s June 12, 2025, order, respectfully submit this joint status report: * (2)(3) the anticipated number of documents responsive to Plaintiff’s FOIA request, and the anticipated date(s) for release of the documents requested by Plaintiff Federal Bureau of Investigation For 1662669-0 (any/all Epstein records), the FBI has run its initial searches and is in the process of reviewing those search results. For 1662711-0 (Communications of Director Patel’s regarding Epstein client list), the FBI’s search efforts are ongoing. The FBI does not yet have an anticipated number of documents or anticipated dates for release. Executive Office of United States Attorneys EOUSA’s initial search efforts are ongoing. EOUSA does not yet have an anticipated number of documents or anticipated dates for release. Office of Information Policy OIP issued a final response to FOIA-2025-02863 on April 15, 2025, informing Plaintiff that no responsive to its request were located. [Available here []] The government has yet to turn over one document, nor has it disclosed when any documents might be released. Our complaint references a February 24, 2025, Fox News report [], which states that President Trump’s “return to the Oval Office came with the prospect of the public finally being able to see Epstein's long-awaited ‘black book’ amid inquiries into the deceased financier and sex trafficker.” Epstein died in federal custody in 2019 while awaiting trial on sex trafficking charges. The Justice Department on February 27, 2025, released a long-awaited [] [ of documents related to Epstein. As stated by the New York Post: “But the much-hyped, roughly 200-page document dump provided no big revelations, instead listing celebrities and politicians who were already known to have palled around with the notorious pedophile.” But the recent Justice Department memo [] suggests there will be no more public disclosures: To that end, while we have labored to provide the public with maximum information regarding Epstein and ensured examination of any evidence in the government’s possession, it is the determination of the Department of Justice and the Federal Bureau of Investigation that no further disclosure would be appropriate or warranted. The Justice Department and FBI are sending out contradictory messages: telling the American people that no more Epstein material will be released, while telling the federal court in our case that the Epstein FOIA review is proceeding. But no matter, our FOIA lawsuit for the Epstein material continues. We will be relentless in demanding transparency under law. JUDICIAL WATCH SUES FOR FBI RECORDS ON BIDEN SCHEME TO JAIL TRUMP Judicial Watch is after the full truth of the Biden administration’s abuse of our judicial system in its zeal to stop Donald Trump. Our legal team filed a FOIA lawsuit [] against the U.S. Department of Justice for records about the FBI’s investigation of Trump codenamed “Arctic Frost,” which was part of an unprecedented effort by the Biden administration to prosecute and jail President Trump for disputing Biden’s controversial election victory (Judicial Watch, Inc. v. U.S. Department of Justice [] (No. 1:25-cv-02011)). Judicial Watch sued in the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia after the FBI, a component of the Justice Department, failed to respond to a January 30, 2025, FOIA request for: All reports, notes, summaries, interview transcripts, or similar records pertaining to the FBI investigation Arctic Frost. In January 2025, U.S. Senators Chuck Grassley (R-IA) and Ron Johnson (R-WI) publicized records about the targeting of Trump [ Internal FBI emails and predicating documents provided to Grassley and released jointly by the two senators show Timothy Thibault, a former FBI Assistant Special Agent in Charge (ASAC) who was forced to retire [] from the Bureau after Grassley exposed [] his public anti-Trump bias, authored the initial language for what ultimately became Jack Smith’s federal case against Trump regarding the 2020 presidential election. Records show Thibault essentially opened and approved his own investigation. The FBI titled the ensuing investigation “Arctic Frost.” Records further reveal Richard Pilger, an official in the Justice Department (DOJ)’s Public Integrity Section, reviewed and approved the FBI’s Arctic Frost investigation, authorizing DOJ to move forward with a full field criminal and Grand Jury investigation that ultimately transformed into the Trump elector case. Grassley published a 2021 report [] that raised concerns regarding Pilger’s troubling record at DOJ. Judicial Watch shouldn’t have to sue to get these records about how the Biden gang at the FBI and DOJ tried to rig an election by jailing Trump for disputing the 2020 election. Attorney General Bondi and FBI Director Patel should focus on transparency under law so the American people can know the full truth of this law attack on Trump – and our constitutional republic. JUDICIAL WATCH SUES FOR FBI RECORDS ON EPSTEIN VICTIM VIRGINIA GIUFFRE Our Epstein investigation is expanding. Judicial Watch just filed a FOIA lawsuit [] against the U.S. Department of Justice for all interviews, conversations and other records provided to the FIBI by Jeffrey Epstein victim Virginia Louise Giuffre (Judicial Watch, Inc. v. U.S. Department of Justice [] (No. 1:25-cv-02191)). We sued the FBI after it failed to respond to an April 26, 2025 FOIA request for all records regarding: A deceased individual named Virginia Louise Giuffre, née Virginia Louise Roberts. For purposes of identification, Ms. Giuffre was born on August 9, 1983, in Sacramento, California and died on April 25, 2025, in Neergabby, Australia.... This request includes, but is not limited to, all reports, transcripts, summaries, or similar records documenting any interviews of or other conversations with Ms. Giuffre, as well as all records she provided to the FBI. In addition, this request includes, but is not limited to, all records of communication between any official or employee of the FBI and any official or employee of any other federal, state, or local government agency or office regarding or mentioning Ms. Giuffre. Giuffre reportedly [] committed suicide on April 25, 2025: Virginia Giuffre, one of the most prominent survivors of Jeffrey Epstein’s sexual abuse, has died by suicide, her family said Friday. Giuffre, 41, died in Neergabby, Australia, where she had been living for several years. Giuffre was one of the earliest and loudest voices calling for criminal charges against Epstein and his enablers. Other Epstein abuse survivors later credited her with giving them the courage to speak out. In 2015, Giuffre, who held U.S. citizenship at birth, was among the first Epstein victims to go public []. She was recruited by Ghislaine Maxwell. Giuffre reported years of sexual abuse and alleged she was trafficked to prominent individuals, including Prince Andrew [] of the United Kingdom. She filed a civil lawsuit [] against Prince Andrew, which was settled [] out of court in 2022 for an estimated £12 million (approximately $15 million). Earlier this week, in our FOIA lawsuit [] for records regarding Epstein, the Justice Department confirmed to a federal court that it and the FBI continue to search [] for and review records for potential disclosure (Judicial Watch Inc. v. U.S. Department of Justice [ (No. 1:25-cv-01056)). Given the Justice Department and FBI’s decision to abandon the Epstein investigation, we will step into the gap and provide leadership. Our FOIA lawsuit for records about Epstein’s most well-known victim is an important next step for accountability. FEDERAL COURT HEARING IN LAWSUIT FOR JOE BIDEN’S FAMILY BUSINESS RECORDS Judicial Watch’s legal team was in court on July 8 for a hearing [] before U.S. District Judge Sparkle L. Sooknanan in our FOIA lawsuit against the U.S. National Archives and Records Administration (NARA) for Biden family records and communications regarding travel and finance transactions, as well as communications between the Bidens and several known business associates. Judicial Watch filed the May 2023 lawsuit [] after the National Archives failed to respond to a February 2023 FOIA request (Judicial Watch, Inc. v. National Archives [] (No. 1:23-cv-01432)). This lawsuit forced the release of records [] revealing emails sent by Joe Biden using alias accounts during his vice presidency, in which he communicated with family members, including his son Hunter and brother James. The records also showed that in August 2016 [], Biden approved ending Secret Service protection for both Hunter Biden and Beau Biden’s daughter, Natalie, during a trip to Kosovo. The emails included messages to Jim and Hunter Biden regarding the then-vice president’s schedule and meetings. Some emails showed Joe Biden using the alias: robinware456@gmail.com. The emails also showed that Hunter and Jim Biden accompanied Joe Biden on taxpayer-funded trips; and then-Vice President Biden in December 2009 emailing an aide after he forgot the password to his West Wing computer. The records showed that Hunter Biden used an email address (hbiden@rosemontseneca.com) from his now-dissolved firm Rosemont Seneca Partners and that James Biden used an email address (jbiden@lionhallgp.com) tied to his consulting firm Lion Hall, which had been the subject [] of an FBI bribery investigation in the 1990s. The lawsuit also forced the release of records [] showing then-Vice President Joe Biden and his son Hunter received a May 26, 2016, email detailing a scheduled “8:45 am prep for a 9 am phone call with Pres Poroshenko,” who was the president of Ukraine. (Hunter Biden was on the board of the controversial Ukrainian firm Burisma at the time.) This lawsuit is an opportunity for the Trump team to stop the Deep State’s slow-walking of the release of Biden family corruption records. A MISSED OPPORTUNITY TO UPHOLD THE FIRST AMENDMENT The U.S. Supreme Court denied Judicial Watch’s petition challenging a lower court decision against Kari MacRae, a Massachusetts high school teacher who was fired in retaliation for social media posts, which decried woke values such as critical race theory being taught in schools. The posts predated her employment at Hanover High School in Massachusetts. We argued that the Supreme Court should take up the case as the lower courts misapplied the First Amendment and Supreme Court precedent. MacRae was fired because she spoke out against critical race theory before she was hired. The Supreme Court’s decision not to take up her case is a missed opportunity to uphold the First Amendment. Justice Clarence Thomas in a concurring opinion raised significant concerns [] about what happened to MacRae: The First Circuit’s analysis strikes me as deeply flawed. To start, I do not see how the tone of MacRae’s posts can bear on the weight of her First Amendment interest. “Speech on matters of public concern is at the heart of the First Amendment’s protection.” ... And, “[t]he inappropriate or controversial character of a statement is irrelevant to the question whether it deals with a matter of public concern.” ... “[H]umor, satire, and even personal invective can make a point about a matter of public concern.” * It undermines core First Amendment values to allow a government employer to adopt an institutional viewpoint on the issues of the day and then, when faced with a dissenting employee, portray this disagreement as evidence of disruption. And, the problem is exacerbated in the case of an employee such as MacRae, who expressed her views only outside the workplace and before her employment Judicial Watch filed a lawsui [ [] for MacRae against Hanover High School Principal Matthew Mattos and Hanover School Superintendent Matthew Ferron in November 2021, asserting a claim for First Amendment retaliation (MacRae v. Matthew Mattos et al [ [] (No. 21-cv-11917, 23-1817)). MacRae was hired as a Hanover High School teacher on August 31, 2021, but was fired on September 29, 2021, over several TikTok posts that were made months prior to her hiring at the school. MacRae, who in May of 2021 was elected to the Bourne School Committee, made the posts in her personal capacity as a citizen and candidate for public office. name: Rob Bonta
subject: NEWS: Progress in the ACLU’s lawsuit against ICE
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
These aggressive, militaristic tactics are not about safety or justice — they’re about intimidation.
# [](https://act.robbonta.com/go/3?refcode=em250711&t=1&akid=1871%2E1088799%2EXCq1_p)
A federal judge has granted a temporary restraining order blocking U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement and Customs and Border Protection from conducting illegal and unconstitutional stops of LA residents during immigration sweeps.
**This is an important step forward in the lawsuit filed by civil and immigrants rights groups, led by the ACLU of Southern California, against ICE and CBP.****A lawsuit I was proud to support and will continue to do so.**
**[If you’re ready to keep up the fight against the Trump administration’s cruel and unlawful attacks on our immigrant communities, please sign on today →](https://act.robbonta.com/survey/em-250711-pet/?t=2&akid=1871%2E1088799%2EXCq1_p)**
When federal immigration agents are used as tools to sow fear and division — wearing masks and driving unmarked vehicles, refusing to identify themselves, and stopping residents without a shred of evidence of wrongdoing — trust in law enforcement is diminished, public safety is put at risk, and people’s daily lives are disrupted.
The people of Los Angeles can’t be expected to live like this — their civil rights under attack, many afraid to even leave their homes. These tactics are cruel, and they’re a flagrant violation of the Constitution.
Today a court agreed, and ordered agents to stop conducting their unlawful stops in Los Angeles — but the fight isn’t over.
**[Add your name today if you agree we must hold Donald Trump, Kristi Noem, and this entire administration accountable to the law.](https://act.robbonta.com/survey/em-250711-pet/?t=3&akid=1871%2E1088799%2EXCq1_p)**
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.robbonta.com/survey/em-250711-pet/?t=4&akid=1871%2E1088799%2EXCq1_p)**
As Attorney General, I’ll never stop protecting California’s communities and defending your rights.
In solidarity,
Rob
* * *

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.robbonta.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=6&akid=1871%2E1088799%2EXCq1_p)

I'm also running for Governor of Arizona.

name: Hillsdale College via ICYMI News
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgm00jekmb6294gqjaehbe71b55p33stvk4rq8t8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cpi62ob1cph2bs) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **“The Second World Wars.”**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3ll4b9df9g8ovdh21761tscv601rrd9rbc5p5ig_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cpi62ob1cph2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zl9go0jq7km9d95pof8c96cmfv22hgipr5eepkno_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cpi62ob1cph2bs)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
P.S. The **“The Second World Wars”** DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. **[Reserve your copy now.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z357ds67la1mc63raq81edbn9e59rerp5ip63mc0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cpi62ob1cph2bs)**

name: Ted Cruz for NumbersUSA
subject: Birthright Citizenship was never meant for illegal aliens!
body:
Communities across America remain overwhelmed by millions of illegal aliens President Biden waved across the border.

| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zrie2mjbcgaq16p5lge9cprlitc9mrogu15vam88_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cpi62ob3c9h2bs)
---
| | My Fellow American,Communities across America remain overwhelmed by millions of illegal aliens President Biden waved across the border. The biased media keeps flooding our airwaves with open borders propaganda.And billionaires like George Soros are propping up Leftist NGOS, radical activists, and political puppets to advance the globalist, anti-American agenda of the oligarchs.They want to keep all of Biden’s illegal aliens in this country and turn America into a socialist “Open Society.” For the past fifty years, they’ve undermined American workers, American culture, and the American Dream...But I’m not writing today just to tell you about how open borders have hurt hard-working Americans.You already know that. I’m writing to tell you about the organization that is poised to put the screws to these open borders politicians and reshape the entire public discussion around immigration.That organization is **[**NumbersUSA.**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zfl65p6aduumq76135lmn8g88n6lhcml6qa4ft40_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cpi62ob3c9h2bs)** You may not have heard of them before, but since I took office in 2013, I’ve seen time after time how powerful they are in exerting public pressure on wishy-washy politicians.**NumbersUSA** harnesses the power of over 8 million grassroots members all focused on one issue: immigration.They are the voice on Capitol Hill for an America-first immigration agenda.And they grade every member of Congress to show who truly puts America first on immigration and who just talks a big game on the campaign trail. I’m honored that, after twelve years of service, **NumbersUSA** calculates I’ve earned an “A” on my career immigration report card. This sort of pressure and public accountability are vital if we want to execute President Trump’s immigration agenda. You see, many of my colleagues don’t have deeply held convictions like you, me, and President Trump.They just go whichever way the political winds blow.That’s why the Radical Left has dominated this issue from as far back as I can remember. They’ve outraised us...They’ve outspent us...And then they’ve strong-armed spineless officials into selling out the American people.Frankly, if we want to take our country back, we need **NumbersUSA** to rally American patriots from across our great land. That’s why I wanted to drop in this little note today to accompany the letter from Roy Beck, the founder of **NumbersUSA**.He’ll tell you all about the wonderful work they’re doing, and I’d ask you to consider supporting them however you see fit. We have a narrow window to make a difference, and we need your help now more than ever. God Bless you and God Bless America!
---
**Senator Ted Cruz** for **NumbersUSA**
---
P.S. **Roy’s email to you is included below.** It will help explain how we can fix our national embarrassment of an immigration system. This couldn’t be coming at a more critical moment, so please read it and [get back to him and the folks at **NumbersUSA** as soon as you can!](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z7b5p57ti7jqeapnntctiiq83lvlps6fmbvd8280_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cpi62ob3c9h2bs)
---
| | |
---
Begin Forwarded Message:**From** : Roy Beck, NumbersUSA
---
My Fellow Fighter, I’m writing to you today because I believe you’re an America First Patriot who’s sick of the open borders madness.** ****And that’s exactly who I’m hoping to reach with my _Birthright Citizenship Survey_.** **[Would you be able to set aside five minutes to fill out the survey linked here?](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zip01l5ah6gbostaaq94vq6cataoavr6vnknr6l8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cpi62ob3c9h2bs "https://numbersusa.revv.co/paf4a198075eed9?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=EM&utm_campaign=20250711_BDG_NUSA_BRCSTC_REV_PA-GAU&utm_content=GAU-20250712")** We’re launching a nationwide campaign to educate and activate American patriots on the real intention of Birthright Citizenship......and the real disaster it has become for American workers and American citizens.As Ted Cruz says, "politicians go wherever the wind blows." **So if you want action on immigration in this session of Congress, Senator Cruz needs your help to rally the troops and put pressure on his colleagues.** **[And that all starts with this Birthright Citizenship Survey that I’m asking you to complete today.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zglqoh7nq353s44uuk23iunabquf8nljddmdcn00_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cpi62ob3c9h2bs "https://numbersusa.revv.co/paf4a198075eed9?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=EM&utm_campaign=20250711_BDG_NUSA_BRCSTC_REV_PA-GAU&utm_content=GAU-20250712")** Despite what the mainstream media and too many low-level judges are saying, Birthright Citizenship for tourists and illegal aliens is not written into the Constitution.Rather, the 14th Amendment that contains Birthright Citizenship was enacted to grant full citizenship to the slaves freed by Abraham Lincoln — along with their children and their children’s children. It was not meant to apply to foreign visitors...**And it was _definitely not_ for illegal aliens.**In fact, the text of the 14th Amendment clearly states that it only applies to “persons born or naturalized in the United States, **_AND_** subject to the jurisdiction thereof.” But over time, government bureaucrats stretched the 14th Amendment and automatically gave U.S. citizenship to every birth to illegal aliens, and even to foreign nationals vacationing in the United States.Now, the situation has gotten completely out of hand...**In 2023 alone, there were roughly 350,000 births to illegal aliens in the U.S. Tourists gave birth to another 40,000.** These so-called “anchor babies” can keep illegal alien parents from getting deported and give a legal basis for a whole chain of migrants to push their way into America.Is it any surprise that human traffickers and even high-end birth tourism companies are making billions of dollars?This is not by accident – it’s by design. In fact, the Obama State Department changed U.S. visa rules to explicitly allow women to travel to America for the purpose of giving birth in 2015!Thankfully, the Trump administration overturned this rule and pushed back on illegal immigration on a number of fronts.**_But Trump can’t do it alone._**
---
[ **Take the Survey** ](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zsj04cok5qeoovrb2g65edbk31dnc4rl3efve0fg_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cpi62ob3c9h2bs)
---
**Fortunately, grassroots organizing is what NumbersUSA does best.** Over the past thirty years, we’ve grown from a small staff into the largest single-issue advocacy group in the United States.Back in 1996, we pioneered the tactic of masses of grassroots voters faxing elected officials directly. In 2007, when Ted Kennedy (remember him?) was trying to grant amnesty to millions of illegal aliens, NumbersUSA mobilized citizens in such numbers that they shut down the Congressional switchboard.The New York Times “blamed” NumbersUSA as the key factor in blocking Kennedy’s decades-long mass amnesty dream.It was a real David-and-Goliath struggle, and we won. Fast forward to 2025, and our populist immigration position is gaining traction in Washington.The DC power brokers are now calling us when they need to mobilize America-First patriots across the country.To be clear, that’s not because they want to talk to me, Roy Beck. It’s because they know that NumbersUSA is the connection point for 8 million members who understand how our immigration system is utterly broken......and what it will take to fix it.We’ve never had a President like Donald Trump who gets this issue on such a visceral level. But it takes more than just one man to reverse this open borders insanity. He needs a lot of congressional action to back him up and to make improvements permanent.**In our decades on Capitol Hill, we have learned that nothing grabs attention like fired-up American patriots just like you.** And there’s no denying the impact when a mountain of responses pours in from across the country.It proves that the immigration action we’re calling for isn’t just coming from me, or the great folks at NumbersUSA, or even Senator Ted Cruz—**no, it’s the unmistakable _DEMAND _of the American people.**And at that point, a politician doesn’t need one ounce of courage. Just a pinch of common sense will be enough to realize that voting against the American people is a “one-way ticket to Palookaville.”That’s how you take a nationwide network of Patriots and turn it into victories at the ballot box, in Congress, and for generations of Americans to come.That’s what NumbersUSA is all about. We have the experience, we have the playbook, but we need your help to execute on Birthright Citizenship and many other key immigration issues.Since we don’t take a penny from dark money, corrupt NGOs, or the government, we rely on patriots just like you to transform our vision into concrete action. **[So after you fill out your survey, please make a generous donation of $35, $50, $100 or even as much as $500 or $1,000.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z93tierfq8fdtjenjl0b04648fkhp9jkq2t4qung_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cpi62ob3c9h2bs "https://numbersusa.revv.co/paf4a198075eed9?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=EM&utm_campaign=20250711_BDG_NUSA_BRCSTC_REV_PA-GAU&utm_content=GAU-20250712")** **If you can’t make a larger donation at this time, I hope you’ll just cover the cost to process your survey—$3.91.** We’ve run enough of these campaigns on Capitol Hill to know that it takes a veritable army of American patriots to get through to these elected officials.And the only way to assemble an army is with a call that goes out all across the nation. [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zeece9uv2mnfi7bk6f6uok4ehd1v7cl9maqodnr8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cpi62ob3c9h2bs "https://numbersusa.revv.co/paf4a198075eed9?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=EM&utm_campaign=20250711_BDG_NUSA_BRCSTC_REV_PA-GAU&utm_content=GAU-20250712")[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z1i09sbpdkbrppbasm89vr30at496gk31f2ntugo_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cpi62ob3c9h2bs)[**Your completed survey and your donation will be an indisputable sign that the time for change has come.** ](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z38r79pglt0bt7k2p933scliolhdcn0ula8k2tfg_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cpi62ob3c9h2bs)
---
Thank you and God bless you today!
---
| | **Roy Beck**

name: State Republican HQ
subject: A new political party!?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Republican State Leadership Committee
body:
Looping you in:

NOT A DRILL! NOT FAKE NEWS!
The rumors are true...
Elon Musk is seriously considering creating a third political party, the "America Party." We wasted no time to come to you because we want to know what you think about it, Friend[SHARE YOUR TWO CENTS NOW
](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z1qk1feiui62mt5oil1ma3eu0qletk1ucij5rhk0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cpi61o31chh2bs)This could be a significant shift in our political landscape. State Republicans are focused on what matters most to Americans like you - lower taxes, safer communities, and more freedom from government overreach.
But what would a new third party mean for these priorities? Would it strengthen or weaken our ability to deliver results at the state level where it matters most...
Your opinion is crucial to us, Friend. That's why we've put together a brief survey to gather your thoughts on this latest development. [As someone who values your input, we'd be grateful if you could take just 2 minutes to share your perspective.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z23n27b5la3t6fnm9ah9svarvidviucv99vgfp1o_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cpi61o31chh2bs)[SHARE YOUR TWO CENTS NOW
](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z8b86p6mlamotmu3m7jqsri6k66ocsdn8js6knio_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cpi61o31chh2bs)Your responses will help guide our strategy as we continue working to elect strong Republican leaders to state offices across the country. After all, while Washington gets the headlines, it's state leaders who are solving real problems for American families.
With critical state elections coming up, we need to understand how potential changes to our political system might impact our shared goals.
[Thank you for standing with us and for taking the time to share your thoughts.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z6dnoktdvu9if3d51cru81jqug535m80asc0vaqg_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cpi61o31chh2bs)[SHARE YOUR TWO CENTS NOW

# **[THOUGHTCRIME Ep. 90 — The Epstein Nothingburger? Death by DEI? Celebrity AI Scams?](http://trk.libertyledger._NdfvJZTivdChAqs8cmu6A)**
---
Slow news week, eh? Charlie, Jack, Tyler, and Blake dive into the debate about Jeffrey Epstein that is splitting the base. They ask what can be done to restore harmony, then ask: -Did DEI up the death toll in the Texas floods? -Will AI celebrity deepfakes trick your parents into giving away all their money? -What's the most objectionable part of Zohran Mamdani, and why is it him eating rice with his bare hands? -What is the "4 a.m. Club" and is it the female liberal Qanon? -Did Fruit of the Loom have a cornucopia in it back in the day, or not, or did reality bend to hide the truth?Support the show: http://www.charliekirk.com/supportSee omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.

# **[Spanish archbishop encourages Christians to read Rule of St. Benedict](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
St. Benedict. / Credit: Pietro Perugino via Wikimedia (Public domain) ACI Prensa Staff, Jul 11, 2025 / 05:00 am (CNA). Archbishop Enrique Benavent Vidal of Valencia in Spain encouraged the faithful to take advantage of summer vacation to read and delve deeper into the Rule of St. Benedict, as it contains “insights that are useful” for the daily life of all Christians.In his July 5 weekly letter, the prelate observed that on Friday, July 11, the Catholic Church will celebrate the feast of St. Benedict, the patron saint of Europe who lived between the fifth and sixth centuries.

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood corruption
body:
Please -- for the sake of all our families

| | |
---
| | Dear Friend, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zp8beb4dq29bj9pa6q8rqi3t2b1jhg0sccbf2uh0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cpi61o31chh2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. [**Today, I'm inviting you to support the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z74jbqtq0ssjgvba4tj54d7s1c6ub17or770pt90_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cpi61o31chh2bs) And it’s only possible with the help of grandparents and seniors like you. Introducing:_ Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children’s show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of the truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children’s show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[Because I can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z6nkcjcr3fqbh8iui334iphnh94f7a88ug8aelgo_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cpi61o31chh2bs)** Millions of families are already watching Season One of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ on our streaming service BRAVE+, YouTube, and on DVD. And the reviews from parents, grandparents, and kids are incredible. One Mom of three little girls told us: “Our family was struggling through a pretty difficult day. But I turned on _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ and that was exactly what my heart needed as much as theirs.” It’s amazing that your simple response to this letter can make that kind of difference for a family. Each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. [**That’s why I’m asking you to help us finish Season Two of**** _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_****by giving a gift of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zmo6u85tctjcetsj7ld06ilbtilbces4o7v5fmk8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cpi61o31chh2bs)**** Whether you can send $35, $25,000, anything in between, or anything higher or lower – please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As a special “Thank You” for your **[gift of $50 or more](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zdknfrpvdki4c7kamlone8iu8qmevulnngusv9f8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cpi61o31chh2bs)** , I’ll send you Season One of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ for your family to enjoy FREE on DVD. And with your [**gift of $100 or more**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zfs8to52qcegh1nulc305flke6lk7vpnc95t20jo_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cpi61o31chh2bs), I’ll also send you a copy of my children’s book: Pride Comes Before the Fall which teaches children to be humble before God instead of prideful. I wrote Pride Comes Before the Fall with the great team at BRAVE books – the same God-focused conservative team that’s bringing _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ to life. Maybe you’ve seen me and other BRAVE Books authors on Fox News, Newsmax, TBN or other media outlets. Unabashed conservatives like Riley Gaines, Lara Trump, Kevin Sorbo, Missy Robertson, Dinesh D’Souza, John Solomon, Jack Posobiec, and so many more have written a BRAVE Book to stop the Hollywood groomers. Supported by you, BRAVE Books gives parents the tools they need to rebuild our families and reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon. Now I know there are a lot of places you can spend your money in the next ten minutes. **[But I hope you’ll be a part of history by supporting _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. ](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zuq8doa0aef98nqm3maef9d57cd6jfm03sq3u7ig_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cpi61o31chh2bs)** Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth. Thank you for joining us in the fight.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zcn58av7vjs3jcff3384mvqv2ajq6fmcur0vthqo_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cpi61o31chh2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z7hoc4d2k7nji0o0jf6amgbfclgc5pr3t6n93k50_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cpi61o31chh2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in history made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z34bofmv981aq02s5agdqg6t4s58ahms45120a7g_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cpi61o31chh2bs) **Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk

clean_body: Please -- for the sake of all our families | | | | | Dear Friend, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues... | | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. And it’s only possible with the help of grandparents and seniors like you. Introducing: Iggy and Mr. Kirk.This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children’s show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of the truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children’s show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Millions of families are already watching Season One of Iggy and Mr. Kirk on our streaming service BRAVE+, YouTube, and on DVD. And the reviews from parents, grandparents, and kids are incredible. One Mom of three little girls told us: “Our family was struggling through a pretty difficult day. But I turned on Iggy and Mr. Kirk and that was exactly what my heart needed as much as theirs.” It’s amazing that your simple response to this letter can make that kind of difference for a family. Each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. ** Whether you can send $35, $25,000, anything in between, or anything higher or lower – please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As a special “Thank You” for your , I’ll send you Season One of Iggy and Mr. Kirk for your family to enjoy FREE on DVD. And with your , I’ll also send you a copy of my children’s book: Pride Comes Before the Fall which teaches children to be humble before God instead of prideful. I wrote Pride Comes Before the Fall with the great team at BRAVE books – the same God-focused conservative team that’s bringing Iggy and Mr. Kirk to life. Maybe you’ve seen me and other BRAVE Books authors on Fox News, Newsmax, TBN or other media outlets. Unabashed conservatives like Riley Gaines, Lara Trump, Kevin Sorbo, Missy Robertson, Dinesh D’Souza, John Solomon, Jack Posobiec, and so many more have written a BRAVE Book to stop the Hollywood groomers. Supported by you, BRAVE Books gives parents the tools they need to rebuild our families and reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon. Now I know there are a lot of places you can spend your money in the next ten minutes. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth. Thank you for joining us in the fight. Sincerely, | | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father | | | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!) Actor, Author, and Father | | | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in history made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. body:

Dear Patriot,

Summer is here, and with it, distractions abound. But at **O'Keefe Media Group** , we never take a break from exposing the truth - and [**we need your help to keep the momentum going**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcrdjgcb299uf86s4jaac9596srajp48n6m8itu0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cpi61p74cth2bs).

**Donations are down this July** , and [**without your support**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zt9arr44evuhtm3agjod7p01la3ru3ch6v1gjb60_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cpi61p74cth2bs), our critical investigations could grind to a halt.

Recently, our undercover journalists caught **Arslan Akhtar** , a U.S. State Department visa specialist, on hidden camera making shocking admissions.

[****](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkg7713f0ilo5plbmuav373vhncjbnkq51tc874g_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cpi61p74cth2bs)
Akhtar confessed to coaching illegal immigrants on how to dodge ICE, telling them, **" Don't talk to the police, don't admit the truth, keep your mouth shut."**

He even bragged about reversing rejected visas to help applicants gain entry into the U.S.

[**Watch our latest report and donate here to keep us going.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmktu3amdevluc9jqqhbcpr44a02m2r77gema9d0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cpi61p74cth2bs)

But it gets worse. Akhtar openly expressed hatred for entire groups of people - Yemenis, Indians, Bangladeshis, and white Americans - calling them "awful" and "garbage."

He even wished a barbaric fate on Elon Musk, saying he'd love to see him "dragged out of the building with his hair plugs and lynched on the street."

**This is a man with power over who gets to enter our country.**

I believe the American people deserve to know what's happening behind closed doors.

**Our hidden cameras revealed Akhtar 's bias and abuse of power**, and we're not stopping there.

But with summer distractions pulling donations away, we're at risk of falling short. **[**We need to raise $53,000 by July 31st to keep our operations running and continue exposing corruption.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zef192scgeesllpedogj1cnb529ueoi06ibni1ao_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cpi61p74cth2bs)**

Your gift today will fund:

* **More undercover investigations** to uncover corruption in government and institutions.

* **Legal defense** against lawsuits, like the one from Washington attorney Mark Zaid, who's trying to silence our work.

**[**Will you step up with a tax-deductible donation today**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqonb4et12rpse6itmabqkj2rnidiqkkg3i8n4o0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cpi61p74cth2bs)****?**

Every dollar brings us closer to holding the powerful accountable. **[**Click here to donate securely now: O'Keefe Media Group Donation Page**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9055j7egef6vada9l4fmqabhps6vbu453m3d2kg_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cpi61p74cth2bs)**

We're fighting for truth, and **we 're fighting for you**.

We will not stop exposing the truth... because you, the American people, deserve to be informed."

**_Join us in this mission. Donate today._**

In Truth,
James O’Keefe

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9bgs5dr52s9oqv383rq0q9trocv6ujev0b4seug_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cph64pb1chh2bs) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **“The Second World Wars.”**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8pdjksq9335o4qo6folc58shjllnmriku3498cg_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cph64pb1chh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z08qtmukqadmqd4fonp7q0edsfqkk7fvbnrkcbp0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cph64pb1chh2bs)**

clean_body: This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “The Second World Wars” on DVD: Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College P.S. The “The Second World Wars” DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. Pop Acta Media | American Action News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Team Downing
subject: Senate moves to block China’s land grab!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
Republicans are blowing the whistle on China.

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._rad5zLLUno0QBCA)Peter,
President Trump and Senate Republicans are sounding the alarm and stepping up to stop the Chinese Communist Party (CCP) from buying up our farmland, residential property, and resources.
Under China’s _National Defense Mobilization Law_ , enacted in 2010, the Chinese Communist Party (CCP) has the authority to take control of any Chinese-owned asset anywhere in the world during a declared “crisis.” **_That includes farmland, water resources, and infrastructure on U.S. soil,_ raising serious national security concerns about a hostile regime gaining access to critical American assets.****
**This isn’t just about national security. It’s about our sovereignty and the future of our country.[ Act now to help end foreign land grabs and take back what’s ours:](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)[ADD YOUR NAME NOW
](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)The fight is on. Add your name to help block China from owning our soil!
Thanks for your support,Team Downing

name: Ted Cruz
subject: Flood Relief Efforts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate
body:
Texas is grieving right now. Let’s do something good for the Lone Star State.

| | |
---
| | Fellow Conservative,My heart breaks for every parent who lost a child in the catastrophic flooding in Central Texas.

As a father, I can't imagine anything worse.

On Monday, I went to Camp Mystic to see the devastation firsthand.

Fellow Conservative, it was the most horrible thing I have ever seen.

That's why I'm reaching out to you for help raising funds for the flood response, relief, and recovery efforts.

**[Please make a donation to the Kerr County Flood Relief Fund- and 100% of your contribution will support the communities most affected by this horrific tragedy. ](http://trk.tedcruz.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6MjE0NTQxMDEsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4NzQ5MDg0NSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI1MTkzLTM4Y2QzOWU1M2ZjNzRiZjFiOWZiN2UxNTc2NjFlNDRkIiwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMCIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vY2Z0ZXhhc2hpbGxjb3VudHJ5LmZjc3VpdGUuY29tL2VycC9kb25hdGUvY3JlYXRlL2Z1bmQ_ZnVuaXRfaWQ9NDIwMSJ9/dBdWUi4jIDMaAfhyaKGLww)**Let's come together, as Texans and Americans always do when tragedy hits, and lift up those who need us now more than ever.

And if you're not in a position to donate, I ask that you please say a prayer for the grieving families who lost their loved ones, and for the heroic first responders who are risking everything to bring those who are still missing back home.

Thank you and God bless you,Ted Cruz
---
[**Donate:** **Kerr County Flood Relief Fund******](http://trk.tedcruz.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6MjE0NTQxMDEsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4NzQ5MDg0NSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI1MTkzLTM4Y2QzOWU1M2ZjNzRiZjFiOWZiN2UxNTc2NjFlNDRkIiwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMSIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vY2Z0ZXhhc2hpbGxjb3VudHJ5LmZjc3VpdGUuY29tL2VycC9kb25hdGUvY3JlYXRlL2Z1bmQ_ZnVuaXRfaWQ9NDIwMSJ9/y-hvGTOtFKpUlsjezApEjg)****
---
P.S. Please feel free forward this special request and donation link to other friends and family who might be able to help in some way.
---
