name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’s entertainment
body:
Please - for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---

name: The Flyover
subject: Trump Surveys Texas Flood Damage, Bitcoin Sets Record, and a 104 MPH Fastball
body:
President Donald Trump and first lady Melania Trump [visited the Texas Hill Country on Friday](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD3SozAMQE9jOmdsYfNTuNiGLttuyZhYBO0Ym8EKCbffIbM3-Go9afTen_t49xQpPX_7FR3PeUz4LhGZcR95f61bee0HnoXx48sccw7BryMosFK1UsMYPMVzNFVwMyJgXaHTrYVam07ranENPqYaJ2U7Y6Zp8k2j2xpCD6Ah9LOpyF3XVKtBK9VYdbOd6SYfVD930MKkhVEYiPN--5sp8YJzPPOB--2R1yq6hXkrov4lYBAw8IILxXjNBAxLXvESEjD4sFKiwrtnyukiLzvJC8qEH5ZaKRn8eaG27q3VjYx0oHxtwTMWGXLyMcj_W1cN-c1B6SlgqHYXtjfFSKVphVHP1dP3iYp_VPVw8C8AAP__V0KNfw), surveying the July 4 flood site that killed at least 120 people, with dozens still missing.

| | |
---
| [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkbGO2zAMhp9G3hxIlG05g4dDA2_p2tFQLCpRIYmGROcub1_4kKIP0I34CX7ER_66LlcbYsj3nzbhxJ6WjJ81IjOWhcuetrqXJ74q45etPhI5Z9MCEvpWmlbB4myIr6Vr3OQRAXWDkzI9aNWNSjWPSctegbLyrFeFtxH64azQ3-yAZyONMk2YDpo0CpSUQy9P_diNN-vk2Y9g4KZEJ9EFpnL6TSHzA3180RPLaaXUxOnBvFWhPwTMAuaV8pNe5B-04YnKXcDsKFvGowjVVsbSFowBvYCZv9pvp9pCf8zreee0VNrLikJf3osEDEec0IU9CX3BZEN8h6tNmw33LPTlx8e1ldLI3vztUWbMLPQlWw6UbWz_Xbcpk9s-Q4yhDkZ08n5Av5X4v_7wnOBPAAAA__-tpJ5o) | |
# Saturday, July 12, 2025
---|---
**Good morning!** On this day in 1862, President Abraham Lincoln signed a law establishing the [U.S. Army Medal of Honor](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkMFuhCAURb8Gdxp4ojgLFk0ad9N016VBeYw0IAbejPXvG_sL3d3VPTnn6z7djQ9-e3yYiJpcmjY8SkAizBPlZ9zLM7_wLIQ_priQkrUmTsChq7mqBUzW-HBOsrLaIQK2FWqhOmiFHISoVm0lqHmBzi6zXRy_mX6WYPreomqBG1d5fb1xJUBw3ne86QY5zMbymxtAwSyY5Gg9pdx8J7_Rii6c6YW5WVKsgl6J9sLaNwYjg_E4jsbky4jStmBEwnw20QcG42fKZEJhMHIG43tarhnRmlAnV69pS7nZrauytvvhQ_ClV0zyRzQ-_MHoX4VeGn4DAAD__26TfBE) for noncommissioned officers and privates showing gallantry during the Civil War. In 1863, Congress extended eligibility to officers, recognizing their valor.

Dogs may be man’s best friend, but a list of the 13 nicest wild animals might have you wanting to hang out with bonobos and otters, instead. [See what other surprisingly sweet creatures are included below](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFyhCAYBOCn0Y4b-AH1Coo0dpc2pcPJ70GC4MDvGd8-c8kjpP52dnb24zbdbIghPd7tioaWPCU8akQiLBOVfd3qXp54VsJvW5eYs3N2nYCDZrxnAiZnQzwn1TqzIALKFo3oNUihBiFabwZ5VcBB8q4DXKSUWnVaSmkVv_NO6jaYVxvvBQjOO80velDD3Tp-XQbo4S4axdEFyuXymUMij0s88xPLZc5rG40n2moj3xoYGxhtCquNX_mFDYwpzFiJHSE69keV5cTQFvLMJsfI54rszDurPu-v1LaVbGfPjkCezXankFMDY1uM244QY6hd3yj-WG2IvxPoX789DfwEAAD__5O-gvw).

We're sponsored today by [Convoy of Hope](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkbGO2zAMhp9G3hxIlG05g4dDA2_p2tFQLCpRIYmGROcub1_4kKIP0I34CX7ER_66LlcbYsj3nzbhxJ6WjJ81IjOWhcuetrqXJ74q45etPhI5Z9MCEvpWmlbB4myIr6Vr3OQRAXWDkzI9aNWNSjWPSctegbLyrFeFtxH64azQ3-yAZyONMk2YDpo0CpSUQy9P_diNN-vk2Y9g4KZEJ9EFpnL6TSHzA3180RPLaaXUxOnBvFWhPwTMAuaV8pNe5B-04YnKXcDsKFvGowjVVsbSFowBvYCZv9pvp9pCf8zreee0VNrLikJf3osEDEec0IU9CX3BZEN8h6tNmw33LPTlx8e1ldLI3vztUWbMLPQlWw6UbWz_Xbcpk9s-Q4yhDkZ08n5Av5X4v_7wnOBPAAAA__-tpJ5o), who are providing aid to flood survivors in Texas. Right now, _The Flyover_ is matching the first $2,000 in donations to support their efforts.

|
---
## Child Labor Probe at Calif. Pot Farm
Federal agents found [10 illegal migrant youths](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2u2zAQhE9DdWuQqz-7UJFG3UubUliRS4vJihRIyo5vHyhXeOVggA8z36-v5YuChPj8STtP1acl8rsI18p5qfncj3LmF39K5b9UvKTkHO0LauxBj2BwcRTks3SNmzwzctvwZMYeW9PdjWm2SfcDa4uWne4HS-ujNdYPaB6jGTrWbROmi6ZHg0brode3_t7dV3L64e844mpUp9mFmvLtdwqxbuzlk16cbzbtjUxbrUdR7Q-Fs8I5fo5U6lUpnC-wwlmPCmdjFM5ngevfFTUEEX6SwB6emWKFP8EV8OmMDqiCJQk-5RgIjlTBU96BCnh2BYTOaDewWxAHQmvKcOS0ssK5yZM73kEklGFUnX7uFOT_0votva8J_wUAAP__fbmOuQ), mostly unaccompanied, at a California marijuana farm on Thursday, prompting an investigation into potential child labor violations. ## List: Friendly, Dangerous Wild Animals Ranked
A list ranking [13 friendly and seven dangerous-to-approach wild animals](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFyhCAYBOCn0Y4b-AH1Coo0dpc2pcPJ70GC4MDvGd8-c8kjpP52dnb24zbdbIghPd7tioaWPCU8akQiLBOVfd3qXp54VsJvW5eYs3N2nYCDZrxnAiZnQzwn1TqzIALKFo3oNUihBiFabwZ5VcBB8q4DXKSUWnVaSmkVv_NO6jaYVxvvBQjOO80velDD3Tp-XQbo4S4axdEFyuXymUMij0s88xPLZc5rG40n2moj3xoYGxhtCquNX_mFDYwpzFiJHSE69keV5cTQFvLMJsfI54rszDurPu-v1LaVbGfPjkCezXankFMDY1uM244QY6hd3yj-WG2IvxPoX789DfwEAAD__5O-gvw) places dolphins and sloths among the nicest, while advising people to avoid hippos and crocodiles. Scientists say dolphins sense human emotions and respond with compassion, while sloths, known for their calm demeanor, have mastered the art of relaxation. Other nice critters making the list are giant pandas, otters, bonobos, and bison. The list of animals to avoid includes expected threats like wolves, grizzly bears, and crocodiles, along with surprising entries such as hippos and African Cape buffalo. Cape buffalo can recognize and pursue humans who previously threatened them, while hippos are aggressive, agile, and—simply put—dangerous. [See the full list here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFyhCAYBOCn0Y4b-AH1Coo0dpc2pcPJ70GC4MDvGd8-c8kjpP52dnb24zbdbIghPd7tioaWPCU8akQiLBOVfd3qXp54VsJvW5eYs3N2nYCDZrxnAiZnQzwn1TqzIALKFo3oNUihBiFabwZ5VcBB8q4DXKSUWnVaSmkVv_NO6jaYVxvvBQjOO80velDD3Tp-XQbo4S4axdEFyuXymUMij0s88xPLZc5rG40n2moj3xoYGxhtCquNX_mFDYwpzFiJHSE69keV5cTQFvLMJsfI54rszDurPu-v1LaVbGfPjkCezXankFMDY1uM244QY6hd3yj-WG2IvxPoX789DfwEAAD__5O-gvw).

The Trumps met with Gov. Greg Abbott, first responders, local officials, and survivors in Kerrville, while acknowledging that some losses can never be recovered. List: Friendly, Dangerous Wild Animals Ranked A list ranking places dolphins and sloths among the nicest, while advising people to avoid hippos and crocodiles. Scientists say dolphins sense human emotions and respond with compassion, while sloths, known for their calm demeanor, have mastered the art of relaxation. Other nice critters making the list are giant pandas, otters, bonobos, and bison. The list of animals to avoid includes expected threats like wolves, grizzly bears, and crocodiles, along with surprising entries such as hippos and African Cape buffalo. ## Trump Visits Texas, Assesses Flood Response
[President Donald Trump](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2y4yAMBeCnwR0ZkME_BcU2dHfbLT1yUGJmcMiAHMdvv2O_wq3UaD7pnH8_0w_GFF_Pv7iS4-8jTy_aayJmKhOXbX3XrXzoqI-Ucwi44pPWPIECK1UvNUwBYzom0wQ3qzDqhpzuLbR60GpoFtcOPYGFwWAIGkbdtjh30PX3uWutpbmJ7sRUr0FrpU13e5j72I1o5hCUxdEKoyhEzuXGCzF9sT7SkT9Ubve8NsktzO8q2j8CvAC_7_ttq8g54HEuCPCVczkE-DPZOZBjfgnw510BXvUCvNYC_IXLK2l8PWUg5EVyTklWwnJf5FWI3N4BmU5qMNZqBa26jKa48N5jSrF2vTDquWJM15P8u2o_Dv4HAAD__6bAjBo) and First Lady Melania visited the Texas Hill Country on Friday in the wake of the July 4 floods. They were joined by Gov. Greg Abbott, Texas Senators Ted Cruz and John Cornyn, and Agriculture Sec. Brooke Rollins. The Trumps traveled from Kelly Field Air Base to Kerrville to survey damage along the Guadalupe River, where the president met with about [30 first responders](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGurCAQBuCnwQ7DsIhrQXEbu73tLc0Io5KAbIBdd9_-Rs8jnG6SyT-T7__3mB7og9_XvxjJ1M-Spp2OEqhWylPNr_gsr_ymb1lCSs5hxJVimqSQHRc9Bzk59OE7qcaZWbgBGjLQd_IGdxD3ZjOWhFUarNY9OY1CoJRg3eDuOGuYofHmPCZ6kAAClG4XZQc9oJqdEx0OHVOCnK8pt3WjSh8sS_imN-XWptgEs9X6LOz2h8mRyfE4jtbO5VSceybHc2RyvDD8yvMLw380vBBmu_ElZR59KX5fuU179fuLzlyTjXsePgRfdM-UWCP6cL2uvyvsbeT_AAAA__-V_ILE). Trump attended a roundtable discussion with Texas officials later in the afternoon and met with families of some of those who lost their lives. "_It’s a horrible thing,[horrible thing](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2unTAQhVdjOl_ZxuancJGG7qVNiQZmAEs2Rngu77L7iKfsIPWcOTrf9-dr_IIQw77-hkSeP0sed_oukZjpHPl8p6O8z4vussScESHBSimPRhknVSu1GRFCvEdboZ8U9roir1tnat1p1VWb7yYg07tmAdXP1mI3L2bp7AQwabS2roJ_ylSrjdZK2-a12LlverATonLQO2EVYeB8vngjpg-UJd75ovM151RFvzEfRdS_hBmEGXijLcT43IQZtpzoARJmAExhD4VP4JD3J_nQSd5I7vRhqZWSCPcTdXXvnG5kDBfJ94HAVCTmHSLKf1_PDPnjJOyrMEN1ejy-Q4yhNK2wak0QfkZU_H9aL2_-BgAA__9Y7I8P)_," Trump said before leaving the White House. “ _Nobody can even believe it. That much water, that fast._ "
## Search Continues for Flood Victims
[Search efforts continued](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OtCAYRq9GOwwwoENB8TV287Vbmld4VbL8TAB1vPvNzF7C1k_OyZPz9Zge4LyL638IqOtrSVPEs3isFfNU8x6eZc8HXmXxKVkLAVYMaeKUS0IHwvhkwflrEq3VM7WKtajZIPmN3Rm9t5uWIOUAfJGK9krdpABjhJCGSxwoo3Pr9FtGB8YZo0z03SKM6hWI2VoqQclGULSuptzVDSu-oCz-SgfmzqTQer3V-izN7V_Dx4aP53l23y-I77Hho8FYM3jy4Ro-encgmX1aSUHIZiNLyiS4UlxciUmxurhjIVB-CWJSCHt09SJrdnjg29FmbZ-n896VfmgEXQM4_zlT_5bw0PwnAAD__zHiiNQ) Friday for more than 160 people still missing following last week's flooding. No confirmed discoveries were made, likely due to the amount of silt covering affected areas. The United Cajun Navy, a Louisiana-based volunteer organization, discovered the remains of a trailer [buried upside down](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL3SpCAURJ8GMyy4gj8BwSZms-mG1h25jGyhWIA6vv3WzD7CF5_qrj795zE90Ae_vX7jSqa8XZw2unKgUihNJR3rno900p1diNFaXPFFa5xAgOai4xImiz7ck6qseQo7yIqM7DQ0speirxbTK4GE2iI0GnTztL1rZ3SSJMpmcH3lzadMdBKkFFK1tVPz0A6ontYKjYNmSpD1Jaa6LFTojdmFO56U6jmuVTBLKXtmzS8GI4Pxuq56XlLcPpTB-NFhMC7xyCVu_JtnMGIqfg7EYJzx77HxDc_7P-Rf08xLQh8ocRBdC60Y6n3Zq2TsfvkQfG47psRrRR--M8rPzjsN_AsAAP__L2uFpA) in silt, with only its tires protruding above the surface. Meanwhile, forecasters are projecting that this week's high temperatures in the Hill Country may be followed by heavy rains and [more potential flooding](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2u5CAMhZ-GdETg_JAUFNuku9tuGTlgBiQSRsBMbvbpV5n7CNt-tuzvnD9f6xeGGI7Hb9xJ12-X1oPOEqlWymvNr_1ZXvlNV3ExJWtxxwftaQUBAxeKS1gthnitfWP1JuwsG9JSDdDJSYqp8ZoGcNTJQQkF8zRv24iuV9M0ym6cwLkm6PuYUBKkFLIfW9ebeZyx36wVA84D6wXZUFNuq6dK31hcvNKbcmvS3kTta30W1v1isDBYzvNs0ZjXSVj9zw6DhY579IO4S5kMlloYLAed3EUsnn8C8uozYeUxpb3wcPDPP46F-xsXk7LxVHgmcxtc_G86iMEi1dxBNzVZ2-cZYgxlVKwXjx1D_GjW_yv3reFfAAAA__8z6pER).
## L.A. Tops Texas Cities in BBQ Ranking
The annual ranking of America’s [best barbecue cities](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGO8yAQBOCnwZ0tFuM4FBR_4y5_e6W1NouDhEMONiF--1Muj3Dtp9GMNF-X-YIhhtv2H3ey_PJpvlEtkZgpz5wf-7088pOO4mNKzuGOG-1pVlINrRxbULPDEI9ZN84u0hloyMI4qB7OIM_N1UoFaMDB0KPvV-1HbXqvpJZnoN4sYxPsu0yOoAAk6FPn9WpOBvXinBzQDEJLcoFT7vhKTC8sPh7pSblb095Ee2W-F9H_E2oSaqq1dhHrrTBm_mSEmpaYNqGmwg8XqLyBCrfL8t2ugT_SZOvuNcQYymkUWm47hvg7wX875mnVTwAAAP__jIh4TA) from Austin-based LawnStarter dropped earlier this month, with an unhappy surprise for Texas barbecue fans. While the Lone Star State placed Houston and Austin in the Top 5, some Texans objected to the idea that no Texas city could top Los Angeles, which took the No. 2 spot ahead of No. 3 Houston. LawnStarter assessed 13 metrics for the rankings, including the number of barbecue restaurants in a city and the average rating of smokehouses, but hometown die-hards are [questioning](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGurCAUheGnwU4DW4SxoLiN3dz2lGYLm5EExQAzjm9_MvMKp17Jt5L_5z7fMcSwP_7jRqa-fZp3OkukWinPNT-3ozzzi67iY0rO4YYP2tIMHIaW61bA7DDEa5aNMwt3o2jICD1AL26C35rVEPRKDEuvR66d6hUIbyWXw4jcO-WoCeaDcS1ACC6k6ry0oxpRLs7xAceBSU4u1JS7ulKlNxYfr_Si3Nm0NdGstR6F9f8YTAym8zw7u-a0f1YGk0_JMZgw12AjMZgWKrVdMC9kn9TaUK_WYgw-5T1g-_Vb4FqBHvvuWI8mG3ecIcZQlGaSPzYM8Xtd_xbsZeA3AAD__wYogEw) the methodology. Austin ranked No. 5, while San Antonio and Dallas took No. 11 and No. 13, respectively. Kansas City topped the list. Tops Texas Cities in BBQ Ranking The annual ranking of America’s from Austin-based LawnStarter dropped earlier this month, with an unhappy surprise for Texas barbecue fans. While the Lone Star State placed Houston and Austin in the Top 5, some Texans objected to the idea that no Texas city could top Los Angeles, which took the No. 2 spot ahead of No. 3 Houston. LawnStarter assessed 13 metrics for the rankings, including the number of barbecue restaurants in a city and the average rating of smokehouses, but hometown die-hards are the methodology. name: The Maine Wire
subject: Maine Supreme Court Upholds Shenna Bellows’ Wording of Voter ID Referendum Question
body:
Here's the latest breaking news at The Maine Wire

** Maine Supreme Court Upholds Shenna Bellows’ Wording of Voter ID Referendum Question (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=9a5739a6f8&e=f093fa355c)
------------------------------------------------------------
By Libby Palanza on Jul 11, 2025 05:36 pm
The Maine Supreme Court ruled Friday to uphold Secretary of State Shenna Bellows’ wording of a citizens initiative requiring voters to present some form of identification set to appear on the ballot this November. The challengers bringing the case had alleged that the wording of the question, as drafted by Secretary Bellows’ Office, was leading [...]

** Circuit Court Voids FTC’s Rules Making It Easier to Cancel Subscriptions, But Mainers Will Still Reap the Benefits Under New, Bipartisan Law (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=e46160986f&e=f093fa355c)
------------------------------------------------------------
By Libby Palanza on Jul 11, 2025 05:30 pm
Earlier this week, the 8th Circuit Court of Appeals voided the Federal Trade Commission’s (FTC) new rule making it easier for customers to cancel unwanted subscriptions. Mainers, however, can still expect to see some of the promised benefits under a new law unanimously approved in both chambers of the Legislature and signed by Gov. Janet [...]

As violence has increased against Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) agents enforcing federal law, with apparent encouragement from many Democrat lawmakers, Rep. Jared Golden (D-Maine) joined Rep. Don Bacon (R-Nebr.) in sponsoring a bill aimed at increasing penalties for violence against law enforcement. | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. subject: From the SEC to the Senate, now to the Governor’s Mansion
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TUBERVILLE FOR GOVERNOR, INC
body:
Senator Rick Scott backs Coach Tuberville for Governor -- a proven defender of America's veterans and service members.
| [ ](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=e7315b9f951f4865864496c543cca42e&_e=dyMjPBzwTUNthZOWykJpChYD2fN1FyTzbjQi_f3WLW1I76G8ZfeplvFxGUMPvSAnZXD6rUxR5d0h9FAp47iSpshxWTxG-5ZxH0EltweHXdKt_aY3ESzQ2JvWVnjQhEkNZHXqPAJoKCJzXeDVERp1abyVswlp4TJ7CokbvX_GdUYRdsTtO4XckuqB3ax3-QnLNuek1ySlSdEE7LyBr48hzJqaBPClCDAU1m0c9ofFw8XgwxThTHSYEHm0icaG8y9MBhI3PGWT_Uo1gUaZvKnfHGo3mg8dv-ZBXaFa9xG5iNKigSJC6taZabnED2Fr9o9DD2zUdYtTZPJNrEAVjR0BLT18tboxk2hCTSUZMuM3liSFSMUhpqnDzQ1V8rjJBfXQjJU_WddNoAxN_9aRUHsxdkvx8RjcpbFzk5p9bRG_oy8pFQ4O2UQ8B9OXxyx1z0WUbnE5wyTgFb9sDsqKv0coMsJeb-JDxwcp2hu1Tc9F0RPll0TYChc6pVhnz8hoCtZWFqn9n3P0c8ypk_aM04z66xUH8CCbDZLShlJxWJBi7nRk1ad2hewVJ5CRNOO_K5dN)

Peter,

First, Tommy Tuberville was a coach.

Not just any coach -- a leader who turned boys into men, built winning teams, and taught discipline, grit, and faith at every step. In the locker room and on the field, he knew how to lead.

Then, he brought that same work ethic and fearlessness to the U.S. Senate. He stood up to the Biden administration. **He blocked the Left 's attempt to politicize our military. And he fought shoulder-to-shoulder with me and other conservatives to defend life, liberty, and law and order.**

Now, he's stepping up for the people of Alabama -- to serve as your next Governor. He will lead the fight against the Radical Left from the battleground - not the D.C. cocktail parties disconnected from reality.

And I'm proud to endorse him.

Tommy, well, you might know him as Coach, isn't just a name on the ballot. **He 's a proven conservative who has earned the trust of the people -- through action, not talk.**

He's not afraid to take heat. He doesn't fold under pressure. He delivers.

That's why Alabama needs him now more than ever. Because the Left hasn't given up on flipping your state -- and they'll stop at nothing to install a puppet who answers to D.C. insiders, not Alabama voters.

Let's stop them cold.

| [ **FIGHT THE LEFT** ](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=e7315b9f951f4865864496c543cca42e&_e=dyMjPBzwTUNthZOWykJpChYD2fN1FyTzbjQi_f3WLW1I76G8ZfeplvFxGUMPvSAnZXD6rUxR5d0h9FAp47iSpshxWTxG-5ZxH0EltweHXdKt_aY3ESzQ2JvWVnjQhEkNZHXqPAJoKCJzXeDVERp1aaWb4gKvn7ZhKeFyVLWJ1RF8rLRAATLaMX4diPw_A9-zsyN2YPWr68lj5JOjTd2bm9sQOjpkOTx87K7SUrqaTEvgH4MkyAwrAlVGhPFHZPPAOYqZXvb2z6dt1QoS1qd8eyMb4jGHsCIFBlTJX3jwtZ1kEy642rPtztCYscA8Tjs3fuK-2wu8pKSQV3UbyJsDr_141XmL9avo86wxmWsm1NlFUljCKXTqtAOIT-FWGaJVcYTNWdwtyTZodUDxOPt1hoABa3QH-fZFtsHZAhpdT4uohowlisCxWSYgHhardDqEzRCoLVWoI2iVvfK7g6iz0BBR2aHU_kHk9bIckooHY1LeZt3Q2yDSdCCs2_iOBt5u8tbTLP0CZ5o0rDYJaeVvnXKbvix6Mst1BUlN9F7ztRTae9vaAYVDZYkRdw52OSbE)
---

**[Pitch in today and help send Coach Tuberville to Montgomery to keep Alabama strong, free, and unapologetically conservative.

](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=e7315b9f951f4865864496c543cca42e&_e=dyMjPBzwTUNthZOWykJpChYD2fN1FyTzbjQi_f3WLW1I76G8ZfeplvFxGUMPvSAnZXD6rUxR5d0h9FAp47iSpshxWTxG-5ZxH0EltweHXdKt_aY3ESzQ2JvWVnjQhEkNZHXqPAJoKCJzXeDVERp1abBESv9ZO2ZqCHX9RM3oSflrimLlPhHg18gbreBIgiLaKJqTz1_gOvGPvqjn70RlDvnVkuAsOExqujquWjmrQ1X3WdNPUoumQHR18eCqnf1KfteRwdXh0odT3KY0NdjcrSulytTDZZzJtqpU8zb4XCmt5MnjrM1hjsc3YGS8ZLNAGIh-TNdgC5SgywMcNcPTgGv3LyVi5SVB5kZ5JcxspzWsFA3_eU081yKPULG2YT62IAoAsYPTPZc5irrBrNerv4HSlWFpROc2j8CBoi4MaMbmV8gpd_bwkDsfwmEBbGoEU5imjzWpsf6ZESv021gxLcuYtDTK0BOUNfO8thKEye29tw7-jNNB4q4x0TySnSbJjzG0RhiziayhkaGHEcVnxthozreeMPyoaBjqYBdWP-k%3D)** This race is about more than politics -- it's about protecting the values that make this great nation and Alabama great. **Faith, family, freedom.** Coach Tuberville's lived those values every step of the way.

Let's get him across the finish line.

[ **SUPPORT AMERICA FIRST PATRIOT - TOMMY TUBERVILLE** ](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=e7315b9f951f4865864496c543cca42e&_e=dyMjPBzwTUNthZOWykJpChYD2fN1FyTzbjQi_f3WLW1I76G8ZfeplvFxGUMPvSAnZXD6rUxR5d0h9FAp47iSpshxWTxG-5ZxH0EltweHXdKt_aY3ESzQ2JvWVnjQhEkNZHXqPAJoKCJzXeDVERp1aaWb4gKvn7ZhKeFyVLWJ1RF8rLRAATLaMX4diPw_A9-zAz9PicXFnCwDUBmGc2DMQ7KgrjyOSY8poip0qtvmxFbJNKdzMPeUBTWpUY0HPF5i8SEpSnJK7HmEqJc72kpOxoUeJ8v8QE3YtS95v0cBYZLX9eFAVmIfc3UcpsD-f23K1cbbpQ54mS5jA1h2hCd4hfEVxfY7r4hI543GEwm6lEGkbJpzydxc9ghZw3xJoJOLyCbaq2jEdDQMOcgU0usZf5uKN6Zk5Tu_WM8aWsXv4PFG7LQynPOBJ93dZU3bE0SJaw6COk5Orc79DHebpFht6ttNdX4jW3WNiHyqALyKNMPBFQv4D-4NRPxqbPjYGV0RQn-Zn-FFwf7dlpTn-dUAWDdB15EvJYSfjvMZ8_2Kybmq1fgU1OVNk6yvU23TfAar)

name: Douglas Carswell
subject: Mississippi’s Success – Let’s Keep Pushing for Bold Growth!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/msmiracle?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| _**If you're not in front of our Saturday email, you're behind.**_
---
| Dear Friend, **I recently posted about Mississippi’s remarkable growth (see below), and struck a chord.** Typically, I get 3-4 million impressions on X monthly, but when I focus more on Mississippi’s achievements, the numbers spike up.
---
|
---
| People across America are taking notice of the success of our state. **What is happening****is overturning old assumptions not just about the Magnolia state, but about the South more generally.**

Here’s a quick look at Mississippi’s economic growth over the past decade—a lot to celebrate!
---
|
---
_Whooooosh! Mississippi growth._
| **But we can’t stop here.** With bolder policies, Mississippi could become a magnet for young talent, reversing the trend of outmigration.

[**_That’s why MCPP just released _The Mississippi Miracle? Bold Reforms for Growth_._**](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=91b4cd2213&e=5703353baa)
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=406889bb19&e=5703353baa)
---
_DOWNLOAD BY CLICKING ON THE IMAGE ABOVE_
| This report highlights the free market reforms that have helped drive our state’s progress and outlines a roadmap for the future, including:

* **School Choice** to elevate education standards
* **Higher Education** Reform
* **Public Spending** Restraint
* **Red Tape** Reduction
* Public **Procurement Reform**
* **Welfare-to-Work** Initiatives

I’d love for you to take a moment to read it and share your thoughts. **Your support empowers MCPP’s small, highly productive team to punch way above our weight! **

With an immense sense of gratitude for living in Mississippi,
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=0830c554c3&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mcpp-c58f.mailchimpsites.com/manage/preferences?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=9e20229a9b) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&t=b&e=5703353baa&c=9e20229a9b).

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Emergency Census
body:
[https://secure.winred.com/marjorie-taylor-greene-s-people-over-politicians-c/mtg_don_wmb_er_ces-pe_rs_20250712?recurring=true&utm_term=lrm-active]

Friend, as it currently stands, illegal immigrants are massively
tipping the scales in favor of Democrats through the allocation of
congressional districts. That’s before any of them have even cast an
illegal ballot!

IF CONGRESSIONAL DISTRICT MAPS WERE DRAWN FAIRLY, WITHOUT COUNTING
ILLEGAL IMMIGRANTS, REPUBLICANS WOULD HAVE WON AT LEAST 15 MORE SEATS
IN THE HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES IN THE 2024 ELECTION.

Counting illegal immigrants the same as citizens disenfranchises and
dilutes the voting power of every American citizen, and it needs to
stop now.

THAT IS WHY, WORKING WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP DIRECTLY, I HAVE INTRODUCED
LEGISLATION THAT CALLS FOR AN EMERGENCY CENSUS OF ONLY AMERICAN
CITIZENS AND SUBSEQUENT REDRAWING OF ALL CONGRESSIONAL DISTRICTS.
[https://secure.winred.com/marjorie-taylor-greene-s-people-over-politicians-c/mtg_don_wmb_er_ces-pe_rs_20250712?recurring=true&utm_term=lrm-active]

IF YOU’RE READY TO TAKE ACTION, I’VE JUST OPENED UP MY CITIZEN
CO-SPONSORSHIP INITIATIVE AND I WOULD LOVE TO HAVE YOU AS ONE OF THE
FIRST REPUBLICANS ON MY TEAM
[https://secure.winred.com/marjorie-taylor-greene-s-people-over-politicians-c/mtg_don_wmb_er_ces-pe_rs_20250712?recurring=true&utm_term=lrm-active].

There’s no question that Democrats were thrilled when Biden opened
the borders and gave them a massive electoral advantage by flying them
into cities across the country... but now each illegal ICE deports is
one less pawn they have to rig the system, and they are furious!

_NO WONDER THEY ARE ALL TRYING TO BE PHOTOGRAPHED GETTING ARRESTED FOR
INTERFERING WITH ICE DEPORTATION OPERATIONS!_

Right now is the only time before the 2030 census we have to stop
these illegal immigrants from disenfranchising American citizens.

BECOME A CITIZEN CO-SPONSOR
[https://secure.winred.com/marjorie-taylor-greene-s-people-over-politicians-c/mtg_don_wmb_er_ces-pe_rs_20250712?recurring=true&utm_term=lrm-active]

Democrats know that without tens of millions of illegal immigrants
being counted in the census, and being included in congressional
redistricting, their chances at winning a majority in 2026 are slim to
none.

Patriot, I need the grassroots with me on this, and I’m counting on
you to join me
[https://secure.winred.com/marjorie-taylor-greene-s-people-over-politicians-c/mtg_don_wmb_er_ces-pe_rs_20250712?recurring=true&utm_term=lrm-active].

_For America,_

[https://secure.winred.com/marjorie-taylor-greene-s-people-over-politicians-c/mtg_don_wmb_er_ces-pe_rs_20250712?recurring=true&utm_term=lrm-active]

REP. MARJORIE TAYLOR GREENE

[https://secure.winred.com/marjorie-taylor-greene-s-people-over-politicians-c/mtg_don_wmb_er_ces-pe_rs_20250712?recurring=true&utm_term=lrm-active]

subject: The USPS belongs to all of us!

body:
Trump wants to privatize it, New Dems are fighting to protect it

| **Donald Trump is once again floating the idea of privatizing the U.S. Postal Service — putting at risk a public institution that millions of Americans rely on every single day.****** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111353215/556949914/830179060?refcode=NDCAF_20250712_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Yjg5M2I5Mi0yMDVmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H7h-7tHsEhLzxuDPLQ3rMKRKmiRzG7wH8ShgMzbjKvs=&emci=e5c3a5aa-7a5e-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=7b893b92-205f-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=48524772)** | [ADD YOUR NAME: DEFEND THE USPS »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111353216/556949915/830179060?refcode=NDCAF_20250712_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Yjg5M2I5Mi0yMDVmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H7h-7tHsEhLzxuDPLQ3rMKRKmiRzG7wH8ShgMzbjKvs=&emci=e5c3a5aa-7a5e-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=7b893b92-205f-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=48524772)
---
**The USPS is more than a mail carrier, it’s a vital lifeline for our democracy and our communities.**

It delivers prescription medications to seniors and veterans.
It ensures every American — _no matter how rural their address or how limited their mobility_ — has access to essential mail services and mail-in voting.

**And it does all this at the same cost to everyone, because it’s a public service rooted in _fairness_.**

That’s exactly why Trump and his allies want to dismantle it, because they don’t believe in a system that treats every American equally.

New Dems are fighting to protect the USPS from privatization because we believe that public services should serve the public, _not turn a profit for the privileged few._

**[If you agree that the USPS should stay in the hands of the people, add your name now and stand with us in this fight! »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111353217/556949916/830179060?refcode=NDCAF_20250712_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Yjg5M2I5Mi0yMDVmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H7h-7tHsEhLzxuDPLQ3rMKRKmiRzG7wH8ShgMzbjKvs=&emci=e5c3a5aa-7a5e-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=7b893b92-205f-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=48524772)**
[ADD YOUR NAME: DEFEND THE USPS »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111353218/556949917/830179060?refcode=NDCAF_20250712_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Yjg5M2I5Mi0yMDVmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H7h-7tHsEhLzxuDPLQ3rMKRKmiRzG7wH8ShgMzbjKvs=&emci=e5c3a5aa-7a5e-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=7b893b92-205f-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=48524772)

name: State Democrats HQ
subject: Your support in 2025 could make even more of an impact that it would in 2026
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
The outcomes of next year’s elections will be shaped by the work we’re doing right now.
#
Here’s the truth, Peter: **Your support in 2025 could make _even more_ of an impact than it would in 2026.**
Why? Because the outcomes of next year’s elections will be shaped by the work we’re doing right now. Recruiting. Organizing. Building momentum in the states + districts that will decide control of Congress next year.
**All of that takes time, energy, and grassroots support from people like you.**
If we wait ‘til 2026, we’re already behind. But if we act NOW, we can flip the Senate, take back the House, and save our democracy next year.

name: Jim Jordan
subject: This had to be a typo, but I triple checked
body:
. . . . . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .
. . . . . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1725236/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvMndxNFV5azNKaA/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA3MTI/LbmNsZXpCU3lQbQ/qP2hpZHM9bmNNbHJTR2tXY2xLcGdscw/gaHJhhg/s2l05a74136)

| [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Patriot,
---
Two out of the five special congressional elections have already taken place – and the numbers paint a chilling picture of what could come in the midterms if we don’t course-correct.
---
Cook Political Report shows Democrat voter turnout OUTPACING Republicans by a staggering _18 POINTS_.
---
The number-crunchers did the math: if the Left keeps outpacing us at that rate, they’ll have a **279-seat majority** in the House in the midterms. **_And no, that’s not a typo._**
---
Let me put that in perspective: Republicans only have a _219_ -seat majority – just _**_1 seat_**_ above the bare minimum.
---
_**_One_. That’s it.**_
---
_Yet here we are, talking about the possibility of Democrats holding**279 seats** and a **61-seat cushion** right before the next presidential election!_
---
And don’t kid yourself: those 61 seats aren’t going to be filled with “moderates.” That Democrat Party sailed off a cliff long ago.
---
**Those seats will be filled by The Squad and Zohran Mamdanis: Far-left radicals who will fight tooth and nail to sabotage the second half of the Trump-Vance presidency.**
---
And if we’re being completely honest: _They will move to impeach BOTH President Trump and Vice President Vance right before the 2028 presidential election._
---
**_So what’s their secret? How are they turning out so many voters? How are they beating us in turnout?_**
---
It’s their voter file. It’s not just complete, it’s constantly getting updated as the political climate constantly changes.
---
**That’s why I’m reaching out today to simply ask that you VERIFY your GOP voter profile to give me and President Trump the most accurate polling possible as we CLOSE THE GAP on the Democrats.**
---
[**Please complete the questionnaire before the deadline TONIGHT at 11:59 P.M. to verify your voter profile. >>**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
[VERIFY NOW ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

Thank you,
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Jim Jordan
---
[VERIFY NOW ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

---
Paid for by Team Jordan a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed between Jim Jordan for Congress, Buckeye Liberty Fund, and American Liberty Foundation PAC.

PO Box 909, Marysville, OH 43040
---
---

name: Adam Schwarze, former Navy SEAL
subject: Places you’ll never see on a map
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
I bet this wasn’t on your radar when you woke up this morning | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=1965827d980e4f81b36ce8be22aa01d2&_e=WmrN_b3Rzfw9UB4b0sx5Xmu3lQkuGLaFb87AFoHsbMbpuLGcq6E-DgBzvm7USafr7GNptvBgyJnBXk1vo5tIACr6pW1GGuKuT4CZ8hkc4atryXg7-gpG6YleOyGNkg3_2Srcy3RqUkskvtHtKYjs5IC5_3HAlYTI8f7S4qz-KQeSqFnlVhZEbLeRWLdKhq7FLooyZ2e1_mY12sovsVsjMsTzJoZ1ntKFtmxS3-OSeDuig4ZN99urZ9hCxr5YMDJlrS9DGjqyKX769zz-Le7lp6u85zdVH-ek0YNnu3aLatR9HFj_W0aElgB9WCrKYSjfTpIDFUl19_OHZhuUDeEvcelWHa7HZgmL067XRv8_yFB0Yd9Mip3qOWJYCSx6L_4aQWhyCj1s4T6OPeiKLe4k6mOH-7K3YPU9bvU4xp5HciTYP9yEKLb7WcNvEHTgcyz3kDQkAFdX4eNV3IHWyLRUZE3OmV5YVSIv_BPNYeNwlUqz48-xlrcVmxHXMKhpyN6juhJ2pbahnxQ3n4r4Xv9x-VQtq5TyN32gvf6r9Hw6Hs_mWt8YaHy45FQYCNnarA7Xdw-YmHGplhavMCk6-TOJaURKPk8rQILYxPVy8_GZYoBvZlPGJw7cis6Hh6V15LBDXn1bcDbNoIjFVrQLTOt4Q57ikggY924ruUSG_mdFSzkNnztJXZ2q7fHVAC_fdyTh9zIwS1wHEFa7r7vvzK7-8h3u_ep8O6D6cr6sS_2jWfmw9lA1-kGa9SHqjpmfKsCeLNCY39B6dSm-nCNa-UhDnUqWCeXmF9WfJ939QZZ8_GgydkR1cUSUnb7DjtuP5ysW)

---
Peter,

I’m Adam Schwarze—former Navy SEAL Officer, Marine Corps veteran, lifelong Minnesotan, and proud son of two working-class parents. I’ve deployed nine times to 70 countries to serve the country I love. I never expected to run for the U.S. Senate—but looking at what’s happening in our state and nation, I know I have to.

Minnesota is being led by two extreme voices: _**Governor Tim Walz and his lieutenant governor—my opponent—who is somehow even more radical than her boss.**_ While our cities burned in 2020, she led the charge against law enforcement while Walz hesitated. That’s not leadership. That’s chaos.

Meanwhile, crime has increased, small businesses have struggled, and our schools fail to teach the basics. The Minnesota I grew up in—where I learned to skate, hunt, and respect my neighbors—feels like it’s slipping away.

I joined the Marine Corps on my 18th birthday—October 2001— _**just weeks after 9/11.**_

_**I didn’t wait. I went.**_

And for the next 20+ years, I continued to serve. Not behind a desk or on cable news, but in the field—on missions that mattered, often in places you’ll never see on a map.

I don’t come from wealth or political pedigree. I come from hard work, long winters, and a deep desire to serve something bigger than myself. I earned degrees from Harvard, Johns Hopkins, and my MBA—not because I wanted to impress anyone, but because I wanted to serve better and lead smarter.

Now, I’m taking that same spirit to this campaign.
_**

[**HELP ME PROTECT THE AMERICA WE LOVE
CHIP IN $10 TODAY**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=1965827d980e4f81b36ce8be22aa01d2&_e=WmrN_b3Rzfw9UB4b0sx5Xmu3lQkuGLaFb87AFoHsbMbpuLGcq6E-DgBzvm7USafr7GNptvBgyJnBXk1vo5tIACr6pW1GGuKuT4CZ8hkc4atryXg7-gpG6YleOyGNkg3_2Srcy3RqUkskvtHtKYjs5IC5_3HAlYTI8f7S4qz-KQeSqFnlVhZEbLeRWLdKhq7FLooyZ2e1_mY12sovsVsjMsTzJoZ1ntKFtmxS3-OSeDuig4ZN99urZ9hCxr5YMDJlrS9DGjqyKX769zz-Le7lp6u85zdVH-ek0YNnu3aLatR9V1AukQO-qhQjHphGb9iVzQPHJwLPF7CQQrnYgeWa7x8PCx7qlnPRP3ktCzibbelVZEYSK4mMKEbDcJZNdz7SIPEAzOAEugffiEedihsw38Nj3CXDm_fFq5DMTJ81eANEgM_gyd7iuyuSrDSohXikq6gLzmeluqMLscOZc4T6yfuCOWgqZEA4xhQAUIMBBMNhx7p3ehT1-SyIgyAG5It4U-PFbivtzJx_nlBkr-G7pZp1YKFpP0P124sgIrk5jYNJPsZPZRvtXz-SAMEEGom_70D7r2OqOVJlfx-2x0nCg-Tn6B-9OcemGne3EmvPDewXEYe7_yDlEEhEdOKfQjHe3fa7v1yq41Eudq-KiDFmU2b2ik27o5N8vuc7pyE0cLaUVu6e8oZsN-RUlHfC2oeeQcFDwHShoOjqc-YLX9aM-spu1-GMMotDz3ChjVrjdG1yITOtj0z_Snrb9qHvii3uL-Sh4BvBr9wDJCSEvQJzi9icFjIgw9fSG2Z6B_jcd6O_ECZ-yurGHFLCR5jkzEJ0)
**_ **_Every dollar helps build a campaign ready to fight and win._**
_
_ _[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=1965827d980e4f81b36ce8be22aa01d2&_e=WmrN_b3Rzfw9UB4b0sx5Xmu3lQkuGLaFb87AFoHsbMbpuLGcq6E-DgBzvm7USafr7GNptvBgyJnBXk1vo5tIACr6pW1GGuKuT4CZ8hkc4atryXg7-gpG6YleOyGNkg3_2Srcy3RqUkskvtHtKYjs5IC5_3HAlYTI8f7S4qz-KQeSqFnlVhZEbLeRWLdKhq7FLooyZ2e1_mY12sovsVsjMsTzJoZ1ntKFtmxS3-OSeDuig4ZN99urZ9hCxr5YMDJlrS9DGjqyKX769zz-Le7lp6u85zdVH-ek0YNnu3aLatSwrPjpwKCDYdIyMyBVQM6h8lazipGf47ND8IwtWab4Zt_0DJ_Uxdpw9cLVXZ4gZMeocUKePv0mmKpQirzCZ3OcM67bCVMn_oZ5UIPmla_NGwHzlQnFkEz3iiynxIDnST_p6b248Foy4Ct-kYsALY8PyRCVHdzmLjoiijut_e9jGZA8UKVQerb6TtKRLKeIcZSYHGNnO4jjp6W8yRScd9Dd9Vn0Bb0Qrl4Ny1Po1c8exGCiO9HeA6_AeusfAsw3i4KpLvTpJCycllnox133yqSxLsbz2yBP4-djXQhaR3bT4qGIvoniGYoQa1FLPzKBGCYRJFvdyBCwsRYwHMUiD4mQsK-gXF7FzhMeEMOsavcrT6vuXJhfzBTuqgZafnXFcxRgPYTM5pT0mzYCObK_RGIDZUXQUN6asNdM0OABEclaP_Ss0HlRPc-iFlTZxcOMoBsHTVwpMBKOfUNFWTZOyz60rX1vRwy5jQ9Nyi3iy2qrbckDHylF1Cw6YsBjbwiOns60RHOs8Iw_1k-vGmNrp-cb)_

This won’t be easy. Minnesota hasn’t voted Republican in a presidential race since 1976, and, unfortunately, hasn’t had Republican representation in the Senate since 2009. **But I’ve always thrived in harsh environments and never backed down from a challenge worth fighting for.**

And truthfully, I’m not running because I dreamed of holding office. I’m running because every time I came home from deployment, things seemed worse—more divided, less free, and further removed from the Minnesota and America I was willing to risk my life for.

We need a new kind of leadership rooted in service, not self-interest.

**If you believe in what I’m fighting for,[even $5 goes a long way.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=1965827d980e4f81b36ce8be22aa01d2&_e=WmrN_b3Rzfw9UB4b0sx5Xmu3lQkuGLaFb87AFoHsbMbpuLGcq6E-DgBzvm7USafr7GNptvBgyJnBXk1vo5tIACr6pW1GGuKuT4CZ8hkc4atryXg7-gpG6YleOyGNkg3_2Srcy3RqUkskvtHtKYjs5IC5_3HAlYTI8f7S4qz-KQeSqFnlVhZEbLeRWLdKhq7FLooyZ2e1_mY12sovsVsjMsTzJoZ1ntKFtmxS3-OSeDuig4ZN99urZ9hCxr5YMDJlrS9DGjqyKX769zz-Le7lp6u85zdVH-ek0YNnu3aLatRKQTHleunL6MbSXEwwOJ7xjA78hAc-p6f0b4lUCw98Q7tsLqY1dwvEw0XNXTgX6812TMlVjtBMDOrgpmfBEUqc3A4POmSkzbErhbC2i9ZlCeH9l75_IDzC8h8kEaxN0yoazSxYXNj8mojEQgs5jEpYs2uAyrQwaHarrKZYjXTASzHszoTSMDjLXlBicbA4gvsK38yP3XNe3rd36L4QtLhRusTFng7U4h3UV_b--bXvFvWuKDhmOvieSXGKXxKXJwnBpiaHfyHtXSo3Suy8SnppE-OHD5J4VXFEMFOKNvvZMChsJWJ6NnPILQSRxAO98s2xlxdoErsKM_PItXKUJpXgGbBwBqbuYQxMFGsToRhF8J1xCGhj4UqHI5My_37r4Y_4AK25L9ZboufHNPGOVYMJADRpGeBFh-CTzEmXIKMQ9WRyolBWwd4iNARBpYumqWe5zNS3M4NYSN1YHkt3haZfjsT7xi_Bmzj29Pnf2IHqzayN7yHvtJBqUv66o61eg92ym5QuSTOtTRJHbOdP5m6A)**

If you’re not ready to donate today, that’s okay. I just want to earn your trust in the weeks and months ahead. But if you believe—like I do—that Minnesota and America deserve better, please chip in now.

Let’s take this fight to the Senate. And let’s do it together.

clean_body: I bet this wasn’t on your radar when you woke up this morning | Peter, I’m Adam Schwarze—former Navy SEAL Officer, Marine Corps veteran, lifelong Minnesotan, and proud son of two working-class parents. I’ve deployed nine times to 70 countries to serve the country I love. I never expected to run for the U.S. Senate—but looking at what’s happening in our state and nation, I know I have to. Minnesota is being led by two extreme voices: Governor Tim Walz and his lieutenant governor—my opponent—who is somehow even more radical than her boss. While our cities burned in 2020, she led the charge against law enforcement while Walz hesitated. That’s not leadership. That’s chaos. Meanwhile, crime has increased, small businesses have struggled, and our schools fail to teach the basics. The Minnesota I grew up in—where I learned to skate, hunt, and respect my neighbors—feels like it’s slipping away. I joined the Marine Corps on my 18th birthday—October 2001— just weeks after 9/11. I didn’t wait. I went. And for the next 20+ years, I continued to serve. Not behind a desk or on cable news, but in the field—on missions that mattered, often in places you’ll never see on a map. I don’t come from wealth or political pedigree. I come from hard work, long winters, and a deep desire to serve something bigger than myself. I earned degrees from Harvard, Johns Hopkins, and my MBA—not because I wanted to impress anyone, but because I wanted to serve better and lead smarter. Now, I’m taking that same spirit to this campaign. Every dollar helps build a campaign ready to fight and win. This won’t be easy. Minnesota hasn’t voted Republican in a presidential race since 1976, and, unfortunately, hasn’t had Republican representation in the Senate since 2009. But I’ve always thrived in harsh environments and never backed down from a challenge worth fighting for. And truthfully, I’m not running because I dreamed of holding office. I’m running because every time I came home from deployment, things seemed worse—more divided, less free, and further removed from the Minnesota and America I was willing to risk my life for. We need a new kind of leadership rooted in service, not self-interest. If you believe in what I’m fighting for, If you’re not ready to donate today, that’s okay. I just want to earn your trust in the weeks and months ahead. But if you believe—like I do—that Minnesota and America deserve better, please chip in now. Let’s take this fight to the Senate. And let’s do it together. You’ve done your part for this country. In liberty Adam Schwarze Retired Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota Former Navy SEAL officer Marine Corps Veteran Proud Minnesotan FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Shontel Brown
subject: To take from the hungry… and give it to the wealthy.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111357290/556961401/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_250711Hungry_N_SB_90DO_5_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTY1YjE1Yi0yNDVmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LJDnKmurKO4GfhGMmuQRVhbCZ4PnUUTGR6Bkp9afo4A=) When Trump’s Big Ugly Bill was signed into law, it marked a dark day for our country and a disgraceful moment for Congress.

Peter, I did everything in my power to fight back – and I’m not done fighting yet. I submitted an amendment that would have reversed the harmful cuts to SNAP, joined my colleagues from the Congressional Black Caucus to attempt to force an up/down vote on removing the cuts to Medicaid and SNAP, and spoke on the floor – calling for Republicans to reject this betrayal. I fought this bill every step of the way, and I will not back down now.

This bill will cause more harm than anything Congress has approved in recent history. This policy targets those who can least afford it: seniors on fixed incomes, veterans, and families already struggling to choose between gas and groceries. It turns the American Dream into a nightmare.

**With this bill, the GOP chose to reward the wealthy at the expense of hungry Americans.**

**Republicans must face the consequences. I will keep working to undo these cruel cuts and hold Republicans accountable for taking away basic food and healthcare benefits from Americans and increasing our national debt to benefit billionaires.** [**Join me in the fight to flip the House blue by donating $5 today. →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111357292/556961403/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_250711Hungry_N_SB_90DO_5_NG_N_L1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTY1YjE1Yi0yNDVmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LJDnKmurKO4GfhGMmuQRVhbCZ4PnUUTGR6Bkp9afo4A=)

In solidarity,

Shontel Brown | Shontel Brown is proud to be elected as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District. She has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. As she enters her second full term in Congress, she will use that experience to continue the fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and to preserve and protect our democracy for generations to come. Will you join her and be the change we need?

clean_body: = When Trump’s Big Ugly Bill was signed into law, it marked a dark day for our country and a disgraceful moment for Congress. Peter, I did everything in my power to fight back – and I’m not done fighting yet. I submitted an amendment that would have reversed the harmful cuts to SNAP, joined my colleagues from the Congressional Black Caucus to attempt to force an up/down vote on removing the cuts to Medicaid and SNAP, and spoke on the floor – calling for Republicans to reject this betrayal. I fought this bill every step of the way, and I will not back down now. This bill will cause more harm than anything Congress has approved in recent history. This policy targets those who can least afford it: seniors on fixed incomes, veterans, and families already struggling to choose between gas and groceries. It turns the American Dream into a nightmare. With this bill, the GOP chose to reward the wealthy at the expense of hungry Americans. Republicans must face the consequences. I will keep working to undo these cruel cuts and hold Republicans accountable for taking away basic food and healthcare benefits from Americans and increasing our national debt to benefit billionaires. = In solidarity, Shontel Brown | Shontel Brown is proud to be elected as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District. She has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. As she enters her second full term in Congress, she will use that experience to continue the fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and to preserve and protect our democracy for generations to come. Will you join her and be the change we need? ****=** ** ** ** ** ** ** Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress Shontel Brown for Congress 545 E Town Street Columbus, OH 43215 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . **

As Attorney General, Jason took on the powerful opioid manufacturers who devastated our communities. He didn’t blink. **He won _over $1.5 billion_ in settlements from Big Pharma.** That money is now rebuilding lives, funding treatment, prevention, and education across the Commonwealth.
And the results speak for themselves:

name: Amanda K. Edwards
subject: These political games must stop.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Amanda Edwards for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake_july25?refcode=0712_e [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake_july25?refcode=0712_e]
Friend,
In light of Governor Abbott’s call for a special session for an off cycle Redistricting, I was joined by local community leaders for a press conference to demand that Governor Abbott stop playing politics with people's lives.
The Governor’s proposal, revealed this week, redraws several key districts (including the 18th Congressional District), raising immediate concerns about representation, voter dilution, and the disenfranchisement of communities of color. Alongside these leaders, I shared how this redistricting plan could affect the political voice and power of Houstonians.
Check out what I had to say below on Fox 26:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bRDMRTyAmxE [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bRDMRTyAmxE]
The 18th Congressional District and its 800,000 people deserve to have a voice, an advocate, and a vote. To play politics with the people of the district again by gerrymandering this seat in an off-cycle redistricting special session is unacceptable. These political games must stop. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake_july25?refcode=0712_e&refcode2=faf3348e-285f-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c]
Thank you for standing with us in this fight.
Amanda K. Edwards
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake_july25?refcode=0712_e]
Amanda K. Edwards has the experience and innovative vision to move Houston forward. To learn more, visit our website. [**Can you pitch in to help us meet our mid-month fundraising goal?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111359962/556969614/-898016266?refcode=email_071225_RS-personal-message&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMGFkMWQ4OC0yODVmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R94KXbSSQUDinpK_v3gdhOkK38lwSCD0Jd6wCCptTFY=) | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111359967/556969620/-898016266?refcode=email_071225_RS-personal-message&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMGFkMWQ4OC0yODVmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R94KXbSSQUDinpK_v3gdhOkK38lwSCD0Jd6wCCptTFY=)
---
Derek, I don’t like to ask for money just as much as you probably don’t like reading these emails. That’s why I work closely with my team to make sure that I’m only asking for what we need, and when we need it. So here’s the deal:
Hitting this fundraising goal helps ensure our team has the resources to fight back against Donald Trump’s dangerous agenda— _and the last few months have made it clear that fighting back is more important than ever._
Since taking office, Donald Trump has tried to gut the Social Security Administration—slashing staff by thousands and closing field offices, which could lead to longer wait times and delayed benefits. Now, he’s doing the same thing at the VA, pushing plans that would put the care millions of my fellow veterans rely on at risk.
And House Republicans have gone along with Trump’s agenda. They’ve pushed through a bill that will cut funding for Medicaid and leave millions of Americans without healthcare, while giving handouts to the ultra-wealthy.
Derek, folks in Western PA and across the country are continuing to see rising costs, but instead of delivering solutions, Trump and Republicans are too busy working to line the pockets of their big money backers.
I promise you that I’ll continue fighting to deliver for the good people of Western PA. I’ll stand up to Donald Trump and Republicans when they hurt the American people. But I need your help to continue this work.
**[So Derek, can I count on you to pitch in a few bucks in advance of our deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111359973/556969626/-898016266?refcode=email_071225_RS-personal-message&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMGFkMWQ4OC0yODVmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R94KXbSSQUDinpK_v3gdhOkK38lwSCD0Jd6wCCptTFY=)**

clean_body: Hey Derek, I wanted to take a moment to reach out to you personally. = | | = Derek, I don’t like to ask for money just as much as you probably don’t like reading these emails. That’s why I work closely with my team to make sure that I’m only asking for what we need, and when we need it. So here’s the deal: Hitting this fundraising goal helps ensure our team has the resources to fight back against Donald Trump’s dangerous agenda— and the last few months have made it clear that fighting back is more important than ever. Since taking office, Donald Trump has tried to gut the Social Security Administration—slashing staff by thousands and closing field offices, which could lead to longer wait times and delayed benefits. Now, he’s doing the same thing at the VA, pushing plans that would put the care millions of my fellow veterans rely on at risk. And House Republicans have gone along with Trump’s agenda. They’ve pushed through a bill that will cut funding for Medicaid and leave millions of Americans without healthcare, while giving handouts to the ultra-wealthy. Derek, folks in Western PA and across the country are continuing to see rising costs, but instead of delivering solutions, Trump and Republicans are too busy working to line the pockets of their big money backers. I promise you that I’ll continue fighting to deliver for the good people of Western PA. I’ll stand up to Donald Trump and Republicans when they hurt the American people. name: Lindsey Graham
subject: I’ve seen this story before.
body:
1.2 MILLION dollars from 38,000 donors. Fellow American, I wish those numbers were positive, but in this case, they are NOT. We are gearing up for a big fight and need to be prepared. |
---
**1.2 MILLION dollars in 30 days from 38,000 donors.**

**Fellow American, I wish those numbers were positive, but in this case, they are NOT**.

That's how much -- and from how many far-left donors -- my radical liberal opponent raised in just **ONE MONTH.**

Fellow American, we've seen this story before.

In my last race, my Democrat opponent was a cash cow, raking in an unbelievable amount of money. Now, we are gearing up for a similar fight and need to be prepared.

The Hollywood elite, DC insiders, and the radical Left worked overtime to defeat me in 2020. They flooded South Carolina with millions from out-of-state liberal donors because they knew I would be a thorn in the side of the Left.

They knew I would always stand with President Trump and our America First agenda.

_But we won because I had you by my side, Fellow American._

name: Jon Ossoff for U.S. Senate
subject: Our plan to win and win big
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

Good morning! We’re writing to ask, directly, if you can make a $5 donation to Jon’s re-election campaign today.
To win, and win big, we’re building the most ambitious organizing and mobilization operation Georgia has ever seen.
If everyone reading this gave just $5 right now, we’d _easily_ have the resources to do it.
But the reality is that not everyone gives. That’s why your support — **particularly right now** — means so much.
[**So please: can you make a $5 contribution to Jon’s re-election campaign today?**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-july25.vLE_dc&refcode=em250712-1-f&t=1&akid=547%2E5691347%2EhJJvu8)
Team Ossoff
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-july25.vLE_dc&refcode=em250712-1-f&t=2&akid=547%2E5691347%2EhJJvu8)**

Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for supporting Jon Ossoff. Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click [here](https://act.electjon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=547%2E5691347%2EhJJvu8) if you'd like to unsubscribe.

If everyone reading this gave just $5 right now, we’d easily have the resources to do it. But the reality is that not everyone gives. That’s why your support — particularly right now — means so much. Team Ossoff Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/endlessurgency/p/the-greatest-divide-in-america-is?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Earlier this week on _Endless Urgency_ , I hosted John Della Volpe, the data mind behind the _Speaking with American Men_ project and longtime leader of the Harvard Youth Poll. We talked about the numbers: how Democrats lost 10-12 points with younger men in just four years. But more importantly, we unpacked _why_ --and what we can do about it.
**Key points we covered:**
* **The empathy gap:** Why many men feel Democrats lecture instead of listen--and how that drives them into the arms of the right.
* **Masculinity, shame, and identity:** How economic anxiety, cultural shame, and isolation are shaping male identity--and who's filling the vacuum.
* **Solutions that connect:** From mental health access to after-school programs, how to reforge connection, dignity, and community for young men.

This wasn't a "let's fix men" episode. It was a "let's listen" episode. What we found was striking: men want to protect and provide. They want to show up for their families, their communities--and they want leaders who get that. Who can talk with them, not at them. Who show up in their spaces and speak to their values without condescension or judgment.
John's research confirms it: when Democrats lead with policy _and_ presence--mental health care, affordable housing, after-school programs, space for real conversations--we rebuild trust. When we create forums for honest, vulnerable dialogue, we start winning hearts before we win votes.
This is essential listening for anyone who gives a damn about democracy--and about not ceding an entire gender to the worst people on the internet.
And if this resonated with you, if you're tired of yelling into the void and ready to be part of something that listens, organizes, and wins--**become a paid subscriber today**.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..KHsPUkI49xuZVds0eYDvrXs5c9-jn02Ep52yqW5tsYQ?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=167942705)
With urgency,
Mike

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4500ce0b-164f-407b-bd77-f02049b9e862?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

The flash floods in Texas this past week mark not only a national tragedy, but a dangerous sign of the intense maliciousness of nation's political divides, with immediate outcry from (mostly) the left trying to politicize the devastation and demonize victims even as the floods raged on.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..btXX5Uyu1Zur8Og7lJQeibhJizMWIIM7F1hk2OrMxuo?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=168088375)
The flood, which has reportedly taken the lives of over 100 individuals including children of **[Camp Mystic](https://substack.com/redirect/707c1502-c826-4351-bcaa-dbddb67534d8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , an all girls' summer camp, and hundreds of people still missing, should not be the trampoline off which vocal individuals or politicians jump.
However, since the event, there have been several attempts to use it either as evidence of Trump's failure, as a justified end for his (assumed) supporters, etc.
Sadie Perkins, a former Houston mayoral appointee, **[went online to rant about the girls of Camp Mystic](https://substack.com/redirect/065a7a9f-40b2-46a1-85e7-406d9ed7a6e6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[:](https://substack.com/redirect/065a7a9f-40b2-46a1-85e7-406d9ed7a6e6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"I know I'm going to get cancelled for this, but Camp Mystic is a white-only girls' Christian camp. They don't even have a token Asian. They don't have a token Black person. It's an all-white, white-only conservative Christian camp," Perkins said. "If you ain't white you ain't right, you ain't gettin' in, you ain't goin'. Period."
Then, pediatrician **[Dr. Christina B. Propst](https://substack.com/redirect/806cdd43-fb29-45ab-b21e-5a2e47f9a36b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , whose profession is, in all aspects, devoted to serving the lives and health of all children, went on Facebook and said about the floods, "May all visitors, children, non-MAGA voters and pets be safe and dry," while also saying she hoped those who perished "get what they voted for."
**A message from our sponsor (Piece continues below)**
* * *
**Together with Natural Health Response**
# [Liberals laughed at RFK Jr's COVID warning... until THIS happened](https://substack.com/redirect/6f8f6c15-1a65-4442-8e8c-d0884b809f1d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6f8f6c15-1a65-4442-8e8c-d0884b809f1d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Dear Reader,
When RFK Jr warned that COVID 19 originated from a lab leak in Wuhan, China... liberals laughed and called him a conspiracy theorist.
NOW the FBI, CIA and Department of Energy all agree that Covid-19 most likely originated from a Wuhan lab leak...
Once again Kennedy was proven right.
But **[RFK Jr.'s next WARNING](https://substack.com/redirect/6f8f6c15-1a65-4442-8e8c-d0884b809f1d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** could be far worse for millions of Americans.
Before the deep state's smear campaign really revs up--**[see it here for yourself.](https://substack.com/redirect/6f8f6c15-1a65-4442-8e8c-d0884b809f1d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/6f8f6c15-1a65-4442-8e8c-d0884b809f1d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**(Piece continued)**
Political officials also jumped at the chance to take to their keyboards and push their censure for Trump:
"Trump & Musk gutted the National Weather Service. The result was predictable: A bad forecast leading to the death of children in a horrific flood," California state Sen. Scott Wiener said.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3420546c-c16d-42f1-948e-78b19e7c3b05?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Sen. Chris Murphy, D-Conn.,**[bashed Trump's proposed federal cuts.](https://substack.com/redirect/3420546c-c16d-42f1-948e-78b19e7c3b05?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
However, it has been reported over and over again by liberal and conservative outlets alike that not only was the National Weather Service Office for that area of Texas staffed, **[but had over double the amount of staff as usual,](https://substack.com/redirect/19db52b2-47b9-417b-ae8c-89de7df50d97?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and handled the situation as they should have. Plus, Trump's NOAA cuts are not set to take effect until 2026, making these arguments not only heedless in tone, but factually untrue.
There were countless other well-known DC officials who voiced similar sentiments to the above - who did not even wait until the floods dissipated before using the most extreme horror for their own means (Though it is to be said other[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/74395f0b-5af6-4ec2-9a2a-dd2096f351a4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[notable liberal officials denounced this agenda proffering](https://substack.com/redirect/74395f0b-5af6-4ec2-9a2a-dd2096f351a4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for what it was - see below).
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/321d49ad-7bd1-42f0-953b-0b9a9477e197?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
While it is inescapable and important to ask questions about and create ideas on how to better handle any future natural occurrences, many of these comments, driven by blind hatred and lack of self-awareness, only worsened the already tender heart-ache of most Americans after the disaster occurred.
While the statements skew from inappropriate to downright disturbing, the sheer fact that, instead of rallying together as a nation in the living moments of tragedy, the people of this nation - including many of its leaders - leaned into blame-placing and further divide is a scary reality indeed. Events like this one are not moments for further hatred and division, but, at the _very least,_ collective mourning of lives-lost, rallying behind devastated families, and a rallied goal of working-together to make way for a better future.
We must take a moment and rally _together_ , period. Then, let the time for respectful discourse follow.

| Dear Friend, I was stunned — and frankly outraged — to learn that Governor Tim Walz is forcing Minnesota taxpayers to cover **$430,000 in legal fees** tied to his testimony before Congress. That’s nearly half a million dollars of your money not going to improve schools, support law enforcement, fix roads, or provide relief to hardworking taxpayers, but instead to shield a governor from answering tough questions in Washington.

This isn’t leadership. _It’s political damage control on the public’s dime._ In Congress, I’ve made it my mission to fight wasteful spending and restore accountability. I believe your hard-earned dollars deserve better than this kind of arrogance and mismanagement. If you’re fed up with politicians treating taxpayers like a blank check, I hope you’ll stand with me. [Chip in $10, $25, or any amount today to help me keep fighting for fiscal discipline, real transparency, and the conservative leadership Minnesota needs.](http://link.finstadforcongress.com/api/LinkHandler/getaction2?%3d) Gratefully,
Brad Finstad

Friend, tomorrow is a very special day for Delawareans. **It’s 🇺🇸 Delaware Day 🇺🇸** We celebrate Delaware not only because we were the first state to declare our independence _(although that’s pretty great, too)_ , but also because of the values our state has always held close to our hearts. We feel a responsibility to uphold and defend those values, especially at a time when our democracy is under constant attack. | | Hi Peter, it's Team Davis 👋 **Austin Davis works _tirelessly_ for the people of Pennsylvania.** He's a fierce advocate for the commonwealth, and he's been a leader we can rely on to accomplish substantive change that brings us all into a better future. If you need a reminder of some of his accomplishments for Pennsylvanians, let us name a few! | 🍎 Austin Davis has helped **increase investments in education** by more than $2 billion, providing K-12 students with opportunities to play, learn, and grow as individuals.
---
🚍 Austin Davis is **making PA infrastructure a top priority.** He takes public transportation seriously and is stepping up to garner support for increased funding for mass transit.
---
🏗️ Austin Davis has helped create **11,000 new jobs** since taking office by facilitating investments in small businesses, manufacturing, energy, and more. This will continue to grow Pennsylvania's economy for decades to come!
---

name: Democrats.org
subject: Help us stop billionaires from buying our elections -
body:
---
Derek, We’re about to ask you to **[donate directly to the DNC today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025?refcode=em_20250712_3947_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3952_22930333_EpXvOh&akid=3952%2E22930333%2EEpXvOh)** If you give us a moment of your time, we’ll explain why your support is so important right now. Here’s the situation: The Trump administration is currently trying to overturn decades of precedent and rewrite longstanding campaign finance laws for their own benefit, just as their grassroots support is drying up across the country. Their actions forced us, along with the DSCC and the DCCC, to take action in response to the Trump administration’s stunning refusal to defend federal law. We filed a motion asking the Supreme Court to allow us to defend the federal election law, which sets limits on coordinated party expenditures against the Republican Party’s challenge. That motion has now been granted. **To put it simply, Trump and his allies are blatantly attempting to let billionaires buy our elections. And we’re going to fight back with every tool at our disposal.** **[But we’ll be honest: Court battles like these are costly, and we rely on supporters like you to help make them possible. If work like this is worth a few dollars to you, we hope you’ll consider making a $3 contribution now to help fund it.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025?refcode=em_20250712_3947_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3952_22930333_EpXvOh&akid=3952%2E22930333%2EEpXvOh)**

clean_body: Derek, We’re about to ask you to If you give us a moment of your time, we’ll explain why your support is so important right now. Here’s the situation: The Trump administration is currently trying to overturn decades of precedent and rewrite longstanding campaign finance laws for their own benefit, just as their grassroots support is drying up across the country. Their actions forced us, along with the DSCC and the DCCC, to take action in response to the Trump administration’s stunning refusal to defend federal law. We filed a motion asking the Supreme Court to allow us to defend the federal election law, which sets limits on coordinated party expenditures against the Republican Party’s challenge. That motion has now been granted. To put it simply, Trump and his allies are blatantly attempting to let billionaires buy our elections. And we’re going to fight back with every tool at our disposal. name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: I’m fighting this deadly budget and demanding a government for the people rather than billionaires
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
This budget betrayal is our country’s largest-ever upward transfer of wealth, from poor and working people to billionaires. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWdSPxs93XJkHHrkLzra3WA7AO-nYsvDbv3u0j90WnqWhoYexOtGUuUBS62Zcq5HTxl_4H3duoBYjKSF3Z987ygixRXdYCrkyOl_d7ywvITcXTZaD9ObRLZGGGqj_xbvgM5B8CJjBJNsa2euoEhsEQaccqyfBNc6zjHTm10Lc5JN5Zyr5U_uhLf_Wgy5iM2B_x8lHGQ5LboXQontQFDDlObd0fJAkOyqmhj3C9XJ7bxZhHuXAk0oUCXoORqy7bvdtiHZdHlehU-54sRUeI3r2gQSbZgkTU8wmgWgyN5Zqb_fWo59ha2dgQ8GNylhM-JHSe/4i4/ZM_BBw01RM-02OgYqKvv1w/h0/h001.d_bUtUou9NDefBJgyE7iNZfB1336OW_WFSP99Xn8uA8)

Friend, I voted HELL NO on Trump and Republicans’ Big Budget Betrayal—**our country’s largest-ever upward transfer of wealth from poor and working people to billionaires.** I will continue to do everything in my power to put working people first and defend our communities from the GOP’s fascist assault on our rights. **We will not stand by or be silent as working families are sacrificed to make the rich richer. We won’t let billionaires, for-profit detention centers, or weapons corporations profit off of dehumanizing and hurting our neighbors.** We’re calling out Republicans’ budget for what it is: a deadly budget, with the largest cut to Medicaid and health care in our country’s history. **This will lead to the unnecessary deaths of over 50,000 people every year.** Republicans are also taking food out of the mouths of hungry kids, seniors, and people with disabilities by cutting hundreds of billions of dollars in nutrition assistance. **If Republicans really cared about waste, they’d start with the Pentagon** —which hasn’t passed an audit in seven years. Instead they’re sending hundreds of billions of our taxpayer dollars to the Pentagon and ICE, most of which will go to corporations profiting off our pain. Unlike most U.S. Congressmembers, I don’t take money from corporate PACs or AIPAC. **I’m demanding our government spend taxpayer dollars on what the people need** , including universal health care and monthly child assistance payments. [**If you agree that we need a real democracy, not an authoritarian regime governed by billionaires, watch this short video then donate today to power the struggle against Republicans’ policy violence. Together we’re more powerful than the corporations and billionaires trying to silence us.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvKbuk7KiDWT1KmjTNhAtHDpbCn510gsnVm3yNViJpIblAMMDqVRKvxZ7q4FPLPq24nkEthbtqP-XRnDONaJhFovO0caOTsseNZhoIfYDqELDC0ov9s6rQmIMB81dhYiIOBlXGUemGadAm9F6QXgryOSmzGCecnsAZYnz_yLmmOEvy_E10CQ5swAQKdVbrko0e-y3xY5KCzfaMp2kbVi_YHq8k3se_0LnGg4DKHk5xOuMv5BC9Ypqt2a4zRDGiBaBgp0baePQQkKI5_KB9bIFd2t-hKFU_520bPMez_fEZPWbqsMMls_dqhXyG5uWYctSeUXapmvEa-NhezpD_OAHDimUddGrjgcwdjwHV7uxOdzp9jSFDRNNA5ZbM_cWEkcYr2ZoF3deOzuqkHMXvNXYU_LKnWIUOE-NUqfzdwGV2st8KB7iOG0VLWhT62VrX0FQXnOzVPirhPe66y6DIgMzoeKYYniU_N1BQfSq6RaNpBaQ/4i4/ZM_BBw01RM-02OgYqKvv1w/h1/h001.iExivyX-ZdIVa6u26uv73C9CCmbNiR7gJeLXyySORq4) DONATE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvKbuk7KiDWT1KmjTNhAtHDpbCn510gsnVm3yNViJpIbgdEQ4uvYSkhTbkLIX3OH2oetApleM0JwgE4Oy7ALaFmAbpSnK-cIAPHvjDqL7yHu3AUTnmHKIE9oniD6JlYDZpuU-nzSAceeaPliyeTLKdClhFjq-IAk1sKUpyuQ3feo5gm1nwG7EGVrI-an2S3eW0fdyt_Ns514WWHjIHKfHr55-Laoc0p1InEV2Vj2L4g7FuBOO2nnqeeTJolUOIzyMHeJAYIDUMqpIh6IqalNVCo8idGBmUYvgAAIfOeKKgLI1cfGkPcHOhRYFy07-MNzc3lPfRDbICo_USo69UBNhIhlU1M1TERIVyQPHXKtcPdONqbmFT9vW8H1gR4V8QE9ugsLHGyYZyU2EuPhJwqHWt618WmGIzmDufHyz0JSq7axvVUPLmq0IjqV7eJEO4P3BYvhuOQQWRFPpyUD-PlH1sGwbK8k1Y29Fm4FgMplUyjCw/4i4/ZM_BBw01RM-02OgYqKvv1w/h3/h001.eJzSR6lG2Mkv-cF78eS1aCFKLOyryYD4asQsSPqyNw0)

All Democrats in Congress voted against this budget reconciliation bill, and all but 3 Republicans voted for it.
**Cuts to Medicaid will start January 2027—**** _after_****the 2026 mid-term elections.** All SNAP recipients will see a 15% reduction going into effect in October 2027 (and keep in mind: the average SNAP recipient already only gets $6 a day).
These health and nutrition cuts will affect tens of millions of Americans. In my state these cuts will block access to health care for 450,000 Michiganders and cut off 300,000 Michiganders from food assistance.
**Because these cuts won’t really start impacting people directly until after the mid-term elections, it’s up to us right now to let voters know what was in this disastrous budget package and how they’ll be affected.**
It’s important to note that grassroots efforts and our pushes within Congress did have an impact. **We successfully fought back against some harmful parts of this bill that were then excluded from the final version.**
But what Trump signed into law is 900 pages of cruelty that will hurt seniors, working families, our immigrant neighbors, and other vulnerable communities. **I will not stop telling the American people what is in this disastrous bill.** For example:
**The top 0.1% (the Elon Musks and Jeff Bezos of the world) stand to gain over $300,000 on average in 2027 alone.** That’s $847 a day. People who make over a million dollars a year will get about $100,000 per year or $264 per day. If you make $50,000 like a lot of teachers and frontline workers, you’re going to get 68 cents per day—but once people are cut off from necessary care, increasing out-of-pocket health and nutrition costs, even that 68 cents a day will vanish.
Even though the Pentagon hasn’t passed an audit for seven years in a row, **Republicans increased the Pentagon budget (what I call the war machine budget) by $150 billion**. At least half of this will go to for-profit weapons corporations.
At the same time, **Republicans increased ICE funding by $170 billion** , while ICE agents violently kidnap and disappear our neighbors. The budget for ICE is now a staggering $38 billion per year, making ICE the single largest federal law enforcement agency in our history, and larger than almost all the world’s militaries.
As a former immigration lawyer and the daughter of immigrants, I will keep fighting back against ICE’s illegal violations of human rights, including the right to due process. And I’ll keep demanding an end to war and genocide, instead making sure our government invests in what our communities need to survive and thrive.
[**Can you chip in today to fuel our progressive fight in Congress against the pro-death GOP agenda?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvKbuk7KiDWT1KmjTNhAtHDpbCn510gsnVm3yNViJpIblIDXATsDi9g5SSjN23nnUDMe98McL3xByy8ww5yV0Oj_Zr1UK3Sseal3s3EIdc0xjj7ATU31W6geDSShqgigagvB63VtStFscfFZ1HJQlWZdN30bdPY8Exnn6zDTG0Fs5WcsuduT5w9tBSRwLiGRDMQPu4ZeIihV7qjQTVIhwCOXuQLv84_cKeKZMjfc9t1ay4X0lQv4lLZdh0ZjsUdAeH6Xn-JNgJt6h-QlQkwg-9unKHGxylNUs3iXN52VRvwWl9YJ9BnjVPbBF9s4JydlkIA8SYgBjhk0B79b44gK8CWsokQkEtRChWLC1NajFFEEEwYgrwDzqBdkbUEHZqJ3aESqqIZzsXuz9jXT0e7wIEfL56d_qeDjAExl_BsTQGUzrbqNx3xbRIILycWwj0M3EV-jvyHOGzvaiGQP03UxwRg8DlUNoXxAuAa-8RJeB6Zqw/4i4/ZM_BBw01RM-02OgYqKvv1w/h4/h001.YKmnVBM6DdZrsKgo-UUcUdad_xKYkrqmv_EdSBe_7a8)
