clean_body: This budget betrayal is our country’s largest-ever upward transfer of wealth, from poor and working people to billionaires. | | | Friend, I voted HELL NO on Trump and Republicans’ Big Budget Betrayal—our country’s largest-ever upward transfer of wealth from poor and working people to billionaires. I will continue to do everything in my power to put working people first and defend our communities from the GOP’s fascist assault on our rights. We will not stand by or be silent as working families are sacrificed to make the rich richer. We won’t let billionaires, for-profit detention centers, or weapons corporations profit off of dehumanizing and hurting our neighbors. We’re calling out Republicans’ budget for what it is: a deadly budget, with the largest cut to Medicaid and health care in our country’s history. This will lead to the unnecessary deaths of over 50,000 people every year. Republicans are also taking food out of the mouths of hungry kids, seniors, and people with disabilities by cutting hundreds of billions of dollars in nutrition assistance. If Republicans really cared about waste, they’d start with the Pentagon —which hasn’t passed an audit in seven years. Instead they’re sending hundreds of billions of our taxpayer dollars to the Pentagon and ICE, most of which will go to corporations profiting off our pain. Unlike most U.S. Congressmembers, I don’t take money from corporate PACs or AIPAC. I’m demanding our government spend taxpayer dollars on what the people need , including universal health care and monthly child assistance payments. | All Democrats in Congress voted against this budget reconciliation bill, and all but 3 Republicans voted for it. Cuts to Medicaid will start January 2027— afterthe 2026 mid-term elections. All SNAP recipients will see a 15% reduction going into effect in October 2027 (and keep in mind: the average SNAP recipient already only gets $6 a day). These health and nutrition cuts will affect tens of millions of Americans. In my state these cuts will block access to health care for 450,000 Michiganders and cut off 300,000 Michiganders from food assistance. Because these cuts won’t really start impacting people directly until after the mid-term elections, it’s up to us right now to let voters know what was in this disastrous budget package and how they’ll be affected. It’s important to note that grassroots efforts and our pushes within Congress did have an impact. We successfully fought back against some harmful parts of this bill that were then excluded from the final version. But what Trump signed into law is 900 pages of cruelty that will hurt seniors, working families, our immigrant neighbors, and other vulnerable communities. I will not stop telling the American people what is in this disastrous bill. For example: The top 0.1% (the Elon Musks and Jeff Bezos of the world) stand to gain over $300,000 on average in 2027 alone. That’s $847 a day. People who make over a million dollars a year will get about $100,000 per year or $264 per day. If you make $50,000 like a lot of teachers and frontline workers, you’re going to get 68 cents per day—but once people are cut off from necessary care, increasing out-of-pocket health and nutrition costs, even that 68 cents a day will vanish. Even though the Pentagon hasn’t passed an audit for seven years in a row, Republicans increased the Pentagon budget (what I call the war machine budget) by $150 billion. At least half of this will go to for-profit weapons corporations. At the same time, Republicans increased ICE funding by $170 billion , while ICE agents violently kidnap and disappear our neighbors. The budget for ICE is now a staggering $38 billion per year, making ICE the single largest federal law enforcement agency in our history, and larger than almost all the world’s militaries. As a former immigration lawyer and the daughter of immigrants, I will keep fighting back against ICE’s illegal violations of human rights, including the right to due process. And I’ll keep demanding an end to war and genocide, instead making sure our government invests in what our communities need to survive and thrive. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Thank you so much. I promise to keep fighting alongside you for the dignity and rights of all people, including the right to health care. I will also keep pushing for a true democracy with politicians who actually represent their constituents, rather than their corporate and billionaire donors.** In solidarity, Rashida * Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . | | Dear Fellow American,

Fort Wagner, 1863. Bullets flying. Men falling.

And in the middle of it all, William Carney--an African American Union soldier and son of slaves--carries the flag.

When the color sergeant is shot down, Carney picks up the banner. He's hit once. Then again. Then again. Then again.
---
|
[](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/dPVQSJvAz0AYuqwUjgmgEbt0MoFxgHZULDS-kfO9xe9A4qGNeUw45foam-5hQS7ebVzhU5WOn-qGmdq26O7Ke4uPBLPiBZedJjorcCeJl0BbtmBQraCtaFRd_gPEpc-Zx6rVWVj0kVgxu0qtnXO5Eyaw6AppNdlC9o7wIRA554EKak0gLM6F0ObvbmMETBGAi6z-OGZcYHpB-4cjfKjO1gSGhGTH1DWV7Roq56YdeazqPwG3G7OtILEW1gIh4Fqy0ZIR4MH6_BG7-5eTnuDnRF4JIjXguT1n-jtws0TD6qfaSgIrGHkUEy0a0xYhL2wRbJvoPnMWQOfQLg0WeDLAbsxd7lBLzG6wumzd36kCofnFJ8VTZULV9RUjBTHNp18TGMrkJje8l2KRCBqRGKObE_La3MyZFQJ-JzLhn96afcrxysuIxArF_MV-SpjICMC_tySmvUX2f7-nTWWkjXm7l7QyAHDKRjy7B87NaRv5rykvIztvCUC-dHIWfmRwFg09EB9U1DcaoXvv2M3caxloeUkznSYGKwFvspBeFz1w3eeZYlzIUFF9_VojWcEMXH8_fi1pUDrmlUD36l8m-ntPuWZPzd1LA_Xu2LpgM9R8EakRxXbuIyPmM1wQ830c7FW1ho2uBidj7Ma_l6oVmJrX94vAUiEgurWcTXk7ebgsd7MgWgTG4Er0VBARrkrK8d8f6K3DBNWx5Fk-K88/S__GlTvCMDIsRy8Qa6Xq1lycK6fMLvWW/10)

| | Bleeding and barely able to stand, he reaches his company and says one thing:

**" Boys, the old flag never touched the ground."**

That's what the American flag means.

Sacrifice. Duty. Resolve. And the belief that this country is worth fighting for.

**[Our free eBook,_Flags of Our Fathers_ , tells stories like Carney’s.](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/RYRt-gK5KqJ8dJJx1GIiV7UsARTrqCdcxkTqdTS9hDZ0ZiJrzegDoa7roDUWy59d41bbtzfIyEIYFY0Gnoa8lq4675LTwKJTHHQ8IwcsYvNQUWg0ipoeAD94RLedgSV6uJWJNx5KLCaicsNN0eZRBFc9Nas0VpCJen5OWPtTMMdpGQXkqzX58_o294Qy7yWJ1CzLYDu5vEdBNpXxlsosiMAQIcTkDGBZqchHcwFb9hFfWhh4llxC6a-fydfGZb5B_baa0ZasYycElRgeQvNEHzuGYjM5-d77Tb2L8BnVkkbyD6htk1EIa_LNft2VDhAGUq2GmMOkMn1u9hp0py465rUj1zqdocUkG5whsnWQ8R_y7YvmugppVEBW9Vn4ltf0cQApn8c_95TQ83XYODWCPGbqPXacND9zOhjK-GxleehcAxJwyYH9NxUUN-GrF752cCSO7Ts94mkfhRq5V0a1GHyhzAc8Y_x4bHwYhO62Ep9yFV8Ng1Ep62kdimIRjoZxTnZmZ5eAs_qPnWnXfXSPXAgUPhB2v7kYDh_iOf39mOp_fkfvMyU2NkigMANLYyBJ_WLx493toe_hjoqR-1EBU3N813Jg67LG5-xxyvT7QGOiny83aYG_HUmCYYWmZsuWMduE0NhwTLVWdbJv8SK0UyB6JUb5L9XHCBfP8Fc2dLTAjqMjgX1Wl1Z830-IKh6-wIj5eWs2HExjwac/o801ZwbNcHCIsCptOpJKyx4bPROr92Na/10)**

It also uncovers the forgotten history of the flag's creation, design, and enduring power. It's a tribute to the ideals we must not let die.

Our team at Heritage fights every day to preserve the principles our flag represents--liberty, justice, and truth.

We hope you'll read this--and stand with us.

[**Download your free copy now.**](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/RNI6RcvbTndBl8bWFE4P5KN2G99FbCQeGcrIceAK24Y67lk_fRmVeX13Flly1i3ysr9mapO6k4OMPW-DYO8Gi56ELgTSidrCJVkIfFRK7JTbnpSbNGpk5_0MnYnsP-IN0aS7ypJCpeR0zcHIEi7eE9_SVrOQlFtgi7yjbCiOcIUiMBrbft0j2I9zX1g2iKeSIYVphm9i5DWQju83xobPciyAIWZVpqIvinx7p9BI2ue1KP7e8sfH5p4u0WZxd5-Gwxg4u40kUbou5G9gg6al5HhaNZLFvh8btgBB7xJqHUIGDQqcS2c6CMVWI5DZy7i6ZQ5WnfGcQH_7VQ--AXotbgWShRzn17-pYcHj0L91xH2_bv2TwOJDBkBae8kXisASO_Rcve90lnOZhLG7-taH0bfqIx--LYExw2p0BDApn5asxqcwCPFvqIRI9V0tjThsP_IEef6d1Gs_gQhDP3guwDlRXSwTUkjY7xSKuGmG01W4652O0VU9qdwP4k1-a7jSNOEQ3O2jrKm5AGlGsnrQ2gU28qCBBbFvKv8Y7arHdWlHWAF5RjT7Ia8D_sILABJfOFYSSCGmdndQ3KRNipA0N_RQi0C-H0LAvP-4q4BNkonZv5-Wwf760xh7LLcNoaO1p7iNbbEpumgUfLhCeo9EIPZIN2XBEX35axwgVNqAgtLqIHqkzPoTtvzDJlmQ4ROjCwGXJXyyrWrvD60/XWJr3qNm-l4NBBJtaXVjh8ieFTuHC6Bz/10)

name: Debra (Ritchie's Mom)
subject: Reaching out about my son.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
body:
I had no other option but to come to you personally

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111364547/556983121/-721819307?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20250712_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzcxNTFlZS0zMDVmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fiKqDkvFFPp951PfEPnCPcZQ4bYQQhE4vdHysqp2pMU=) Hi Peter, my name is Debra, and I’m Ritchie’s mom.

I wanted to personally reach out to share Ritchie’s story with you and talk about how proud I am of him. 💙 | **[SKIP THE STORY: RUSH $3 TO SUPPORT RITCHIE TORRES »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111364548/556983122/-721819307?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20250712_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzcxNTFlZS0zMDVmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fiKqDkvFFPp951PfEPnCPcZQ4bYQQhE4vdHysqp2pMU=)**
---
I raised Ritchie all by myself in Throggs Neck Houses – a public housing project in the Bronx – on jobs that barely paid the minimum wage (just over $4!).

His path to Congress wasn’t a traditional one. He doesn’t have a college degree, and he never relied on fancy donors or affluent connections to get him to where he is today.

Ritchie is no stranger to the struggle and poverty that so many in the South Bronx experience. It’s _these_ hardships that have guided Ritchie his entire life and inspired his career as a public servant.

**Peter, my son was able to connect with and captivate New York families because he understands their struggles — _we lived them ourselves._**

But Peter, the very things I celebrate about my son — _his advocacy for working families, his levelheaded, common-sense, and progressive approach to politics, and his commitment to upholding our democracy_ — are the same things that make many of his Republican colleagues upset.

**It’s because of support from people like you, Peter, that Ritchie has withstood Republican vitriol and paved his unique path to Congress. I am so proud of my son, and I hope you are too.**

But I’m not reaching out just to brag about my son, though I could do that all day — I’m reaching out because Ritchie has a fundraising deadline tonight, _and he could use the help of top supporters like you:_

[So if you can, I’m hoping you could make a donation of $3, or any amount you can afford, toward my son’s re-election campaign before his weekly fundraising deadline hits at midnight. clean_body: I had no other option but to come to you personally | = Hi Peter, my name is Debra, and I’m Ritchie’s mom. I wanted to personally reach out to share Ritchie’s story with you and talk about how proud I am of him. 💙 | = I raised Ritchie all by myself in Throggs Neck Houses – a public housing project in the Bronx – on jobs that barely paid the minimum wage (just over $4!). His path to Congress wasn’t a traditional one. He doesn’t have a college degree, and he never relied on fancy donors or affluent connections to get him to where he is today. Ritchie is no stranger to the struggle and poverty that so many in the South Bronx experience. It’s these hardships that have guided Ritchie his entire life and inspired his career as a public servant. Peter, my son was able to connect with and captivate New York families because he understands their struggles — we lived them ourselves. But Peter, the very things I celebrate about my son — his advocacy for working families, his levelheaded, common-sense, and progressive approach to politics, and his commitment to upholding our democracy — are the same things that make many of his Republican colleagues upset. It’s because of support from people like you, Peter, that Ritchie has withstood Republican vitriol and paved his unique path to Congress. I am so proud of my son, and I hope you are too. But I’m not reaching out just to brag about my son, though I could do that all day — I’m reaching out because Ritchie has a fundraising deadline tonight, and he could use the help of top supporters like you: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = If you made it this far, thank you for sticking around and letting me brag about my son. Peter — Since Thom Tillis dropped out, we’ve been waiting to see which MAGA loyalist throws their red hat into the ring. **And it’s looking like Lara Trump.** Recently, NBC News cited a source close to the Trump family saying that Lara Trump was _**"seriously considering"**_ a bid for North Carolina’s Senate seat. And Trump even said that she’s his _**"first choice"**_ as the GOP nominee. Lara Trump has absolutely **no clue** about what our state needs or how to help working families make ends meet. North Carolinians can spot fakes from a mile away, and Trump’s comments sent a clear message: **He will support whoever is most loyal to him — no matter how unqualified.** We deserve leaders who will prioritize our needs, not Trump’s. subject: it’s a numbers game
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111364672/556983392/144714547?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Bipartisan_250712_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTcxNTFlZS0zMDVmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JtmA-HixRSXdIYC3NC2qMjzaCeuk2wTUl8OmlABiL-Y=) Derek,

I’m proud to say that I’ve been involved in every bipartisan deal in the Senate in the past decade.

**But I can’t believe my Republican friends in the Senate STILL refuse to make their voice heard and stand up to the chaos, corruption, and reckless agenda from the Trump administration.**

From the early days of Elon Musk’s chainsaw to the federal government (which by the way, will end up _costing_ American taxpayers)...

To Pete Hegseth’s incompetence and gross mismanagement as Secretary of Defense...

To the on-again-off-again tariffs that are hurting American small business owners and raising costs for Virginians...

To this big, ugly bill and its cruel cuts to Medicaid and food assistance to pay for massive tax cuts for wealthy Americans...

**I keep asking: when will my colleagues across the aisle find their voice? When will enough be enough?**

Derek, it doesn’t have to be like this, but truthfully, it’s a numbers game. We can do a whole lot more to curtail this dangerous administration and actually get something good done for our country if we take back the Senate for Democrats. [_**That’s why I’m counting on your support. If you are equally fed up with Republicans in Congress, I need you to chip in to my reelection campaign today to hold my seat and flip the balance of power in clean_body: | | | = Derek, I’m proud to say that I’ve been involved in every bipartisan deal in the Senate in the past decade. But I can’t believe my Republican friends in the Senate STILL refuse to make their voice heard and stand up to the chaos, corruption, and reckless agenda from the Trump administration. From the early days of Elon Musk’s chainsaw to the federal government (which by the way, will end up costing American taxpayers)... To Pete Hegseth’s incompetence and gross mismanagement as Secretary of Defense... To the on-again-off-again tariffs that are hurting American small business owners and raising costs for Virginians... To this big, ugly bill and its cruel cuts to Medicaid and food assistance to pay for massive tax cuts for wealthy Americans... I keep asking: when will my colleagues across the aisle find their voice? When will enough be enough? Derek, it doesn’t have to be like this, but truthfully, it’s a numbers game. We can do a whole lot more to curtail this dangerous administration and actually get something good done for our country if we take back the Senate for Democrats. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately: = = = = = = Keep making your voices heard. name: Laura Loomer
subject: Mamdani’s 9/11 Insult Fuels My Mission – Join Me!
body:
Now, as he leads in polls by 10 points, my worst fears are coming true. Mamdani’s old social media posts mock the 2,753 lives lost on 9/11, showing zero respect for New Yorkers who still carry that pain. His silence on antisemitic attacks and support for “defund ICE” riots proves he’s a clear and present danger.
| If this is irrelevant to you, please click **[unsubscribe here](https://libersend.loomered.com/unsubscribe/wJCYyn7638HXOcoR8928MiNxO5nXTgGo6s7D8pT0763BW8929so/jNrcjifZkRuM7634SQt2EHxg/EKMzwHUF79DBZHzkOAsPCg)** to be removed.
* * *
---
| [****](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/APEJWNzf5OsyWLf6sBj4gw/EKMzwHUF79DBZHzkOAsPCg)
[****](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/APEJWNzf5OsyWLf6sBj4gw/EKMzwHUF79DBZHzkOAsPCg) Dear Patriot,

I've been **sounding the alarm** on X, calling out Zohran Mamdani's radical ties long before his recent primary election win.

In June, I warned that his campaign, backed by over **$7 million in state matching funds** , was a Trojan horse for communism and jihadist ideologies.

Now, as he leads in polls by 10 points, my worst fears are coming true. Mamdani's old social media posts mock the 2,753 lives lost on 9/11, showing zero respect for New Yorkers who still carry that pain. His silence on antisemitic attacks and support for "defund ICE" riots proves he's a **clear and present danger**.

[**Help me expose this risk to America.**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/APEJWNzf5OsyWLf6sBj4gw/EKMzwHUF79DBZHzkOAsPCg)

Let me take you back to a moment last week. I'm in my office, surrounded by stacks of research, when a tip comes in: Mamdani's campaign received praise from a group linked to Hamas. My blood boils.

I remember as an eight-year-old, watching the Twin Towers fall, and now this man dares to push policies that could invite chaos and Islamic terrorism back into our country.

My investigation exposed his founding role in Students for Justice in Palestine, a group tied to the Muslim Brotherhood, and his "Not On Our Dime! Act," which threatens to shut down Jewish charities.

But, this fight is costly and it is draining us. My team of researchers and I are running on fumes, and we're short on funds for travel expenses and staffing costs.

**[**We need $14,000 NOW**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/APEJWNzf5OsyWLf6sBj4gw/EKMzwHUF79DBZHzkOAsPCg)**[**to keep exposing Mamdani 's network**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/APEJWNzf5OsyWLf6sBj4gw/EKMzwHUF79DBZHzkOAsPCg), from his AOC endorsement to his Soros-funded backers.

**[**Can you give $35, $75, or $150 today?**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/APEJWNzf5OsyWLf6sBj4gw/EKMzwHUF79DBZHzkOAsPCg)**

Your donation isn't just money--it's a **stand against extremism** , ensuring I can keep America safe from Mamdani's vision of Sharia and communism.

**[**Act now**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/APEJWNzf5OsyWLf6sBj4gw/EKMzwHUF79DBZHzkOAsPCg)**. Together, we'll honor the memory of the victims of 9/11 by stopping Mamdani's jihadist takeover of NYC.

With Vigilance,
Laura Loomer

name: Christina Bohannan
subject: A quick warning I give my students:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRISTINA BOHANNAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
🏖️💛✨

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111365193/556984836/-975735282?refcode=em_logoheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTkzMjgzNC0zMTVmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V2_kn2rPbAW9q8Wz0vNtHGl6TNAvhglj1w8HsSj3IXk=)
Peter, every summer, before my students dive into their coursework, I give them a quick warning: _**Watch out for the summer slump.**_

When the sun is shining and the pool looks inviting, it’s easy to lose focus. It’s human nature, and we all want a little time to relax. But in school, just like on the campaign trail, those stretches of inattention can cost you.

I’m thinking about that now because our campaign started with incredible momentum. **But if we let that energy slip — even a little — it gives Mariannette Miller-Meeks and her political allies the sense that they can defeat us.**

Peter, Miller-Meeks just voted to strip healthcare from over 100,000 Iowans. This was a betrayal of rural America and a direct hit to the families who rely on access to care the most. Right now, she’s proudly making the rounds like this vote was some kind of win. The truth is, she and the Washington insiders backing her heard the backlash and saw the headlines. _But they’re banking on it all blowing over as summer wears on._

I'm not going to let that happen. I want to go to Washington to clean up this mess. **[But I can only do that if we keep pushing forward, even when it’s tempting to take our foot off the gas. Will you help us stay strong through the summer and make sure we don’t lose ground? Make a donation toward my campaign's mid-month goal>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111365195/556984838/-1612730695?refcode=em25_250712_MM1_fnd_gq_act___CB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250712_MM1_fnd_gq_act___CB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=99932834-315f-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTkzMjgzNC0zMTVmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V2_kn2rPbAW9q8Wz0vNtHGl6TNAvhglj1w8HsSj3IXk=)**

clean_body: 🏖️💛✨ | = Peter, every summer, before my students dive into their coursework, I give them a quick warning: Watch out for the summer slump. When the sun is shining and the pool looks inviting, it’s easy to lose focus. It’s human nature, and we all want a little time to relax. But in school, just like on the campaign trail, those stretches of inattention can cost you. I’m thinking about that now because our campaign started with incredible momentum. But if we let that energy slip — even a little — it gives Mariannette Miller-Meeks and her political allies the sense that they can defeat us. Peter, Miller-Meeks just voted to strip healthcare from over 100,000 Iowans. This was a betrayal of rural America and a direct hit to the families who rely on access to care the most. Right now, she’s proudly making the rounds like this vote was some kind of win. The truth is, she and the Washington insiders backing her heard the backlash and saw the headlines. But they’re banking on it all blowing over as summer wears on. I'm not going to let that happen. I want to go to Washington to clean up this mess. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: **“GOP Governors Mum as Congress Moves To Slash Medicaid Spending for Their States”**
_\- KFF Health News_
[CHIP IN TO FLIP RED STATES BLUE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111366370/556988427/841405539?refcode=em25_250712_gopgov_fndd_gq_act___ITTPAC_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250712_gopgov_fndd_gq_act___ITTPAC_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=67901a78-325f-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzNjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjc5MDFhNzgtMzI1Zi1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=vYfQpfXb79B1tYjABSKofWD80vLzS40DQIBqs6Nyf_s=)
* * *
Peter,

Have you seen Andy in the news? He’s making it very clear how angry he is at Republicans who voted for Trump’s Big, Ugly Bill, and how disappointed he is in Republican governors for not speaking out about the harm this bill will do to their states.

This bill will decimate rural healthcare, close rural hospitals, kick millions of Americans off of their health coverage, costs thousands and thousands of jobs, and blow an enormous hole in every state budget. It defies logic that the very leaders whose states will be devastated by these cuts are staying silent or standing in support of this bill.

Andy is a Democratic governor in a red state; he understands party politics as well as anyone. He also knows that he wasn’t elected by a party; he was elected by the people of Kentucky, and fighting for the people you serve is the only thing leaders should care about.

_**So why are Republican governors in red states so quiet about the devastating effects of Trump’s Big, Ugly Bill?**_

Every Republican governor in these rural states knows their state budget can’t cover the cost of these massive cuts. But they are too afraid of Trump and their own party to speak up.

Here's what we have to say about that: **For every GOP governor that chooses party loyalty over their own constituents, we have a Democratic candidate ready to run against you.**

[**In This Together PAC’s mission is to elect leaders who are focused on the well-being of their people. Will you chip in right now to support leaders who will fight for a better future and flip these red and purple states blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111366371/556988428/841405539?refcode=em25_250712_gopgov_fndd_gq_act___ITTPAC_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250712_gopgov_fndd_gq_act___ITTPAC_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=67901a78-325f-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzNjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjc5MDFhNzgtMzI1Zi1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=vYfQpfXb79B1tYjABSKofWD80vLzS40DQIBqs6Nyf_s=) clean_body: We have Democrats ready to run in critical states – we just need your support. “GOP Governors Mum as Congress Moves To Slash Medicaid Spending for Their States” \- KFF Health News = Peter, Have you seen Andy in the news? He’s making it very clear how angry he is at Republicans who voted for Trump’s Big, Ugly Bill, and how disappointed he is in Republican governors for not speaking out about the harm this bill will do to their states. This bill will decimate rural healthcare, close rural hospitals, kick millions of Americans off of their health coverage, costs thousands and thousands of jobs, and blow an enormous hole in every state budget. It defies logic that the very leaders whose states will be devastated by these cuts are staying silent or standing in support of this bill. Andy is a Democratic governor in a red state; he understands party politics as well as anyone. He also knows that he wasn’t elected by a party; he was elected by the people of Kentucky, and fighting for the people you serve is the only thing leaders should care about. So why are Republican governors in red states so quiet about the devastating effects of Trump’s Big, Ugly Bill? Every Republican governor in these rural states knows their state budget can’t cover the cost of these massive cuts. But they are too afraid of Trump and their own party to speak up. Here's what we have to say about that: For every GOP governor that chooses party loyalty over their own constituents, we have a Democratic candidate ready to run against you. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thanks, In This Together PAC | Andy and In This Together PAC are working to support leaders who will lead with compassion and decency, reject anger politics, and always do what's right. name: VoteVets.org
subject: You probably didn’t wake up this morning thinking you would make a donation to VoteVets
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
And we know you probably didn’t wake up this morning, get out of bed, and think to yourself: “I’m going to give $5 to VoteVets.”
#
We know you can’t donate to every email we send, Peter.
That would be a bit crazy.
And we know you probably didn’t wake up this morning, get out of bed, and think to yourself: “I’m going to give $5 to VoteVets.”
But, that’s what we’re asking you to do.
We’re asking you because Trump is on an absolute rampage through our democracy. He’s taken every opportunity he possibly can to consolidate power for himself and weaponize it against his adversaries — including us.
This is all coming to a head as we speak. Trump just passed his budget, the centerpiece of his administration, and gave Immigrations and Customs Enforcement a bigger budget than the United States Marine Corps.
He isn't just going after criminals. He's going after everyone — grandmas, grandpas, hard working and law abiding folks. Even Veterans, Military Families, and immigrants who fought by our side during the War on Terror are getting caught up in his dragnet. It's a travesty.
Somehow, it doesn't even stop there. Medicaid, food assistance, rent assistance — programs Veterans depend on have been cut to the bone. Veterans care through the VA has never been more at risk. It's already degraded to the point many Veterans question how they can even access a clinic, and it's set to get even worse with their plans to separate a full 30,000 VA staff from their jobs.
So, what can we do?
VoteVets is one of the only organizations capable of standing in the way of Trump. Matter of fact, we’re one of the only organizations actively working to stop his agenda. We’ve racked up some wins in court, and some electoral victories — but we have to do more.
And the only way we can is when our supporters choose to chip in to emails like this one. They’re one of the primary ways we cover the cost of our operations.
That’s why we’re writing you, and it’s why we’re humbly asking:
[**Please, make your first donation to VoteVets — $5 or anything you can — and keep us in this fight.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-july25.sScHXv&refcode=em250712-1-f&t=1&akid=34475%2E3013755%2E7oZqjb)

name: Sarah McBride
subject: trickle-down cruelty
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
#
Republicans passed Trump’s big ugly budget bill last week.
**I voted no.** Then, I wrote an op-ed for the _Delaware News Journal_ to shine a bright light on the devastating impact this legislation will have on our neighbors and to explain who it really serves.
I hope you’ll take a few minutes to read my op-ed and help me continue sounding the alarm. The more people learn about MAGA’s cruelty and deceit, the harder it’ll be for them to get away with it.
— Sarah
* * *
This is the agony the Republican budget hurls at Delaware
_Sarah McBride_
_July 3, 2025_
I’m writing from Washington, D.C., where just hours ago, Congressional Republicans passed a sweeping budget that will have devastating consequences for families across Delaware. The legislation — crafted behind closed doors and rushed through because of an arbitrary deadline set by President Donald Trump — slashes healthcare, food assistance and vital services, all to just partially finance $2 trillion in tax breaks to the wealthiest Americans.
The bill’s passage isn’t just disappointing — it’s dangerous for all of our neighbors.
**How does the Republican budget endanger Delaware?**
Here in Delaware, the impacts will be immediate and severe. According to the latest estimates, more than 54,000 Delawareans are expected to lose health care coverage. Roughly 37,000 of our neighbors — many of them children, seniors, and veterans — are at risk of losing some or all of their SNAP benefits. And at least one of our major hospitals serving rural communities faces the very real existential risk due to the bill’s deep Medicaid cuts.
That means longer travel times for emergency care, fewer doctors available for routine checkups, and rising costs for everyone — even those with private insurance.
This is not healthcare, it’s Trumpcare. And Trumpcare means that 17 million Americans lose their access to affordable healthcare. It means importing the worst parts of the private health care system into public programs like Medicaid and Medicare — layers of red tape, excessive paperwork and heightened administrative costs. This makes it even harder for Delawareans and American citizens to receive adequate care.
This is not a theoretical policy debate. These are real people’s lives. I’ve met with them: the single parent in Milford balancing two jobs to keep her kids covered, the retired teacher in Seaford relying on Medicaid to afford assisted living, the hospital administrators losing sleep over whether their facility can continue serving their communities.
This bill hands tax breaks to billionaires, and hands the bill to Medicaid and Medicare patients. It shifts costs onto hungry families, offloads responsibility onto state governments, and threatens the growth of future generations.
And it wasn’t just Democrats sounding the alarm over this bill.
Republican Sen. Thom Tillis of North Carolina voted no on the bill because it broke the promise that Trump made — a promise to not cut Medicaid. Sen. Lisa Murkowski of Alaska refused to support the legislation until GOP leadership offered her state special carve outs, a clear signal that she understands just how much harm this bill would do to rural hospitals and working families.
**We will keep fighting, Delaware.**
Over the past several months, working alongside Sen. Coons and Sen. Lisa Blunt Rochester, we visited small communities across our state, elevating the voices of Delawareans who would be impacted by this bill. We focused on the impact and not the partisan politics of it all. I spoke to my colleagues and took to the floor of the House of Representatives to share the stories of Medicaid recipients from our state. On the House floor, I said what so many of us are thinking: people will die because of this bill. And I meant it.
I stood arm in arm with my colleagues for over 24 hours to vote no when the bill first came to the House floor. And at several points, I offered an amendment to blunt the worst provisions of the bill that would create red tape so thick it amounts to a backdoor cut to Medicare.
Republicans blocked my amendment and the hundreds that my colleagues submitted.
But I didn’t stop fighting for my constituents. I joined hundreds of my colleagues in signing a discharge petition to bring the Protecting Medicaid and SNAP Act to the floor — legislation that would prevent these cuts from taking effect. And, on Wednesday this week, I joined dozens of my colleagues on the House floor to motion for an amendment that would block any cuts to Medicaid or SNAP. Each time, Republicans objected to the request.
My colleagues and I were ready for as many sleepless nights as necessary to try to stop this bill. In the end, almost all of my Republican colleagues caved to Trump, paving the way for passage.
Budgets are moral documents. I believe budgets should reflect our values: dignity, fairness, opportunity. Every child should have a doctor. Every senior should age with support. Every family should be able to count on support and care in their time of need. Every dollar we spend is a reflection of those values.
But this budget betrays those values. This budget tells Delawareans: You’re on your own. That if you’re a working parent struggling to get prenatal care, a retiree counting on Medicare, or a farmer an hour from the nearest specialist — you simply don’t matter as much as the wealthy donor or powerful lobbyist. It is trickle-down cruelty.
I reject that vision. Delawareans have always rejected that vision. Our job is to make life easier, not harder for the people we represent. Delaware families work hard. They play by the rules. They expect their elected leaders to do the same. That’s why I’ll continue working — alongside our senators, our governor, and our General Assembly — to protect Delaware from the damage in this budget and to offer better alternatives, rooted in stability, dignity, and opportunity for every person in our state.
* * *
**Thank you for reading!** Sarah is working every day to push back against Trump’s billionaire agenda, hold Republicans accountable for the harm they’re causing, and deliver real solutions to make life more affordable for working families. **None of that is possible without this grassroots team.** **[If you’re able, can you pitch in $5 to power Sarah’s fight and help take back the House majority next year?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250712-1?refcode=em20250712-2170&refcode2=2170_21716_7lh34p&akid=2170%2E21716%2E7lh34p)** **[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250712-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250712-2170&refcode2=2170_21716_7lh34p&akid=2170%2E21716%2E7lh34p)**
---
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20250712-1&t=1&refcode2=2170_21716_7lh34p&akid=2170%2E21716%2E7lh34p)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=2170%2E21716%2E7lh34p)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=3&akid=2170%2E21716%2E7lh34p)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2170%2E21716%2E7lh34p)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)
Paid for by McBride for Delaware

body:
You are invited to join me and Team Imer in Denver, CO for a special evening celebrating the Golden Age of America...
| | | | | [](https://ghwh6lbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013vvoNWPnqc-O6qZuDVI5vJgXQAppWbZ4GDBeV5j9nUrMtlncBR2Y4Of8I4V0W6VGNnB3CKeKX79EzZ3gGolK5Azqej9elu1P1vbjbzYHV7ie3XnQ1jFHXryl7OUCZ0MKzNS0OoPYcA5HLPizxlgXncXSMrrWrnUElTAnexoeQ7bQK1yrSda8Y-1tRXM8dn9iOzF9ffE60SBdDMhM6GkMUh1Zc9D5DfRuwzQUpYqfavM5oufwOlp0GDdbXV06xqFD&c=gFzk8RZFbpHsCN48ljs2-qyVv6Iskb0sX729jh__SvEGCxmTUmOTPA==&ch=obkqZeaskn_MesJZ8SH8ZWdQR_5qiYTLmTl7vFg13fQiiPmPQ5IUnA==)

| Friend, I would like to invite you to join me and Team Imer on Saturday, August 9th, in Denver, CO, for a special evening benefiting the critically important work Team Imer is doing in Colorado to preserve the America we all know and love.
During President Trump's second Inauguration back in January, I met Laurel and Weston Imer and was thrilled to hear of the work being done through the Team Imer PAC.
You know what the opposition has been doing in Colorado, which makes this effort all the more vital and urgent. We simply cannot write off Colorado when voters are waking up.
Joining all those who are helping Team Imer on August 9th, especially at this crucial time as we approach 2026, is a real pleasure for me.
I look so very forward to meeting you there, discussing the past, present and future, all while furthering the mission to help Colorado and America.
It can be difficult at times being a conservative and suffering the slings and arrows from hostile haters, as I well know, but this should be a grand occasion to discuss our victories and the work ahead.
Tickets can be purchased at the website below, and opportunities to join the host committee are still available.

clean_body: You are invited to join me and Team Imer in Denver, CO for a special evening celebrating the Golden Age of America... | | | | | == | Friend, I would like to invite you to join me and Team Imer on Saturday, August 9th, in Denver, CO, for a special evening benefiting the critically important work Team Imer is doing in Colorado to preserve the America we all know and love. During President Trump's second Inauguration back in January, I met Laurel and Weston Imer and was thrilled to hear of the work being done through the Team Imer PAC. You know what the opposition has been doing in Colorado, which makes this effort all the more vital and urgent. We simply cannot write off Colorado when voters are waking up. Joining all those who are helping Team Imer on August 9th, especially at this crucial time as we approach 2026, is a real pleasure for me. I look so very forward to meeting you there, discussing the past, present and future, all while furthering the mission to help Colorado and America. It can be difficult at times being a conservative and suffering the slings and arrows from hostile haters, as I well know, but this should be a grand occasion to discuss our victories and the work ahead. Tickets can be purchased at the website below, and opportunities to join the host committee are still available. | == | == | Our gracious hosts, Mr. and Mrs. Michael DiManna, Mr. Adam DeRito, Mrs. Charleen Carter, myself, and Team Imer are hopeful you will join us for this patriotic and fun filled evening. See you soon! My Best, | | == | Fmr. name: Ruben Gallego for Arizona
subject: If you’ve got a minute, could you personally endorse Ruben?
body:
He’s holding Trump accountable every day, spreading the word about the damage Trump’s doing, and blocking Trump’s VA nominees as long as his Administration plans on firing 80,000 critical VA staff.
#

Peter:
In a tough year, Ruben Gallego managed to win his campaign for U.S. Senate in Arizona, even as the state went to Donald Trump by 5.5%.
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/personal_endorse_em_july25/?source=em250712-1-160&akid=3916%2E734936%2E7m48yN)
Ruben ran a smart race. No doubt.
But he knows that he never would have had a chance if hundreds of thousands of people hadn’t chipped in and supported his campaign. **He is incredibly grateful, and he’ll never forget it.**
But now, we’re months into Trump’s second presidency. **Our institutions are under attack.** Trump’s trampling the Constitution, and he’s coming for Medicaid, Medicare, Social Security, and the VA.
In difficult times like these, we’re lucky to have leaders like Ruben in Washington. _He’s holding Trump accountable every day, spreading the word about the damage Trump’s doing, and playing a pivotal role in the campaign to take back the House and Senate._
We sent Ruben to the Senate to fight for us, and that’s exactly what he’s doing. **But as he takes this work on, it’s still important for him to know that he has a big team behind him.**
[**So, we’re asking if you could add your name to join the thousands of others on Team Gallego and personally endorse Ruben. It’s a small act, but it speaks volumes about the movement we are building.** [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/personal_endorse_em_july25/?source=em250712-1-160&akid=3916%2E734936%2E7m48yN) Thanks so much for your support. It means a lot to us, and to Ruben. Team Gallego

name: Dan Goldman
subject: Support our fight for transparency and accountability:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
|
#
---
Peter, As someone who has fought against corruption and abuse of power my entire career, I am alarmed by the increasing use of secret police tactics by ICE agents during unlawful immigration arrests. These are the tactics of fascist dictatorships, not democracies. This is why I am proud to introduce the _No Secret Police Act_ — a crucial step in ensuring transparency and accountability. It aims to prevent ICE agents from making arrests while disguised and unidentified, which undermines trust, sows fear in our communities, and creates opportunities for bad actors to terrorize Americans. **We must stand together against these secretive practices that threaten the fabric of our democracy.** The _No Secret Police Act_ promotes transparency by mandating that ICE agents wear uniforms and provide identification during enforcement operations, and prevents them from covering their faces while performing their duties. It also enhances accountability, as the legislation requires public reporting of arrests, ensuring that ICE’s actions align with legal standards. By eliminating the use of secret police tactics, we uphold trust between law enforcement and the communities they serve. I invite you to join me in this crucial fight for transparency and accountability. **[Please add your name to our petition supporting the _No Secret Police Act._ Together, we can make a difference and protect our democratic values.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111367840/556991935/-1347534169?refcode=AU_DSG_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250712_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmM2MzdhZS0zNTVmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B7fFXgRar1ZYiU21vby2gQM1E1UvM8MmkgYJUEnXB6Y=&emci=5e667a7f-995e-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=3fc637ae-355f-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=13556823)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111367842/556991936/-1347534169?refcode=AU_DSG_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250712_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmM2MzdhZS0zNTVmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B7fFXgRar1ZYiU21vby2gQM1E1UvM8MmkgYJUEnXB6Y=&emci=5e667a7f-995e-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=3fc637ae-355f-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=13556823)

In my life, I've been a combat pilot and an astronaut. I'm a father, a husband, a grandfather, and a senator. And now, I'm honored to be one of your DSCC Vice Chairs, working to win back a Democratic Senate majority.

**Through it all, I've learned the importance of asking for help when it's needed — _especially_ when faced with a difficult situation.**

**[So I'll be blunt with you:_Your country_ needs your help right now to flip the Senate blue >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/21844?amount=5&t=12&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250712-MarkKelly-KellyFlagVCRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250712-MarkKelly-KellyFlagVCRF-Pros-sl1&akid=20703%2E9716520%2EAZIlf2)**

| [DONATE $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/21844?amount=5&t=13&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250712-MarkKelly-KellyFlagVCRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250712-MarkKelly-KellyFlagVCRF-Pros-sl1&akid=20703%2E9716520%2EAZIlf2)
---

Falling short of that mission is _not an option_ if we want to stop Donald Trump's chaotic and illegal acts. **But Democrats are facing two serious challenges that could keep us out of the majority:**

1. National Republicans just spent over $500 million to take back the Senate, and now they're saying they'll spend at _least_ that much on just TWO of their top target races.

2. Trump now controls _all_ the power of the American presidency, and he's using it to attack and intimidate people into silence — making our job as Democrats even harder.

**We need an _immediate_ surge of resources to fight back and win.** But right now, we're falling short of our critical $50,000 fundraising goal. And at this crucial early stage in the fight, failure to launch would spell disaster.

**[So I'm humbly asking you: Will you chip in $5 today to help us flip the Senate? Your contribution before midnight would mean the world to me >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/21844?amount=5&t=14&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250712-MarkKelly-KellyFlagVCRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250712-MarkKelly-KellyFlagVCRF-Pros-sl1&akid=20703%2E9716520%2EAZIlf2)**

We need your help to fight for the Senate. If you've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

clean_body: | | | | | In my life, I've been a combat pilot and an astronaut. I'm a father, a husband, a grandfather, and a senator. And now, I'm honored to be one of your DSCC Vice Chairs, working to win back a Democratic Senate majority. Through it all, I've learned the importance of asking for help when it's needed — especially when faced with a difficult situation. | Falling short of that mission is not an option if we want to stop Donald Trump's chaotic and illegal acts. But Democrats are facing two serious challenges that could keep us out of the majority: 1. National Republicans just spent over $500 million to take back the Senate, and now they're saying they'll spend at least that much on just TWO of their top target races. 2. Trump now controls all the power of the American presidency, and he's using it to attack and intimidate people into silence — making our job as Democrats even harder. We need an immediate surge of resources to fight back and win. But right now, we're falling short of our critical $50,000 fundraising goal. And at this crucial early stage in the fight, failure to launch would spell disaster. We need your help to fight for the Senate. If you've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | Thank you so much for having my back, Mark Kelly Vice Chair, DSCC Former U.S. Navy combat pilot, engineer, and NASA astronaut Mark Kelly is a senator from Arizona and a Vice Chair of the DSCC. name: Yesli Vega | YES PAC
subject: Hold the Line for Virginia's Future
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY YES PAC AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE’S COMMITTEE
body:
YES PAC is standing in the gap. Will you stand with us?

| | | | | [|
---](https://yespacva.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=baf25b9c579d322c3812ab8d5&id=e6e18a4dd7&e=d3e8835a50)
|
---
| | | | |
# [YES PAC is standing in the gap. Will you stand with us?](https://yespacva.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=baf25b9c579d322c3812ab8d5&id=44bb4b8f77&e=d3e8835a50)
---
|
---
| [ _**Friend,**_](https://yespacva.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=baf25b9c579d322c3812ab8d5&id=05ff46cb19&e=d3e8835a50)

Virginia is slipping — not because we’ve lost the fight, but because too many have stopped fighting.

Too many incumbents are content just holding seats, leaving the door open for anti-**Virginia extremists to push their agenda unchecked**. With threats like radical leftist Abigail Spanberger eyeing the governor’s mansion, we cannot afford complacency or do-nothing campaigns warming seats while ideologues move in.

From taxpayer-funded universities pushing discriminatory “equity” policies to _**radical lawmakers proposing jail time for parents**_ who protect their children, the Far-Left is quietly laying the foundation for a future where the state, not families, decides what’s best for your kids.

The recent resignation of UVA’s president — following public outcry — exposed just how far our institutions have drifted. These “diversity” programs don’t uplift students. They divide them, indoctrinate them, and undermine the values parents work hard to instill.

And it gets worse.

**Radical liberal Elizabeth Guzman** , the Democrat Party’s darling, proposed legislation that would’ve allowed the government to **criminalize parents** who don’t “affirm” gender identity. Let that sink in: loving, attentive parents—treated like criminals for disagreeing with state-sponsored ideology.

This is not a drill.

**Virginia is just months away from descending into socialist, anti-family, anti-American authoritarianism.**

And it’s not going away.

I’ve seen firsthand that conservatives can win — when we stay focused and fight. That’s why I launched YES PAC: to stand between Virginia families and a political machine intent on erasing them.

We don’t need more empty press releases. We need **real action** — the kind I’ve taken as a county supervisor, and the kind YES PAC is taking statewide.
[
With our next public report due in a few weeks, we’re asking 500 grassroots conservatives to chip in **$10** , **$25,** or **$50** to show that Virginia will not fall quietly—and that we demand leaders who will fight.](https://yespacva.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=baf25b9c579d322c3812ab8d5&id=13a2bf39db&e=d3e8835a50)

👉[**[DONATE NOW]**](https://yespacva.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=baf25b9c579d322c3812ab8d5&id=67d94f5e94&e=d3e8835a50) — Every gift sends a message: We are wide awake, and we’re done playing defense.

YES PAC is standing in the gap.

**Will you stand with us?**

For freedom and family,
Yesli Vega
---

name: Morgan Stahr, United for Democracy
subject: We can’t afford layoffs at the National Weather Service
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United for Democracy
body:
| |
---
Peter, The Supreme Court ruled this week that Trump can fire as many federal workers as he wants—even as lower courts decide whether the firings are even legal. **The ruling isn’t just bad for democracy. It’s going to cost lives.** Take the National Weather Service, where Trump and Elon laid off around 600 staffers. One of those workers was the “warning coordination meteorologist” for the Austin/San Antonio office. **The position remained vacant as the death toll rose in this week’s Kerry County floods.** Hurricane season is starting soon, and Trump has already **fired 1,000 workers from the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration (NOAA)**. Trump has also cut **20% of staffing from FEMA** , the agency that helps communities recover from extreme weather emergencies. **Firing thousands of workers from federal agencies will dismantle our government, the services it provides to taxpaying Americans, and cost lives.** [**Tell Congress: Stop Trump’s dangerous firings and fully Staff FEMA, NOAA, and the National Weather Service now.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_EztsCvlxm22rXbUcIzRE-8j_k7WhqWjIUI_nUy6eURybLrLJl5SuFEwhkP4Xbf2gw2bDL-Gqe_AFvj5BSj2hcSOze93hNfSW95ewuMaBA9N5Nu0LZWkOOZXgquirLiLaSpyEJQR-wfwQREz7vYgm_3VdrbFvJgXBClJudEJJ3RG5LJD1G0wlsGXYd1zKB1_hfnh0Wvh0-qhhTBw2Ga98DhcSpXLFgMYnE-61g6L3umP0lX5lnCTxsXDKa_xFzrzdg7Z0YzsZXp3StgdcOdm9g8jtuvmUeE59rOjpanGxZHexGoNA-UYe2cAo7vURsB1Pf_wxXmnRmxheBKUZR0uFqK-GdzNJEuLKZej93caxDlXZjM2w3nTtjKaA6EYnrBir8UD3UZplDDBerxAEcN9Z-SZtzX1rIXiYn7nz82xzs29hCvPaz7PjHYL8QmCJhIz_wqgHTqzpQMKfzf2pqOQc2WQsGITuH3Se0Qeq26xW4LiEy8x9hJ4nfl9N8WoUjlPMEitPrSlQsU2ejVmZ9sKCJ/4i4/giDDJJpcQ-auMYAVx_kizQ/h0/h001.HDBDERuAhjRJ35DrvHL3h5WojWhtVzckDnzyp960C5g) [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_EztsCvlxm22rXbUcIzRE-8j_k7WhqWjIUI_nUy6eURybLrLJl5SuFEwhkP4Xbf2gw2bDL-Gqe_AFvj5BSj2hcSOze93hNfSW95ewuMaBA9N5Nu0LZWkOOZXgquirLiLaSpyEJQR-wfwQREz7vYgm_3VdrbFvJgXBClJudEJJ3RG5LJD1G0wlsGXYd1zKB1_hfnh0Wvh0-qhhTBw2Ga98DhcSpXLFgMYnE-61g6L3umP0lX5lnCTxsXDKa_xFzrzdg7Z0YzsZXp3StgdcOdm9gPNOGyp4PWsJ5r7r59PIXWfTiCHVEkdlGqYzritHM77rDmVmkjlMRS5vNOEX8qJS7WxvEKB5nwu6gtyMmY6tDhSVS11lI0wYQM5DFuY4K-KR7U-ZUMSJ5n4PzO5pC0jdpo-mAFYBvOfH4708mQEbhVSgDfCygGT2Fs98P5w2T2yuKHBwpjXUT1qzUPrntelWl6E-IrSvbu66cCAptfpJhPP9nBkpsW4a7XocCmfGlmIV6f8SwSjpNC0YmJGtRPF-e/4i4/giDDJJpcQ-auMYAVx_kizQ/h1/h001.oMC8jZX5ddKU2S-PI9xTziLOv9V6oFutcO6MIJyza9A) Federal agencies save lives. They administer the promise of our democracy to millions of Americans. **And the Supreme Court has just given Trump permission to tear the whole thing apart.** This is what right-wing extremists have bought and paid for. They don’t care that firing thousands of workers will cost thousands of lives. **They want a judiciary that will allow them to reshape our society and put their billionaire interests over everyone else.** It’s up to us to take back our democracy. Congress needs to hear loud and clear that we won’t stand for the deadly cooperation between the Supreme Court and the Trump administration. [**Tell your members of Congress to stand up to Trump and fully staff the agencies responsible for protecting Americans from deadly weather events now.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_EztsCvlxm22rXbUcIzRE-8j_k7WhqWjIUI_nUy6eURybLrLJl5SuFEwhkP4Xbf2gw2bDL-Gqe_AFvj5BSj2hcSOze93hNfSW95ewuMaBA9N5Nu0LZWkOOZXgquirLiLaSpyEJQR-wfwQREz7vYgm_3VdrbFvJgXBClJudEJJ3RG5LJD1G0wlsGXYd1zKB1_hfnh0Wvh0-qhhTBw2Ga98DhcSpXLFgMYnE-61g6L3umP0lX5lnCTxsXDKa_xFzrzdg7Z0YzsZXp3StgdcOdm9gBYxMLharb0-MtPlQJTzrNk4fciwxCXjaxdKqtOR5CwaU4JwUMRqnGK4Gl7ZNIHEI39aTMd6lnh1sIc6_54M2orYrNeFN6AksIWrveJ0geKqgiiZ2oH1KUMcE9F5va2EYfiES_xKvC8mfcPAlrIaZQ2F3Kw3N6JhClL9zaLh3GVR87wus0tFot24XFyO57dvfWf6-w6gAmpJJ5DA1UM0Q_klcV7TOKcYdS1jFUkvXnzErH-5FvZFewBUMRD8Tet05/4i4/giDDJJpcQ-auMYAVx_kizQ/h2/h001.3h5Ub35_zFsnBk-i1neuRTlclP50ZjCUX_3AsvToFt8) Thank you for fighting for federal agencies, Morgan Stahr

name: Nikki Budzinski
subject: This isn’t right
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki for Congress
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111368761/556995468/-550958566?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlY2FlMDg3Mi0zOTVmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L19z5-TaKvMH3h8vbiYVe83YwyEn0zIlTV85JFXz5Sk=)
These last few weeks have been deeply troubling.

On the eve of the Fourth of July, House Republicans betrayed millions of working families by voting to pass the so-called “Big Beautiful Bill” – ripping away lifelines including Medicaid and SNAP from those who need them most.

**Working families get nothing while billionaires receive tax breaks. It’s not right.**

The fight doesn’t end here. I’m committed to delivering results to Central and Southern Illinois, and I’m energized by the folks I meet across the district who are taking a stand against the MAGA agenda.

That’s why today, instead of asking you for a hard-earned donation, I’m only asking for your participation in our latest campaign survey. While I’m criss-crossing IL-13 meeting hundreds of concerned voters, it’s impossible for me to reach everyone.

**[Your responses today will help inform our campaign strategy in this race to keep IL-13 blue and push back against the wave of extremism that’s touching every one of us. Can I count on you to take the survey today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111368763/556995479/-2115267354?refcode=em-7.12.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlY2FlMDg3Mi0zOTVmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L19z5-TaKvMH3h8vbiYVe83YwyEn0zIlTV85JFXz5Sk=&emci=ddae0872-395f-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=ecae0872-395f-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=13891387)**

name: Katie Porter
subject: I feel the same call to service
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39887%2E3422442%2EqgxZpK)
Dear Peter,
When I ran for Congress as a first time candidate in 2018, I had never been in elected office before. But I saw how Donald Trump was hurting families, and I couldn’t sit on the sidelines while he engaged in corruption, destabilized our economy, and threatened our fundamental freedoms.
**I was elected in a historic Blue Wave—including a record number of women—and I delivered on my promise of accountability starting in my very first year in Congress.**
Now, with Trump in the White House once again, I’m running for governor to defend Californians against his harmful policies.
On all of the issues that matter to Californians, Trump is moving us in the exact wrong direction. His tariffs are making everything more expensive, including the materials we need to build more housing and bring those costs down. His attacks on our federal workforce will hamper our disaster preparedness and response. His chaotic and cruel immigration policies, including his disrespect for due process, make all of us less safe.
**State governments will continue to be on the front lines of pushing back against Trump’s agenda. As governor, I’m going to bring my proven track record of oversight to hold the Trump administration accountable.**
**[Will you support my campaign with a $5 donation today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250712_1_ak?refcode=em20250712-39887&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39887_3422442_qgxZpK&akid=39887%2E3422442%2EqgxZpK)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250712_1_ak?refcode=em20250712-39887&refcode2=39887_3422442_qgxZpK&akid=39887%2E3422442%2EqgxZpK)
—Katie

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250712-39887&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39887_3422442_qgxZpK&akid=39887%2E3422442%2EqgxZpK)**

name: Team Fight Like Hell PAC
subject: Their agenda is clear.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC
body:
Pitch in before Tuesday’s mid-month deadline to help us fight back and build grassroots power. |
#
---
Team, Days ago, Republicans in Congress voted to slash Medicaid and Medicare by _over a trillion dollars_ — a direct attack on seniors, people with disabilities, and millions of working families. Their agenda is clear. They’re gutting federal agencies, slashing climate research, rolling back voting rights, and blocking clean energy jobs that help working families, all while rigging the system for the wealthy and leaving everyone else behind. Democrats couldn’t be more different. They’re fighting for affordable health care, reproductive freedom, clean energy jobs, and an economy that works for everyone. But we need to win majorities in Congress to make it happen. With Michigan set to play a deciding role in who controls the House and Senate majorities in Congress next year, it’s even more important we hit our goals and build the resources we need to win. clean_body: Pitch in before Tuesday’s mid-month deadline to help us fight back and build grassroots power. | Team, Days ago, Republicans in Congress voted to slash Medicaid and Medicare by over a trillion dollars — a direct attack on seniors, people with disabilities, and millions of working families. Their agenda is clear. They’re gutting federal agencies, slashing climate research, rolling back voting rights, and blocking clean energy jobs that help working families, all while rigging the system for the wealthy and leaving everyone else behind. Democrats couldn’t be more different. They’re fighting for affordable health care, reproductive freedom, clean energy jobs, and an economy that works for everyone. But we need to win majorities in Congress to make it happen. With Michigan set to play a deciding role in who controls the House and Senate majorities in Congress next year, it’s even more important we hit our goals and build the resources we need to win. name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: Trump just got the green light for mass federal layoffs
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250712-1426-foote&t=1001&akid=1426%2E342411%2EO8GeoI ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

The Supreme Court has lifted a lower court’s block on Trump’s executive
order calling for sweeping federal workforce reductions — all under the
guise of “efficiency.”

Now, hundreds of thousands of federal employees — working in crucial
agencies — could be laid off without a single vote in Congress.^1

Let’s be clear: This isn’t about efficiency. It’s about control.

By dismantling these agencies and firing employees, Trump is attempting an
unjust power grab to push his own destructive agenda — one that benefits
the 1%, and undermines the checks and balances of our democracy.

If he succeeds in gutting federal agencies and silencing workers, it will
set a dangerous precedent for unchecked executive power.

But that’s where we come in. The Squad has never backed down from a fight
for democracy — and we won’t start now. But we can’t do it alone.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250712-movement.Cfk4J1&refcode=em20250712-1426&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1426%2E342411%2EO8GeoI ]Will you chip in $3 today to the Squad Victory Fund to
help us fight back? If enough of us show up, we can stand up to this
autocratic takeover.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250712-movement.Cfk4J1&refcode=em20250712-1426&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1426%2E342411%2EO8GeoI ]Contribute ››

In Solidarity,

Squad Victory Fund

1 - [ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19783?t=1022&akid=1426%2E342411%2EO8GeoI ]NPR

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1426%2E342411%2EO8GeoI

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Politivist PAC, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

Our victory would send shockwaves across the country and signal that Democrats can flip control of Congress in 2026. | Thanks in advance, Team Spanberger * | | Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. Box 3121 Glen Allen, VA 23058 United States | = =

name: Schiff HQ
subject: We don’t say this often, but… Elon’s right.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=8759%2E5257348%2EAaIvV-)
Derek,
Adam Schiff and Elon Musk don’t agree on much.
But even Elon can’t stomach what the Republican Party just did.
Here’s what he posted on X: “Every member of Congress who campaigned on reducing government spending and then immediately voted for the biggest debt increase in history should hang their head in shame!”
We’re not in the habit of quoting Elon, but we’ll make an exception just this once.
Because he’s right about one thing: **The GOP just exploded our deficits and debt with Trump’s “Big, Beautiful Bill.”**
They cut food assistance and Medicaid. They handed even more tax breaks to the ultra-wealthy. And they still managed to increase the national debt by $3.3 trillion, all while pretending to be the party of “fiscal responsibility.”
**[If that makes your blood boil, you’re not alone. The best way to fight back against this hypocrisy is by chipping in to help Adam flip the House and hold these Republicans accountable.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=q32025_abs_em.w4l6oI&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250712_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=8759%2E5257348%2EAaIvV-)**

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Emergency Census
body:
We need it now
| [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e11928797/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvRzhWa3NnZHhySg/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA3MTI/LbmNsN3laUzZZQg/qP2hpZHM9bmN6MUJ0V202STV5dlBscw/gaHKL8A/ser4145b8a4)
| | | [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Patriot, as it currently stands, illegal immigrants are massively tipping the scales in favor of Democrats through the allocation of congressional districts. That’s before any of them have even cast an illegal ballot!
**If congressional district maps were drawn fairly, without counting illegal immigrants, Republicans would have won at least 15 more seats in the House Of Representatives in the 2024 election.**
Counting illegal immigrants the same as citizens disenfranchises and dilutes the voting power of every American citizen, and it needs to stop now.
**[That is why, working with President Trump directly, I have introduced legislation that calls for an emergency census of ONLY American citizens and subsequent redrawing of all congressional districts.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)**
**_[If you’re ready to take action, I’ve just opened up my citizen co-sponsorship initiative and I would love to have you as one of the first Republicans on my team](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)_.**
There’s no question that Democrats were thrilled when Biden opened the borders and gave them a massive electoral advantage by flying them into cities across the country... but now each illegal ICE deports is one less pawn they have to rig the system, and they are furious!
**_No wonder they are all trying to be photographed getting arrested for interfering with ICE deportation operations!_**
Right now is the only time before the 2030 census we have to stop these illegal immigrants from disenfranchising American citizens.
[BECOME A CITIZEN CO-SPONSOR](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
Democrats know that without tens of millions of illegal immigrants being counted in the census, and being included in congressional redistricting, their chances at winning a majority in 2026 are slim to none.
[Patriot, I need the grassroots with me on this, and I’m counting on you to join me](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)**.**
_For America,_
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
**Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene**
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

clean_body: We need it now | | | | Patriot, as it currently stands, illegal immigrants are massively tipping the scales in favor of Democrats through the allocation of congressional districts. That’s before any of them have even cast an illegal ballot! If congressional district maps were drawn fairly, without counting illegal immigrants, Republicans would have won at least 15 more seats in the House Of Representatives in the 2024 election. Counting illegal immigrants the same as citizens disenfranchises and dilutes the voting power of every American citizen, and it needs to stop now. . There’s no question that Democrats were thrilled when Biden opened the borders and gave them a massive electoral advantage by flying them into cities across the country... but now each illegal ICE deports is one less pawn they have to rig the system, and they are furious! No wonder they are all trying to be photographed getting arrested for interfering with ICE deportation operations! Right now is the only time before the 2030 census we have to stop these illegal immigrants from disenfranchising American citizens. Democrats know that without tens of millions of illegal immigrants being counted in the census, and being included in congressional redistricting, their chances at winning a majority in 2026 are slim to none. . For America, Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene

Trump isn't just sending troops into U.S. cities. He's also trying to rig the next election.
Trump and MAGA Republicans are going all in — not just with military force, but with an all-out assault on voting rights .
They’re pushing to:
❌ Restrict early voting
📪 Eliminate vote-by-mail in key battlegrounds
🧹 Purge voter rolls
🚫 Block young voters and people of color from casting ballots
All while deploying Marines to Los Angeles, threatening to arrest a sitting governor, and having a U.S. Senator dragged out of a press conference for speaking out.
This is the playbook of authoritarians — and it’s happening in America, right now.
That’s why we’re polling top Democrats in your area: How concerned are you about GOP efforts to restrict voting access heading into 2026?

name: Rob Bonta
subject: NEW: ICE agents in LA blocked from violating Angelenos’ civil rights:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
These aggressive, militaristic tactics are not about safety or justice — they’re about intimidation.
# [](https://act.robbonta.com/go/3?refcode=em250712&t=1&akid=1872%2E1088799%2E4-N1WH)
A federal judge has granted a temporary restraining order blocking U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement and Customs and Border Protection from conducting illegal and unconstitutional stops of LA residents during immigration sweeps.
**This is an important step forward in the lawsuit filed by civil and immigrants rights groups, led by the ACLU of Southern California, against ICE and CBP.****A lawsuit I was proud to support and will continue to do so.**
**[If you’re ready to keep up the fight against the Trump administration’s cruel and unlawful attacks on our immigrant communities, please sign on today →](https://act.robbonta.com/survey/em-250712-pet_rs/?t=2&akid=1872%2E1088799%2E4-N1WH)**
When federal immigration agents are used as tools to sow fear and division — wearing masks and driving unmarked vehicles, refusing to identify themselves, and stopping residents without a shred of evidence of wrongdoing — trust in law enforcement is diminished, public safety is put at risk, and people’s daily lives are disrupted.
The people of Los Angeles can’t be expected to live like this — their civil rights under attack, many afraid to even leave their homes. These tactics are cruel, and they’re a flagrant violation of the Constitution.
Yesterday a court agreed, and ordered agents to stop conducting their unlawful stops in Los Angeles — but the fight isn’t over.
**[Add your name today if you agree we must hold Donald Trump, Kristi Noem, and this entire administration accountable to the law.](https://act.robbonta.com/survey/em-250712-pet_rs/?t=3&akid=1872%2E1088799%2E4-N1WH)**
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.robbonta.com/survey/em-250712-pet_rs/?t=4&akid=1872%2E1088799%2E4-N1WH)**
As Attorney General, I’ll never stop protecting California’s communities and defending your rights.
In solidarity,
Rob

| Peter,

This is one of the most competitive districts in the country – and summer is known for being slow for fundraising. We need you with us to help keep the momentum going.

Carol Obando-Derstine is running a people-powered campaign focused on what matters most to Pennsylvanians: **lowering costs, protecting hard-earned benefits, and making the American Dream a reality for families across the district.**

But her opponent, Republican Ryan Mackenzie, is bankrolled by Washington Republicans and corporate PACs. And after casting the deciding vote for Donald Trump’s cruel budget, he knows he’s vulnerable.

**That’s why Republicans are already preparing to spend millions to drown us out.**

We need to show our strength right now. Keeping our fundraising strong during the summer sends a clear message: **Carol can – and will – flip PA-07 and help Democrats take back the House majority.**

clean_body: This is one of the most competitive districts in the country – and summer is known for being slow for fundraising. We need you with us to help keep the momentum going. | = | Peter, This is one of the most competitive districts in the country – and summer is known for being slow for fundraising. We need you with us to help keep the momentum going. Carol Obando-Derstine is running a people-powered campaign focused on what matters most to Pennsylvanians: lowering costs, protecting hard-earned benefits, and making the American Dream a reality for families across the district. But her opponent, Republican Ryan Mackenzie, is bankrolled by Washington Republicans and corporate PACs. And after casting the deciding vote for Donald Trump’s cruel budget, he knows he’s vulnerable. That’s why Republicans are already preparing to spend millions to drown us out. We need to show our strength right now. Keeping our fundraising strong during the summer sends a clear message: Carol can – and will – flip PA-07 and help Democrats take back the House majority. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Every dollar makes a difference. Together, we’ll show them what grassroots momentum looks like. Together, Carol for PA * | | = Paid for by Carol for PA Carol for PA P.O Box 83 Allentown, PA 18105 United States | | | ---|---|--- = =

name: Elizabeth Guzman
subject: As a social worker, I’m on the front lines
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman
clean_body: | | | As a social worker, I’m on the front lines helping seniors, veterans, and hardworking families access the health care, nutrition, and housing they need. Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans just slashed these programs, all to give tax breaks to billionaires. It’s just wrong, Friend. I’m running for VA House of Delegates this November to fight back. I immigrated to America as a single mom with $300 in my pocket, determined to finish my education. I chose social work to give back to the community that lent me a hand - because we’re all in this together. As the first immigrant Latina in the Virginia House of Delegates, I voted to expand Medicaid.Now, I’m running to return to the House to defend our healthcare. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Flipping red seats blue will help us show that we won’t back down ahead of the 2026 midterm elections. I’m proud that my campaign is powered by nearly 5,000 donations from Americans like you. We need to sustain this pace through November to win this nationally-targeted DLCC Spotlight race. Thanks for your support, Elizabeth Guzman | Democrat is running for Delegate in Virginia's 22nd District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. She passed stronger gun safety laws, expanded collective bargaining rights and paid sick leave, and protected reproductive rights. To donate by check, send to: Friends of Elizabeth Guzman PO Box 74, Nokesville VA, 20182 \- \- Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman. Contributions or gifts to Guzman for Congress are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Elizabeth Guzman, please .
