Team, Let’s be blunt. If Democrats are going to take back the House, it’s going to happen right here in Arizona. Our congressional races are some of the most competitive in the country. And Republicans know it. They are already flooding our state with dark money and misinformation, trying to flip seats and silence voters. **We are not letting that happen.** Arizona is home to critical races that will decide control of Congress. We are defending strong incumbents and going on offense in key districts. Every seat we hold or flip here brings us one step closer to stopping MAGA extremists from taking control. **And we are going to hold them accountable.** Republicans just passed a brutal budget that will rip health care away from Arizona families, drive up energy costs, and force rural hospitals to close. _We cannot and will not let them get away with it._ Winning here means organizing in every corner of the state, fighting voter suppression, and turning out voters who decide elections. **We are doing that work every single day. name: Andrea Salinas
subject: The Supreme Court just attacked abortion rights again
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
By a 6-3 vote, SCOTUS ruled to allow Republican lawmakers in red states to BAN Americans on Medicaid from receiving care at Planned Parenthood clinics.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111373801/557013108/-1080040549?refcode=email-header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMmFmY2Y4NC00MjVmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WVs0AmDzTjV7MJK2E_J8m_4Hpmk0CgH8v8uylZ0ojRk=) Team, it’s Andrea, and I have bad news. _See for yourself:_ **_AP: U.S. Supreme Court allows states to block funding to Planned Parenthood clinics_** **Years after ripping up decades of precedent to overturn Roe and wipe away abortion rights, the U.S. Supreme Court is continuing its cruel assault on women’s reproductive freedom. By a 6-3 vote, SCOTUS ruled to allow Republican lawmakers in red states to BAN Americans on Medicaid from receiving care at Planned Parenthood clinics.** The message SCOTUS just sent is clear: For the millions of working class women who rely on Planned Parenthood for services like cancer screenings and preventative care — their health, and their lives _simply don’t matter._ **This ruling isn’t just wrong, it’s inhumane and downright disgusting.** And we should be better than this. name: Jared Hudson
subject: Former SEAL Sniper Jared Hudson Releases TV Ad Recounting God’s Grace Saving Trump in Butler, PA Ahead of One-Year Anniversary
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hudson for Alabama
body:
| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/hudsonforalabama/former-seal-sniper-jared-hudson-releases-tv-ad-recounting-gods-grace-saving-trump-in-butler-pa-ahead-of-one-year-anniversary?e=1ade0133c0)
---
[|
---](https://hudsonforalabama.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6af96dbbcda9e47551bbd367a&id=97ab1d3b88&e=1ade0133c0)
| | | | | | | | | | | **Former SEAL Sniper Jared Hudson Releases TV Ad Recounting God’s Grace Saving Trump in Butler, PA Ahead of One-Year Anniversary**
Today, former Navy SEAL Sniper Jared Hudson released his first ad titled “Grace” recounting how God saved President Trump in Butler, PA exactly one year ago to the day this Sunday. The spot will air on television marking the first ad buy from any candidate in the race to be Alabama’s next United States Senator.
_“As a Navy SEAL Sniper, I made shots from 1,000 yards away in combat zones, so I know there is only one possible way President Trump walked away from that bullet in Butler, PA fired on a clear day from less than 400 feet away – that is by the grace of God. God was not finished with Donald J. Trump and He is not finished with the United States of America,”_**Hudson said.**
_“President Trump took a bullet for this country. Meanwhile weak politicians won’t even take a tough vote. It is time for a new generation of conservatives who will fight just as hard as President Trump does to Make America Great Again,”_**Hudson added.** “ _I will be that warrior. I have done it before on the battlefield overseas, and I am ready to do it again as Alabama’s next United States Senator.”_
Watch Hudson’s video “Grace” [HERE](https://hudsonforalabama.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6af96dbbcda9e47551bbd367a&id=51cb1dd983&e=1ade0133c0).

Judicial Watch announced a $4.975 million settlement today in the
wrongful death lawsuit against the U.S. Government filed on behalf of
the family of Ashli Babbitt, the U.S. Air Force veteran who was shot
and killed inside the U.S. Capitol by then-Capitol Police Lt. Michael
Byrd on January 6, 2021. Ashli Babbitt was the only January 6 homicide
victim.

Peter, the disinformation machine just kicked on: This week, news broke that American Action Network, a far-right, extremist lobbying group, is dropping _$5 million_ on television ads in districts including WI-03, to gaslight our district into supporting Van Orden’s vote for Trump’s spending bill. This is another attempt by oligarchs and corporate PACs to handpick the Congress _they_ want -- one that actively works against us. But it’s also a sign that they know voters believe in our message, and that they can’t win on their record. **Derrick Van Orden’s vote just kicked 18 million children off food support, and 17 million people off of their healthcare. Those are the facts, no matter how hard they try to spin.** This race will be decided by who defines the narrative. If we let Van Orden and his billionaire backers go unchecked, we risk losing this seat and everything we’re fighting for. [**Can you rush a $3 contribution right now? Peter,

Rep. Rob Bresnahan isn’t in Washington representing Pennsylvania's interests. **_He’s there to represent his own wallet!_**

Bresnahan has repeatedly promised to protect Medicaid — he assured Pennsylvanians he would not vote for a bill that guts programs our communities rely on.

**Last week, he showed us his promises mean NOTHING when he voted YES for the Big Bullsh*t Bill.** While thousands of Pennsylvanians are losing Medicaid because of Bresnahan’s vote, he made money selling stocks!

Bresnahan doesn’t understand Pennsylvanians' struggle — and he doesn’t care.

**It’s time for real representation in Washington,_not self-interested, fake politicians like Bresnahan._ We need people who will fight for Pennsylvanian families and interests.**
**_[Help us take back the House with real public servants »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111374174/557014931/-1020196347?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_PADM_20250712_FR_Bresnahan_0_1MO_PADems_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDRlZDAxMC00NDVmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7K8G0TzEMIAgE0k2QiJ5bf3K46cHJQV6dlxZFLN8Y-Q=)_**

# [Trump admin bringing down 50% of satellite microwave sensors in leadup to peak hurricane season](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=283449&post_id=168159020&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY4MTU5MDIwLCJpYXQiOjE3NTIzNDA3NjIsImV4cCI6MTc1NDkzMjc2MiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4MzQ0OSIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.BX-fAnTScK73UE6SGcD6O3_vjCgucnpW1mfCPcISZUE)

---

[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..3U_DHTUDiopHxT8BUXbtdmG58SVrWm-8hKa9amDprXM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=168159020)
As I walk through how our hurricane forecasting systems work, and the important role different instruments play, I want to emphasize how the need to update and expand our technologies predates Donald Trump, and that our agencies have rarely had the necessary funding to adequately address the challenges posed by a changing climate.
Thus, the deep cuts made by the Trump administration have profound impacts across systems already treading water.
Hurricane forecasting requires multiple lines of data, which includes satellite imagery in the visible and infrared spectrums, hurricane flights, low- orbiting microwave sensors, buoys and stationary instruments, and more. Each sensor picks up on different energy wavelengths, and together they create a composite of a storm.
We use these technologies to understand the internal structure and movement of storms.
Without it, we're back in the forecasting dark ages.
At the end of this month, the department of defense plans to cut half of its low-orbiting microwave satellites as part of its ongoing war with climate science.
Those sensors detect at different wavelengths than our other sensors, allowing us to see inside the storm and follow a storm overnight, as sensors for visible wavelengths can't see at night.
This comes during a time in which rapid intensification of storms becomes more frequent, and storms can and have gone from minor hurricanes to major hurricanes overnight...

Scott Brown is a proud husband, father, grandfather, and lifelong public
servant.

He wore our nation’s uniform for over 30 years, served as a U.S. Senator, and
represented America on the world stage as President Trump’s ambassador.

Now, he’s answering the call to serve again — running to flip New Hampshire’s
Senate seat RED and bring real leadership back to Washington.

For nearly 20 years, this seat has been controlled by Democrats while
Washington has grown more dysfunctional, more divided, and more out of touch
with the American people.

Scott Brown is ready to change that — to restore accountability, defend our
values, and fight for the American Dream.

But he can’t do it without a strong grassroots team behind him.

\---------- Forwarded message from Gabe Vasquez ----------
Earlier this month, Congressional Republicans pushed through a bill that honestly feels like something out of a bad dream.
I’ve spent a lot of time across southern New Mexico sitting down with families who rely on Medicaid to get to the doctor or use SNAP to make sure their kids don’t go to bed hungry.
These programs aren’t a waste — they’re essentials. They’re what help people stay healthy, put food on the table, and work toward something better.
But this new bill? It slashes those programs. It guts Medicaid. It cuts food assistance. And it does it knowing full well the harm it will cause.
Why? So they can hand out even more tax breaks to billionaires and special interests.
Think of it like a reverse Robin Hood — taking from the people who have the least and giving it to those who already have the most.
It’s cruel and it’s wrong. **And I’m going to keep fighting like hell against it.** But here’s the truth: I can’t do it alone.
This district could be the deciding seat in the fight to flip the House. If we win here, we can finally start holding Donald Trump and his enablers accountable. And Republicans know it. That’s why they’re already flooding this race with dark money and doing whatever it takes to try to buy this seat.
I love New Mexico. I love our people. I see how hard folks here work every single day to care for their families, their neighbors, and their future. We deserve better than what this bill will do to us.
[If you’re able, will you chip in $10 today to help us reach our $6,000 mid-month fundraising goal — so we can win this race, flip the House in 2026 and keep fighting for the people of southern New Mexico?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111374577/557016664/1449064918?amount=10&source=SBD_GV_EM_FR_071225_MM2_D2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWI0ZjIwNC00NjVmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5I8l5P8gbp4IFHCiBsOqedjDLB0qgf_LpYZfe0sjX7Y=)

clean_body: Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | We know things feel overwhelming right now, so we’ll keep this short. If you didn’t see Gabe’s email, here’s the TL;DR: what Republicans are doing is dangerous, and it’s exactly why this race matters so much. Winning this seat isn’t just about keeping one district on the board. It could be the tipping point for flipping the House in 2026 — and finally stopping the cruelty coming out of Washington. But we’re up against a flood of dark money and outside attacks. We have to fight back, and we have to do it together. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = \---------- Forwarded message from Gabe Vasquez ---------- Earlier this month, Congressional Republicans pushed through a bill that honestly feels like something out of a bad dream. I’ve spent a lot of time across southern New Mexico sitting down with families who rely on Medicaid to get to the doctor or use SNAP to make sure their kids don’t go to bed hungry. These programs aren’t a waste — they’re essentials. They’re what help people stay healthy, put food on the table, and work toward something better. But this new bill? It slashes those programs. It guts Medicaid. It cuts food assistance. And it does it knowing full well the harm it will cause. Why? So they can hand out even more tax breaks to billionaires and special interests. Think of it like a reverse Robin Hood — taking from the people who have the least and giving it to those who already have the most. It’s cruel and it’s wrong. And I’m going to keep fighting like hell against it. But here’s the truth: I can’t do it alone. This district could be the deciding seat in the fight to flip the House. If we win here, we can finally start holding Donald Trump and his enablers accountable. And Republicans know it. That’s why they’re already flooding this race with dark money and doing whatever it takes to try to buy this seat. I love New Mexico. I love our people. I see how hard folks here work every single day to care for their families, their neighbors, and their future. We deserve better than what this bill will do to us. = | = We’re in this together — and I truly believe that if we keep showing up for each other, we’re going to get through this. — Gabe | | | ---|---|--- = Together, we flipped NM-02 in 2022. Now, Gabe is busy in Congress fighting for reproductive choice, economic opportunity, affordable healthcare, and the best interests of the people. Gabe won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022, and is running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone.** | = = Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: To receive less email from Gabe Vasquez for Congress, . You can also =.

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: 'Waste, fraud, and abuse'
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
We spend more on ICE than every other federal law enforcement agency combined.
#
We “don't have the money” for a better social safety net, but we have $172 billion for a rogue agency formed during the Patriot Act era.
If you actually wanted to go after 'waste, fraud, and abuse,' you would look at who's making the money off of cuts to Medicaid, Medicare, and Social Security.
[Our movement for working families and everyday people will have to fight harder than ever these next four years. Will you help us continue the fight with a $5 contribution today?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250712.j6mt9U&refcode=em20250712-9300-P_FND_EGR_OPP&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9300%2E2526796%2E_nLj4H)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250712.j6mt9U&refcode=em20250712-9300-P_FND_EGR_OPP&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=9300%2E2526796%2E_nLj4H)**
Whether or not you can give today, thank you for standing with our movement.
In solidarity,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250712?refcode=em20250712-9300-P_FND_EGR_OPP&t=21&refcode2=9300_2526796__nLj4H&akid=9300%2E2526796%2E_nLj4H)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20250712-9300-P_FND_EGR_OPP&t=22&akid=9300%2E2526796%2E_nLj4H)**

---|---|---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

body:

_FWD message from Marie Gluesenkamp Perez to Peter:_

Now that the president has officially signed it into law, I’m working to ensure I can support our communities as we prepare to face the impacts.

name: Protect the House via Democracy on the Line
subject: MAGA Republicans are vulnerable, let’s strike >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC
body:
We’re flipping the House. Are you in?

|
---
Peter,

We’re just **three seats** away from flipping the House and ending Trump’s MAGA grip on Congress.

Republicans just passed the largest Medicaid cut in modern history — and handed billions in tax breaks to Elon Musk, Jeff Bezos, and the ultra-rich.

Here’s something that gives me hope, friend.

**My finance team just crunched the numbers, and they tell me that our average online donation in the second quarter was just $22.02.**

It’s a testament to the grassroots strength of this movement. I don’t rely on big checks from Big Pharma or Big Oil, I’m receiving the support of _thousands_ of folks like you, chipping in a few dollars when they can.

I flipped this seat back in November by 653 votes. Since then, I’ve always known that keeping CA-45 blue – not only for the sake of our communities, but for control of the House majority – will depend on building from the ground up.

And I know it sounds strange – how can chipping in a small donation make an impact in a toss-up race like mine?

Every dollar, every vote, and every voice WILL make a difference. If every supporter reading this email chipped in even half of our average donation, it’d make an immediate impact.

It’s a testament to the grassroots strength of this movement. I don’t rely on big checks from Big Pharma or Big Oil, I’m receiving the support of thousands of folks like you, chipping in a few dollars when they can. I flipped this seat back in November by 653 votes. Since then, I’ve always known that keeping CA-45 blue – not only for the sake of our communities, but for control of the House majority – will depend on building from the ground up. And I know it sounds strange – how can chipping in a small donation make an impact in a toss-up race like mine? Every dollar, every vote, and every voice WILL make a difference. name: Dr. Annie Andrews
subject: I'm a mom. I'm pissed. And I'm running for Senate...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
I need your help to defeat Lindsey Graham and protect our kids
| | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb837ae8a-235f-4ca2-baaa-1074bc3eb710/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1c1e38d3-e262-49a3-ad98-4d3c94810486/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [I'm a pediatrician. I’m pissed. I’m scared. And I need your help to defeat Lindsey Graham in the U.S. Senate >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T119b6be3-97f0-483a-a170-f383d52550a6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) I’m not the “monsters-under-the-bed” kind of scared. I’m the “I’ve watched children suffer from preventable illness and injury while politicians do absolutely nothing” kind of scared. I’ve treated kids who’ve been shot. Kids whose families struggle to afford their medications. Kids who live with mold that causes asthma attacks, miss school for climate disasters, and watch politicians use them as political pawns. And now? Trump is causing chaos and Lindsey Graham is right by his side. And Medicaid — the program that keeps half our pediatric patients insured, healthy, and...alive — is on the chopping block to pay for tax breaks for billionaires. So yeah, I never planned to run for Senate. But I’m scared. I’m pissed. I’m motivated. And I’m 100% in. [I’m running for Senate in South Carolina to defeat Lindsey Graham and to fight for the kids no one in D.C. seems to be thinking about. So I need you with me on day one. We need to hit 10,000 donations before midnight to prove that this campaign can go the distance. Can I count on you?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T08809519-8c4d-46d1-85cc-b827adfa45a8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE NOW →](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc7469e1b-a8ab-4744-a4c4-0a8426b1d082/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| I’m running because the Republican Party, led by people like Lindsey Graham, is dismantling the very systems that keep our kids safe here in South Carolina. I’m running because the issues I care about — children’s healthcare, vaccines, gun violence, public education, Social Security, Medicaid and Medicare — are under direct attack right now. And I’m running because I consider it my professional duty as a pediatrician — to give children a strong voice at the national level. Too many are comfortable on the sidelines. That won’t work for me. We need bold leaders who aren’t afraid to fight. I’m ready. Even though the path will be hard, I know Lindsey Graham must be held accountable. He certainly doesn’t deserve a free pass back to D.C. for six more years. [That’s why I’m running for US Senate. To defeat Trump’s lapdog and fight for everyday Americans. But, I need your support today. Can you rush a split donation of $10 (or whatever you can spare) between Blue Amp Action and me to become a Founding Donor to my campaign? >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8eb8071f-8b1c-4b6d-af13-fdfb6355aaed/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbb5fb46a-3eb9-4d2a-a737-2e19f1667b82/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: James Carville
subject: America is in deep, deep trouble.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by SMP, www
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111376130/557022054/-896966196?refcode=AU_SMP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC30_20250712_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTQxYTIxMy00YTVmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IEanjb2xIUDegFmNrKmSyYPt5oSlsljJP4jylZjJnfQ=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111376132/557022056/-788614911?refcode=AU_SMP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC30_20250712_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTQxYTIxMy00YTVmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IEanjb2xIUDegFmNrKmSyYPt5oSlsljJP4jylZjJnfQ=) Team, I’ll cut to the chase: America is in **deep, deep trouble.** In just the first six months of Trump’s second term, here’s what we’ve seen:
* Massive tax cuts for billionaires while kicking millions of Americans off of their health insurance.
* Federal officers fired for being “disloyal.”
* Civil servants purged.
* Critics arrested.
* Trump’s DOJ used to retaliate against political enemies.
* The economy tanked with reckless tariffs and chaos.
* **And worst of all: no one’s stopping him.**

The Supreme Court ruled he has absolute immunity. The Republican Congress cheers him on. And Democrats in the Senate? Despite fighting like hell, we’re outnumbered, losing vote after vote while Trump rewrites laws by executive order. Social Security? On the chopping block. The Department of Education? Dismantled. Women’s rights, gun safety, and climate progress? **All at risk.** This isn’t politics as usual. This is authoritarianism. And pretending democracy will fix itself? That’s a fantasy. Here’s the truth: **Flipping the Senate in 2026 is our last, best shot.** **That’s why Flip the Senate exists. ** They’re not the DNC. They’re an independent organization focused solely on this: **Taking back the Senate majority. ** We’ve got less than 16 months to do it — or lose our democracy for good. **[Will you chip in to help stop Trump’s MAGA movement before it’s too late?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111376136/557022058/-746039140?amount=10&refcode=AU_SMP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC30_20250712_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTQxYTIxMy00YTVmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IEanjb2xIUDegFmNrKmSyYPt5oSlsljJP4jylZjJnfQ=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $10 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111376138/557022062/-788614911?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_SMP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC30_20250712_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTQxYTIxMy00YTVmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IEanjb2xIUDegFmNrKmSyYPt5oSlsljJP4jylZjJnfQ=)

clean_body: | = = Team, I’ll cut to the chase: America is in deep, deep trouble. In just the first six months of Trump’s second term, here’s what we’ve seen: Massive tax cuts for billionaires while kicking millions of Americans off of their health insurance. Federal officers fired for being “disloyal.” Civil servants purged. Critics arrested. Trump’s DOJ used to retaliate against political enemies. The economy tanked with reckless tariffs and chaos. And worst of all: no one’s stopping him. The Supreme Court ruled he has absolute immunity. The Republican Congress cheers him on. And Democrats in the Senate? Despite fighting like hell, we’re outnumbered, losing vote after vote while Trump rewrites laws by executive order. Social Security? On the chopping block. The Department of Education? Dismantled. Women’s rights, gun safety, and climate progress? All at risk. This isn’t politics as usual. This is authoritarianism. And pretending democracy will fix itself? That’s a fantasy. Here’s the truth: Flipping the Senate in 2026 is our last, best shot. That’s why Flip the Senate exists. They’re not the DNC. They’re an independent organization focused solely on this: Taking back the Senate majority. We’ve got less than 16 months to do it — or lose our democracy for good. =** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = — James Carville = Paid for by SMP, www.SenateMajority.com, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. subject: Autocracy 101
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
We need your support as we keep up the fight for equal rights and equal representation through fair maps
|
---

Peter,
Did you see President Obama’s recent warning? He stated that the U.S. is getting dangerously close to a Hungarian-style autocracy — and today, we’re breaking down what that means.
**What is autocracy?** By definition, an autocracy is a system of government where one person holds absolute power. In contrast to a democracy, where the government is elected by and accountable to the people, an autocracy lacks separation of powers, governmental oversight, and checks and balances. An autocratic ruler is not accountable to the people — and there is no limit on their power.
**But what does this have to do with gerrymandering?** Under an autocracy, elections are neither free nor fair. Under an autocracy, people’s voices are stifled. When anti-democracy lawmakers draw maps that strip voters of their chance to be fairly represented, it erodes a pillar of our democracy. It creates a situation where politicians choose their voters and not the other way around — unfairly swaying electoral results for years to come.
**How does the U.S. under Trump compare to Hungary under Viktor Orbán?** In Hungary, the Center for American Progress describes Orbán’s leadership as a “textbook case of democratic backsliding, characterized by state capture of public institutions; assaults on minority rights, especially migrant, Roma, and LGBTQ rights; aggressive nationalist rhetoric; and attacks on the rule of law.” He also rewrote Hungary’s constitution to illegally hold on to power.
Sound familiar? It’s no wonder conservatives and Trump have close ties to Orbán. **President Obama's warning should alarm us all.**
On day one of returning to office, Donald Trump issued a flurry of executive orders that were not only unconstitutional, but a clear overreach of presidential power. He gutted critical government agencies, illegally fired federal workers, appointed countless Trump loyalists, and continues to dismantle key parts of our government without any input from Congress. It’s clear: Donald Trump is a clear threat to our democracy as we know it.
**Right now, our democracy is under threat like never before. And protecting it will require all of us fighting back stronger and harder than ever before. We cannot stand by while Trump takes us down the path of autocracy.**
[**All On The Line will keep fighting to protect, defend, and strengthen our democracy by ensuring fair maps and fair representation, and I hope you’ll keep fighting alongside us. Make a donation to help ensure we can keep protecting the core principles of democracy — now, and in the future.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111376171/557022157/-1219977196?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_Autocracy101_email_20250712-AOTL-Tier1-Autocracy101-MJ_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250712-AOTL-Tier1-Autocracy101-MJ_&utm_campaign=Autocracy101&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEwNDFhMjEzLTRhNWYtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Vx1Jyw8CKBF_jGuJCCpLWgVt_EFBvAi1SPbZw0yFry4=)

**$7.** That’s all we’re asking from you to help elect Democrats in the states. Here’s why: **Reason #1:** We're facing a slew of special elections over the coming months and in November, the Virginia House and governorship are up for grabs – $7 helps win races like those and more. **Reason #2:** We’re up against Trump and a MAGA movement that are spending millions at the state level. When enough grassroots Democrats chip in $7, it adds up and helps Democratic candidates compete. **Reason #3:** **With the GOP pushing their extreme agenda nationwide, your $7 donation is even more important.** [Donate $7 today to help state Democrats compete against Republicans’ multi-million dollar fundraising haul. ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDgicZfgb3kpC3Q-b6VCjsBVFqwaWIcnhngTU-6UNnT1H_klEeAZQC_ez2wDDdLQXpJKmXW-0B_RNWt1f8Q1Pi7wIWt8fLtK6BQk6Ea9lqwEGrzYmyX5svMGCmbAJcAioOChQjtlGX-5I-n0mGvHxoPP9VDz5X0HO1v_dgiUq0CiT68xi4WCnk0tlrFIC3wn6MaQKRp9w9cJUbqWHcG1pS-LaCoyrjWqT0dt9jHAgDIUtY00r9Ynbfc1Te1vf4dU0suTZ4Qp2ZmIt73Zeh07BnVRo1DnTkKPncJBDgEVnrO3dnLC3qj_P3EBM-rFaVRPVjvbWNE8-zr_BjB5c6fbnOHz9VrEKoosyv2zMSCB3mR_s/4i4/CXseNkGeT7iRPHDkpBoOZA/h0/h001.HqAZp2wTjW3zZQ9fWwHOV4zcrRZyIQ0wUW-__c2I5UA) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

clean_body: \-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | | | | | Friend, BEFORE MY CRITICAL FUNDRAISING DEADLINE, WILL YOU STAND WITH TRUMP? I need you RIGHT NOW. We’re just days away from my mid-month deadline. And I’ll be blunt — we need aMASSIVE SURGE of support if we’re going to hit our goal. If we fall short — who knows what the democrats will pull? It won’t be good. That’s why I’m coming to YOU. I really hope to hear from you ASAP! Sincerely, Donald J. subject: Would you answer the phone if I gave you a call? 📞

body:
I wanted to reach out personally.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111376862/557024694/1328794144?refcode=ea.7eb0082c-4c5f-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.7eb0082c-4c5f-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdlYjAwODJjLTRjNWYtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rxUOANo2TC0hjfmMOMcpXYKGnEIf1ant7-RPqtU6BFc=&emci=7f5c9c93-5d5e-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=7eb0082c-4c5f-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4823105)

One of my absolute favorite parts of this work is getting to connect directly with supporters like you. Your passion for climate action and your commitment to this fight give me so much hope for the future we're building together. The truth is, I wouldn't be able to do any of this work without the unyielding support of this grassroots team. **So here's what I want to do to show my appreciation: I want to give you a call.** [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111376863/557024695/1824087006?refcode=ea.7eb0082c-4c5f-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.7eb0082c-4c5f-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdlYjAwODJjLTRjNWYtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rxUOANo2TC0hjfmMOMcpXYKGnEIf1ant7-RPqtU6BFc=) **[If you join my Grassroots Cabinet today with a monthly contribution of $10, or any amount that works for you, you'll have a chance to receive a personal call from me. Each month, I call a handful of our members to say thank you — and I'd love for you to be one of them.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111376864/557024696/1824087006?recurring=true&amount=10&refcode=ea.7eb0082c-4c5f-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.7eb0082c-4c5f-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdlYjAwODJjLTRjNWYtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rxUOANo2TC0hjfmMOMcpXYKGnEIf1ant7-RPqtU6BFc=)** | [**Join Jane's Grassroots Cabinet Today →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111376865/557024697/1824087006?recurring=true&refcode=ea.7eb0082c-4c5f-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.7eb0082c-4c5f-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdlYjAwODJjLTRjNWYtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rxUOANo2TC0hjfmMOMcpXYKGnEIf1ant7-RPqtU6BFc=)
---
I know summer can be tough on grassroots fundraising — everyone has vacation plans and summer activities. But with Trump and his fossil fuel cronies working overtime to roll back every bit of climate progress we've made, we can't afford to slow down.
That's why sustained monthly support through Jane's Grassroots Cabinet is so crucial. **[Your $10 monthly contribution helps us plan and invest in climate champions across the country.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111376866/557024698/1824087006?recurring=true&amount=10&refcode=ea.7eb0082c-4c5f-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.7eb0082c-4c5f-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdlYjAwODJjLTRjNWYtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rxUOANo2TC0hjfmMOMcpXYKGnEIf1ant7-RPqtU6BFc=)** It also connects you to a community of passionate activists who refuse to back down.
And let me tell you, being part of Jane's Grassroots Cabinet comes with some pretty great perks:
✨ Exclusive updates from me about the real change your support is making possible
✨ Early access to events and merchandise (because who doesn't love a good climate tee?)
✨ Special virtual events where we can connect face-to-face
✨ And yes, the chance to get a personal call from me
**[If you've been looking for a way to make a direct impact in the climate fight, this is it. Your monthly commitment sends a powerful message: Trump and Big Oil don't get to decide our future. We do. Can I count on you to join my Grassroots Cabinet before the weekend is over? I'd love to have your name on my call list.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111376867/557024699/1824087006?recurring=true&refcode=ea.7eb0082c-4c5f-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.7eb0082c-4c5f-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdlYjAwODJjLTRjNWYtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rxUOANo2TC0hjfmMOMcpXYKGnEIf1ant7-RPqtU6BFc=)**

Peter,

Elected officials are public servants — they should not be using their positions to benefit themselves.

Donald Trump has just received a $16 million settlement from Paramount after suing them in a frivolous civil lawsuit, as the company seeks federal approval for a sale to a new owner. **_This suit is nothing more than thinly veiled bribery — and we have to close the loopholes now._**

**Donald Trump used the power of the presidency to take healthcare away from 17 million Americans, and now he used it to solicit a $16 million bribe!**

Presidents should not be able to receive payouts from the very companies they regulate. I introduced the Don’t Settle for Bribes Act to prevent presidents from taking financial settlements from companies while in office.

Peter, I want you to know that I will call out corruption wherever I see it. That is why I introduced a bill to ban Members of Congress from trading stocks, and it is why I also filed this new bill to prevent Presidents from taking bribes.

**I will never stop holding other politicians accountable** because public servants are there to improve lives for Americans, not to fatten their wallets through bribes and insider trading.

I will always put Rhode Islanders first. That’s why I’m running for re-election.

And I need your help now because campaigns are expensive. Every dollar we raise helps me reach more voters so I can listen, hear, and act on your and your family’s behalf in Washington.

**_[Peter, will you donate $10 or whatever you can spare to help keep my campaign running? Your support is crucial in this fight against corruption.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111377034/557025386/1420690541?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_SM_20250712_FR_BribesAct_0_6MO_Seth_NA_NA_Paramount&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzhkZDlkZS00YzVmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_A6oHrd6XKQAa504iz6G1tojNGCU5Esa6rbIWQLTY4k=)_** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately._ | | [DONATE $10 NOW »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111377035/557025387/1420690541?amount=10&express_lane=true&source=EM_NBI_SM_20250712_FR_BribesAct_0_6MO_Seth_NA_NA_Paramount&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzhkZDlkZS00YzVmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_A6oHrd6XKQAa504iz6G1tojNGCU5Esa6rbIWQLTY4k=)

name: Bryan
subject: House Control at Risk
body:
The Left has filed another lawsuit seeking to redraw Wisconsin's congressional districts and flip the House...

| | | | | [|
---](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=24cc6c0444&e=e907534017)
| | | | |

---
| | | | | _**Have you seen this?**_ Despite having their case dismissed by the Wisconsin Supreme Court last month, **the Left** has already filed another [**lawsuit**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=8dfd339916&e=e907534017)**** looking to redraw Wisconsin’s maps.
---
[|
---](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=7efdcd2437&e=e907534017)
| Wisconsin always has close elections and the First Congressional District is the [**most competitive seat in Wisconsin**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=1a3cd8f0a2&e=e907534017) , and one of the [**most competitive in the nation**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=591758a869&e=e907534017).
But now D.C. and Madison Democrats are looking to _**redraw Wisconsin’s congressional districts,**_**** flip the U.S. House, and take our nation backwards.
Our rivals are on a mission to alter and draw new congressional boundaries, designed to stack the deck.
Remember, the current maps were drawn by liberal Governor Tony Evers.
---
| [I NEED YOUR HELP TO PUSH BACK](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=d03ba72be0&e=e907534017)
---
| Despite the efforts of the Left and running in a district drawn by Evers, we [**won in 2024**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=8c75168a8b&e=e907534017). But [**Washington Democrats**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=998b17057b&e=e907534017) will stop at nothing. So now, they want yet another try at drawing the maps in their favor.
They’re already mobilizing their national dark money donor network to spend millions attacking my conservative record. Last cycle they spent more than **$4.4 million** against us, and with Trump in the White House, we know they’ll do so again.
---
[|
---](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=6a51a77df3&e=e907534017)
| A loss here could cost Republicans control of the House and risk our conservative agenda.
But I am running for reelection, and with your help, we will win.
---
| [JOIN OUR TEAM](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=1dbd73b07b&e=e907534017)
---
| [_**Will you stand with me and fight back by donating $15, $25, or $50 today?**_](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=7b36d85f46&e=e907534017)
Together we can fight back and bring integrity back to politics.
---
| | | | | | | | | | | [DONATE $15](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=b0fd6ae657&e=e907534017)
---
| | [DONATE $25](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=08648dfc92&e=e907534017)
---
| | [DONATE $50](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=583a570c1a&e=e907534017)
---
| **On Wisconsin,** Bryan Steil
---
|
---
| | | | [View email in browser](https://mailchi.mp/steilforwisconsin/712protectthehouse?e=e907534017)
Steil for Wisconsin, Inc. * PO Box 103 * Oak Creek, WI 53154-8618 * USA
[update your preferences](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=5ab9944a1c&e=e907534017&c=2e63ab3147) or [unsubscribe](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=5ab9944a1c&t=b&e=e907534017&c=2e63ab3147)

# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250712-5237-footer&t=1&akid=5237%2E420207%2Er_Q6K4)
Hi Peter,
**Last week, Donald Trump signed what MAGA Republicans are calling the “One Big Beautiful Bill.”** But let’s call it what it really is: A Big Bad Betrayal, with massive giveaways to fossil fuel billionaires that will devastate our climate, economy, and communities.
It slashes clean energy tax credits, jeopardizing hundreds of thousands of renewable energy jobs. It threatens to raise household energy bills by over $400 per year and opens up millions of acres of public lands to oil and gas drilling.
At the same time, it guts environmental protections, cuts Medicaid and food assistance, and hands out billions in tax breaks to the ultra-wealthy.
**I’m fighting back. But I can’t do it alone.**
[**Will you chip in $5 or more to support my work for the progressive movement and help me keep fighting to protect our planet?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250712-1?refcode=em20250712-5237&amount=3&refcode2=5237_420207_r_Q6K4&akid=5237%2E420207%2Er_Q6K4)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250712-1?amount=3&refcode=em20250712-5237&refcode2=5237_420207_r_Q6K4&akid=5237%2E420207%2Er_Q6K4)**
This bill is cruel, dangerous, and deeply out of step with our values.
**It prioritizes polluters over people, profits over public health, and greed over the Green New Deal.**
We need bold, grassroots-powered resistance. And that starts with you.
[**So if you're ready to fight back, please chip in right now and help us stop this climate disaster before it’s too late.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250712-1?refcode=em20250712-5237&amount=3&refcode2=5237_420207_r_Q6K4&akid=5237%2E420207%2Er_Q6K4)
Thank you for standing with me in this fight.
In solidarity,
Pramila Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250712-5237-footer&t=2&refcode2=5237_420207_r_Q6K4&akid=5237%2E420207%2Er_Q6K4)**

Trump is ramping up his efforts to undermine our elections, friend. The federal agency responsible for defending our elections from cyberattacks and disinformation, CISA, **is being gutted.** Reports from across the country show election offices struggling without the security support they once relied on. Training has been scaled back. Communication has slowed. Tools to detect interference are going dark. This is Trump’s plan in action: Strip away the guardrails. Starve election infrastructure. Create chaos. Then step in to “fix” it with authoritarian control. **It’s already happening. And CISA is just the start.** We can’t wait for the next crisis to respond. Democratic Secretaries of State are stepping up in the vacuum — **defending our systems, training election workers, and holding the line.** [**But doing that without federal help takes serious resources. Hi Peter,

We’re in the peak of the summer here in North Carolina, and the heat is reminding me of how I would spend my days as a young girl in Pine Hills.

In the summertime, I would attend two weeks of bible school, play outside with the kids my age, and frequent the produce stand on the corner where the plums were the freshest.

We didn’t have much time for reading, nor was it really on our radar. Until one day I learned that the students from UNC had a summertime program for reading the most books as an incentive. **And Peter, I’ve always said there’s nothing wrong with a little healthy competition.**

I wanted to win! So, I set a goal and then I read and I read and I read. That summer sparked my love for literature, but it also taught me a thing or two about competition, setting goals, and reaching them.

With that being said, our mid-month fundraising deadline is Tuesday at midnight, and we’ve _almost_ met our goal of $5,000. Setting goals along the way is the key to victory in the long run – such as taking back the House in 2026. [So, Peter, can you pitch in $10 or anything you can right now? Every single dollar makes a difference.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111377890/557028388/1371072993?amount=10&source=SBD_VF_EM_FR_071225_MM01_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWY4YzhjOC01MDVmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TgdMKZJt0xqySNgfdfotmrgmLSLmyIazJ5xA8AHf3HI=) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.

clean_body: Our mid-month deadline is on Tuesday... If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = Hi Peter, We’re in the peak of the summer here in North Carolina, and the heat is reminding me of how I would spend my days as a young girl in Pine Hills. In the summertime, I would attend two weeks of bible school, play outside with the kids my age, and frequent the produce stand on the corner where the plums were the freshest. We didn’t have much time for reading, nor was it really on our radar. Until one day I learned that the students from UNC had a summertime program for reading the most books as an incentive. And Peter, I’ve always said there’s nothing wrong with a little healthy competition. I wanted to win! So, I set a goal and then I read and I read and I read. That summer sparked my love for literature, but it also taught me a thing or two about competition, setting goals, and reaching them. With that being said, our mid-month fundraising deadline is Tuesday at midnight, and we’ve almost met our goal of $5,000. Setting goals along the way is the key to victory in the long run – such as taking back the House in 2026. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Valerie Foushee * | | | ---|---|--- = Valerie is fighting to protect access to health care, working families, and to reform our criminal justice system. But she needs your help to continue to do this great work in Congress. Your donation right now will help protect Democrat Valerie Foushee by giving us a jumpstart on the next cycle. | = = Paid for by Foushee for Congress Valerie Foushee for Congress PO Box 16446 Chapel Hill, NC 27516 United States If you need to you can unsubscribe, You can also =.

And to my Republican colleagues who helped pass that bill into law, there’s been one question on my mind: _**If you’re not here to serve your constituents — then why are you here?**_ It’s clear they’re working harder for billionaires than for the people who actually sent them here, and that they’ve abandoned their oaths of office in exchange for a quick buck. It’s despicable. **And I’m committed to ensuring each and every one of them loses their seat for what they’ve done.** [**But I need your help to get the job done. I ran to protect our democracy, safeguard the rule of law, build a fairer economy, and fight for equality.
But it seems these Republicans ran for office for no reason other than to enrich themselves and their billionaire buddies. **And it’s time for them to go.**
[**Chip in a split donation any amount ASAP if you’re with me, and let’s get to work fixing what the Republicans broke. >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111377936/557028492/-31074794?refcode=250712_Jasmine_Serve&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzgyN2U0Yy01MTVmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0bpJ_I5-aEhJPo56amkQDtDECo_eFegG6GMxYMPJaT8=)

clean_body: | = Folks House Republicans just passed one of the most horrifying pieces of legislation I’ve ever seen — ripping health care and food away from millions of Americans in need. And to my Republican colleagues who helped pass that bill into law, there’s been one question on my mind: If you’re not here to serve your constituents — then why are you here? It’s clear they’re working harder for billionaires than for the people who actually sent them here, and that they’ve abandoned their oaths of office in exchange for a quick buck. It’s despicable. And I’m committed to ensuring each and every one of them loses their seat for what they’ve done. = | | = "" | = "" | = "" | = "" I ran for Congress to improve the lives of the people I grew up with in Dallas. I ran to protect our democracy, safeguard the rule of law, build a fairer economy, and fight for equality. But it seems these Republicans ran for office for no reason other than to enrich themselves and their billionaire buddies. And it’s time for them to go. = Thank you, Jasmine = = OHDC 545 E. Peter,

MAGA’s trade policy is like a bad haircut: **_loud, expensive, and everybody ends up regretting it._**

This week, we got the receipts: U.S. exports **_just dropped 4%_** , the worst monthly decline since the pandemic. And that’s just what happens when you try to wage an ego-driven trade war with half the world and leave working people holding the bag.

They’re shrinking our markets, driving up prices, and hurting the small businesses that keep towns like yours and mine alive.

Here’s the truth: tariffs are taxes. Period. And guess who’s paying for them? Not the big guys. Not the corporations. You are.

[We can’t afford another round of performative politics dressed up as economic strategy. The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. Contributions or gifts to The Real Texas PAC are not tax deductible. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, treasury funds, and federal government contractors are prohibited. name: Troy Downing
subject: Are you proud to be an American?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
92% of Republicans are proud to be American — are you?

Peter,
I just saw the latest numbers from Gallup and had to contact you immediately. A staggering 92% of Republicans say they are proud to be an American, while a mere 36% of Democrats feel the same way.[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmZXhfdGlkPTIwMjUwNzEyX09XLVVWLjExMDExN190MTY2ODgxNy0xNzU2JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDcxMl9PVy1VVi4xMTAxMTdfdDE2Njg4MTctMTc1NiJ9/ZBk8aHB7RFRL_rfgAHshCg)This is a stark reminder of the divide in our country. While we conservatives are proud of our nation's history, values, and accomplishments, many on the Left seem more focused on tearing us down.
But I want to hear from you, Peter: [Are you proud to be an American?](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmZXhfdGlkPTIwMjUwNzEyX09XLVVWLjExMDExN190MTY2ODgxNy0xNzU2JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDcxMl9PVy1VVi4xMTAxMTdfdDE2Njg4MTctMTc1NiJ9/xAiGYRDPT2LipSe4xboFGw)
[EXTREMELY PROUD
](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmZXhfdGlkPTIwMjUwNzEyX09XLVVWLjExMDExN190MTY2ODgxNy0xNzU2JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDcxMl9PVy1VVi4xMTAxMTdfdDE2Njg4MTctMTc1NiJ9/CXXY9pDNE1u09HoVRu0wwA)[VERY PROUD
](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmZXhfdGlkPTIwMjUwNzEyX09XLVVWLjExMDExN190MTY2ODgxNy0xNzU2JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDcxMl9PVy1VVi4xMTAxMTdfdDE2Njg4MTctMTc1NiJ9/TXGphGhRiN1spml1dE2RGg)[MODERATELY PROUD
](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmZXhfdGlkPTIwMjUwNzEyX09XLVVWLjExMDExN190MTY2ODgxNy0xNzU2JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDcxMl9PVy1VVi4xMTAxMTdfdDE2Njg4MTctMTc1NiJ9/470Vx3EUHmxP1tL0trDINw)[ONLY A LITTLE PROUD
](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmZXhfdGlkPTIwMjUwNzEyX09XLVVWLjExMDExN190MTY2ODgxNy0xNzU2JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDcxMl9PVy1VVi4xMTAxMTdfdDE2Njg4MTctMTc1NiJ9/rCFx5puLT14l8jRT5v2gXA)[NOT PROUD AT ALL
](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmZXhfdGlkPTIwMjUwNzEyX09XLVVWLjExMDExN190MTY2ODgxNy0xNzU2JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDcxMl9PVy1VVi4xMTAxMTdfdDE2Njg4MTctMTc1NiJ9/HU2uIjemaJVPfGQqq-peDQ)As we move forward under President Trump's leadership, it's more important than ever that we stand strong and proud of who we are and what we represent. We must reject the radical left's attempts to undermine our patriotism and faith in America.

Thank you for your response to my poll.

name: Tina Kotek
subject: What’s on your mind?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
Our Mid-year Priorities Survey just launched. |
#
---
Hi Peter, We’re halfway through the year and nearly six months into a new Trump Administration. A lot has happened. And I know many Oregonians are feeling the weight of what’s been going on nationally — from threats to our basic rights to real concerns about how new federal policies could impact our families, our environment, and our future. **That’s why I want to check in with you directly. As your governor, it’s important to me that I stay grounded in the voices, values, and everyday experiences of Oregonians. So I’m asking:** **[Will you take a minute to fill out my mid-year priorities survey? Your answers will help guide my work.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111379312/557033369/-2053264499?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20250712_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjk0YzhkMC01NjVmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KMXFXY5q67fmeFgyKKG0V6bf6dlZLa1D44WF5jI0T3U=&emci=c71ebec9-565f-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=d294c8d0-565f-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=15353729)** | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111379313/557033370/-2053264499?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20250712_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjk0YzhkMC01NjVmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KMXFXY5q67fmeFgyKKG0V6bf6dlZLa1D44WF5jI0T3U=&emci=c71ebec9-565f-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=d294c8d0-565f-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=15353729)

I want to make sure we’re focused on the issues that matter most to you and your community. Thanks for taking the time to share your thoughts.
Take care,
Tina

name: Adam Kopel
subject: One foot in front of the other
disclaimer_text: paid for by the
body:
Hi there,
It’s been nearly a month since our world changed forever. Minnesotans will be reeling from the events of June 14, 2025, for a long time. I may never truly get over this, and House DFLers will be recovering alongside you. We don’t have everything figured out, but we do know we must keep going. I believe the Speaker would want us to carry on making life better for every Minnesotan we can.
This is where we need your help. The Speaker was a knockout fundraiser who made running our world-class campaign operation possible. She left us a roadmap, but we need to take care of our own business. While our lives have been paused for the last month, bills and campaigns are still there, and we have some ground to make up.
Our July goal is to raise $50,000 to get back on track. It’s not the only thing to be done, but as we move forward, we do need your financial support. We must win back a majority in the Minnesota House to keep making life better and safer in our state. To do that, we need to meet our budget goals now. Will you chip in today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dflhc-july25-email?refcode=071225_FR_JulyGoal_AK]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dflhc-july25-email?refcode=071225_FR_JulyGoal_AK_25&amount=25&express_lane=true] DONATE $34 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dflhc-july25-email?refcode=071225_FR_JulyGoal_AK_150&amount=34&express_lane=true] DONATE $55 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dflhc-july25-email?refcode=071225_FR_JulyGoal_AK_150&amount=55&express_lane=true]
DONATE $75 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dflhc-july25-email?refcode=071225_FR_JulyGoal_AK_150&amount=75&express_lane=true] DONATE $150 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dflhc-july25-email?refcode=071225_FR_JulyGoal_AK_150&amount=150&express_lane=true] DONATE $1000 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dflhc-july25-email?refcode=071225_FR_JulyGoal_AK_1000&amount=1000&express_lane=true]
We’ll get through this, together. Thank you.
Adam Kopel, Campaign Director House DFL [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/99254/images/Adam%20Headshot.png]
Adam Kopel
Campaign Director
Minnesota House DFL

We are prohibited from accepting contributions from PACs and lobbyists during the legislative session.
Give $75 and Get $75 back from Minnesota! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dflhc-july25-email?refcode=071225_FR_JulyGoal_AK]
The Political Contribution Refund is a Minnesota program that lets you donate $75 (or $150 per couple) once per year and have it refunded by the state. It’s a fantastic way to support the work of the House DFL. Can we count on you to make your refundable donation today?

clean_body: Hi there, It’s been nearly a month since our world changed forever. Minnesotans will be reeling from the events of June 14, 2025, for a long time. I may never truly get over this, and House DFLers will be recovering alongside you. We don’t have everything figured out, but we do know we must keep going. I believe the Speaker would want us to carry on making life better for every Minnesotan we can. This is where we need your help. The Speaker was a knockout fundraiser who made running our world-class campaign operation possible. She left us a roadmap, but we need to take care of our own business. While our lives have been paused for the last month, bills and campaigns are still there, and we have some ground to make up. Our July goal is to raise $50,000 to get back on track. It’s not the only thing to be done, but as we move forward, we do need your financial support. We must win back a majority in the Minnesota House to keep making life better and safer in our state. To do that, we need to meet our budget goals now. Will you chip in today? [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: DONATE $25 [] DONATE $34 [] DONATE $55 [] DONATE $75 [] DONATE $150 [] DONATE $1000 [] We’ll get through this, together. Thank you. Adam Kopel, Campaign Director House DFL [] Adam Kopel Campaign Director Minnesota House DFL [] We are prohibited from accepting contributions from PACs and lobbyists during the legislative session. Give $75 and Get $75 back from Minnesota! [] The Political Contribution Refund is a Minnesota program that lets you donate $75 (or $150 per couple) once per year and have it refunded by the state. name: Mazie Hirono
subject: School voucher programs do not work
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
body:
|
#
---
Republicans cannot deny this any longer, Peter: **They are selling out their constituents and our children’s futures to do Donald Trump’s bidding. ** The Big Ugly Bill that Donald Trump just signed into law creates the first-ever national school voucher program — a move that they claim will “expand school choice,” but will actually undermine public education and hurt our students. We’ve seen this story before, Peter. **School voucher programs do not work. ** They divert billions of dollars away from public schools and hand it to wealthy families and private schools, and it won’t be the Republicans in Congress who will be affected. Our students, who rely on strong public schools to succeed, and our teachers, who are shaping the next generation, will be left to deal with the consequences of the GOP’s decision. I recently held a forum with teachers, parents, and education leaders to discuss how this move will hurt our communities, and I will continue working with everyone I can to protect public schools in Hawaii and across the country. **[Democrats are working for America’s families, and I will always fight for public schools. To continue supporting this work, please chip in today!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111379516/557033981/124025968?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250712_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZWM0NzIyNC01YTVmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3j6xKABXn0paJZBfZg2gG4J2vY64y1G5_sygfFbDSa4=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111379517/557033982/1126229899?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250712_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZWM0NzIyNC01YTVmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3j6xKABXn0paJZBfZg2gG4J2vY64y1G5_sygfFbDSa4=)

body:
_RUN, MIKE, RUN?_

[https://secure.winred.com/collins-victory-committee/20250708_flex8298_cvf_w_html_senaterun?utm_campaign=034000000065020&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455838323938&recurring=true&amount=25&utm_term=lrm-active]

[https://secure.winred.com/collins-victory-committee/20250708_flex8298_cvf_w_html_senaterun?utm_campaign=034000000065020&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455838323938&recurring=true&amount=25&utm_term=lrm-active]

PATRIOT, I AGREE WITH YOU -- DEMOCRAT SENATOR JON OSSOFF MUST
GO.

He DOES NOT represent the vast majority of Georgians.

He DOES NOT represent the vast majority of Americans.

THE FACT THAT HE’S READY TO LAUNCH ANOTHER SHAM
IMPEACHMENT AGAINST TRUMP TELLS YOU EXACTLY HOW MUCH OF A TRAITOR HE
IS.

BUT HERE’S THE TRUTH: I NEVER PLANNED ON

RUNNING FOR U.S. SENATE.

I LOVE WHAT I’M DOING NOW IN THE

HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES:

_>> LAYING THE GROUNDWORK FOR TRUMP'S BIG BEAUTIFUL BILL_ –
providing record tax cuts, funding for our ICE heroes, and ending the
Green New Scams harming our American farmers

_>> PASSING THE LAKEN RILEY ACT _– a bill I introduced that makes it
easier for the White House to deport illegal aliens; and

_>> PUSHING FOR MASS IMPEACHMENTS_ – fighting against the judicial
coup being run on President Trump and holding Radical Left Judges in
check

But sometimes it's not about what you WANT to do, but about
_what you NEED to do._

THAT’S WHY I’M SERIOUSLY CONSIDERING TAKING A SWING AT JON
OSSOFF'S SENATE SEAT.

I’ve been praying over it. I’ve been speaking with my
family about it. And soon, I’m going to meet with President Trump
and see if this is something he actually wants me to do.

BUT TODAY, I NEED TO KNOW IF AMERICANS LIKE YOU WOULD SUPPORT
ME IF I DO DECIDE TO RUN
[https://secure.winred.com/collins-victory-committee/20250708_flex8298_cvf_w_html_senaterun?utm_campaign=034000000065020&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455838323938&recurring=true&amount=25&utm_term=lrm-active].

Because when I lace up the gloves to fight, there’s NO going
back. I’m all in.

_ A FINAL DECISION HAS NOT BEEN MADE YET._

I’D LOVE TO HEAR YOUR THOUGHTS ON THIS FIRST.

[https://secure.winred.com/collins-victory-committee/20250708_flex8298_cvf_w_html_senaterun?utm_campaign=034000000065020&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455838323938&recurring=true&amount=25&utm_term=lrm-active] SHOULD

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: STOP Being A BETA! | Tomorrow at Sheridan.Church
body:
Tomorrow at Sheridan.Church, it will get a little interesting... We are traveling through the Book of Acts, verse-by-verse. We are now finishing Acts
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22999014.12024.1.e68b3e0620ec9f445d1c16e7d0e80c5a) |
---
Tomorrow at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22999014.12025.1.a0d70bf7a24fe0c04d5fb57f6de56b09), it will get a little interesting... We are traveling through the [Book of Acts](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22999014.12026.1.eb7a1de50ab2bf47f27da7edacce78fe), _verse-by-verse_. We are now finishing **Acts 21** and the message from Scripture is clear: **Christians are not to run in fear from persecution and suffering unlike most modern-day American Christians**. Therefore, I am calling this message: **STOP Being A BETA!** I promise this message you will not want to miss. **Tulsa** | 10am CT **OKC** | 6pm CT **Online** : [https://www.youtube.com/@sheridanchurch ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22999014.12027.1.a542205fea0703d8be2305c50059fc46) Thank you, Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---
| | [ Partner w/the Mission of Sheridan ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22999014.12028.1.a0bb2cf37947b873f9130e07643555ac)
---
---
## Upcoming Tour Of Oklahoma
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22999014.12029.1.0bc504a804581a387ae9956d11d0cd21)
---
For the reminder of 2025 and much of 2026, I will be touring the State of Oklahoma speaking at different events and I would love to see you there.
Here are a few events that I will be speaking at in **July** and **August** and we will be releasing **September** here soon!
Stay up to date at [www.jacksonlahmeyer.com](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22999014.12030.1.d0fde1179b462dc1f54432a234c1fbae)
---
|
---
I woke up today with a really cool notification... My **FIRST** book, ["_Chasing After The Wind_ "](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22999014.12031.1.bad24ac01f5d3f652f1350eeceac636c) is out and has reached **#13 in Religion/ Christian Living / Personal Growth**! **I have been blown away by the response!** THANK YOU SO MUCH! If you have not ordered your copy you can still get the **Limited Edition Signed Book** here: _[*"Chasing After The Wind"*](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22999014.12032.1.0e27ed5992d9ebc05461bf4d5c79d14a)_ It is also available on [Amazon](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22999014.12033.1.ca33570ea1e215cb9b9fdee036253ada)\+ [Barnes & Noble](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22999014.12034.1.2c4d4b4cafff2ef111449d7739dffe5f). **Amazon** : [https://www.amazon.com/Chasing-After-Wind-Catching-Everybody/dp/B0F7M4GK26](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22999014.12035.1.92d1a16cb31e7836815946aa77e8d3ef) **Barnes & Noble**: [https://www.barnesandnoble.com/w/chasing-after-the-wind-jackson-lahmeyer/1147391019](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22999014.12036.1.252a7d56ce3bbbc72e78fd7e2f1af1b7) I really want to thank **MLB LEGEND Darryl Strawberry** for writing the Foreword and becoming vulnerable by sharing his story. The Foreword is worth getting the book, I promise. This book is 200 pages and I am confident will change your life as it has mine. In ["Chasing After The Wind"](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22999014.12037.1.b5d8f19052d00c0884f415268b566432) I share VERY personal stories and I decided to get real and raw with the heartbreaks and triumphs I have experienced.

name: Deb Haaland
subject: re: the design in our campaign logo
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
I think it’s only right that you’re clued in on a small but important detail about our campaign.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=3173%2E400544%2EeHMVa4)
You are a critical part of this team, so I think it’s only right that you’re clued in on a small but important detail about our campaign.
**Have you ever noticed the Zia sun symbol within our official campaign logo?**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250712_1_zia?amount=5&refcode=em20250712-3173&refcode2=3173_400544_eHMVa4&akid=3173%2E400544%2EeHMVa4)_This sun symbol originated from the Zia Pueblo._
This symbol probably looks familiar to fellow New Mexicans. It’s called the Zia sun, and can be found on our state flag, on license plates, in the state Capitol building, and more. It’s an iconic emblem that New Mexicans are proud of.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250712_1_zia?amount=5&refcode=em20250712-3173&refcode2=3173_400544_eHMVa4&akid=3173%2E400544%2EeHMVa4)_Our beautiful state flag is emblazoned with the iconic Zia sun._
But there’s a deeper meaning behind the Zia sun that I think you should know. It’s a sacred symbol to the Indigenous people of Zia Pueblo. To Zia Pueblo, four is a sacred number that symbolizes the Circle of Life: four winds, four seasons, four directions, and four sacred obligations. The circle binds the four elements of four together. We should all learn and respect the history of the Zia sun as we celebrate its beauty and significance to our state.
**Today, our strong desert sun is just as important to our future as it was to our Indigenous ancestors.** The New Mexico sunshine is the engine behind our breathtaking natural landscapes, vibrant agriculture economy, and a source of power for thousands of our homes. But I know we can do more.
**As governor, I’ll continue to fight for smart investments in solar energy development that addresses climate change while creating good-paying union jobs in our state.**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250712_1_zia?amount=5&refcode=em20250712-3173&refcode2=3173_400544_eHMVa4&akid=3173%2E400544%2EeHMVa4)_While I was Secretary of the Interior, our Administration accelerated solar energy development across the West._
**From issues like climate change to education and housing affordability, we must be fierce enough to face tough challenges and fight for a bright future for all.** I’m ready to roll up my sleeves and change the game for New Mexico, but I can’t win this campaign without your help. We’ll need a lot of resources to organize across our state and speak with voters about our ambitious plans for the future, so I have to ask:
**[Can you chip in $5 today so we can grow our grassroots campaign for New Mexico? Your support is what makes our fight possible.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250712_1_zia?amount=5&refcode=em20250712-3173&refcode2=3173_400544_eHMVa4&akid=3173%2E400544%2EeHMVa4)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250712_1_zia?amount=5&refcode=em20250712-3173&refcode2=3173_400544_eHMVa4&akid=3173%2E400544%2EeHMVa4)**
Be fierce,
Deb ☀️
P.S. My grandmother taught me to wake up every morning, greet the sun, and say a prayer to welcome that spirit into your life. **[If you agree we must embrace the power of our New Mexico sunshine as we build a bright future for our state, can you chip in $5 so we can win this race?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250712_1_zia?amount=5&refcode=em20250712-3173&refcode2=3173_400544_eHMVa4&akid=3173%2E400544%2EeHMVa4)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20250712-1&t=2&refcode2=3173_400544_eHMVa4&akid=3173%2E400544%2EeHMVa4)**
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=3&akid=3173%2E400544%2EeHMVa4)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=4&akid=3173%2E400544%2EeHMVa4)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO

body:
These changes might definitely affect you, so I want you to be the first to hear about what I just signed into law!
| | | | [](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kcGOmzAQhp_G3IxgTCA5cEiXoKqVKmVbdZW9IGOPg1e2ccEkZZ--gpJcf3-eb36bW2-0mktSfCEAnZYjASDsSACOZ3j7-QtPWNC39vhJ-Qm__VhO4WVDb_CEneDvl7PgVyYu4_fD-f3lT3ZMbumTD7PHJ71ZY7RcmyUtqkiWIPYgRIRlWuyA7dI9ZFFXpkkhcyFV2so8TVSOkmco9kylbaYOyCNdQgK7pEgBEmBZEqtUMSY5wwNTLeOMZMldu1j2jhv5EYbJ-lj0NjJlF4If15VqAvWIYhowvms3oFwIAvVKU8eDXm5T0VurQ0CkH0oQqI2nnaJrDTr2QnND1yk6zNT3xtDbno5AWD0F21iUerKEVVvtfAnHfhoEElYZ3xjfdGrLBbee66sjrHrUa4ITzX_LQ7I5mhEaua7aGP8Y0LuALhBWLcUDEsgbZ7Rc_PVrd-q-2r_zGq6_zqp2Lj7rC_v9Gg2l9HdtjB7zgmTJdVl3fbFbCf8CAAD__6lttNU)
---
## _**_MESSAGE FROM THE PRESIDENT ON SOCIAL SECURITY!_**_

[](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kU2PoyAYxz8N3jD6PPjSg4fuOB52kk26u5lJ52IoYGUCyCi2aT_9Rtf2-ufH_wW49UZ3t4oUPwhAr-VEAAjuCcD-AB9__qpXVdCP0_5O-av6-Ws5hZcNvcATdoJ_Hg-Cn1Ecp7fd4fPlm-2TS_rkw82rJ72lxspybRa1qCNZgShBiEhVaZEBZmkJLOormWVlkjCWp2mWK9gJvmMIXaGytDwhY5GuIIEsKVKABJAlcZd2iJKj2mF3Qo6EJVftYjk4buRXGGfrYzHYyFR9CH5aKzUEmkmJeVTxVbtRyYUg0Kw0dTzo5TYVg7U6BKXoVycINMbTvqPrDDoNQnNDVxcdbtQPxtBLSScg2MzBtlZJPVuC9TY7X8RpmEehCNbGt8a3fbfpglvP9dkRrB_z2uBE-z_lEbJltBO0cq3aGv8wGFxQLhCsl-FBEchbZ7QkWNvvxubH-p2_reL661ifbsW9OeL772ispL9qY_SUF4Ql56Xu-mKXCv4FAAD__9iVsqs)
Friend, These changes might definitely affect you!
Here’s what happened to Social Security:
I just signed into LAW something I’m very proud of: **NO TAXES ON SOCIAL SECURITY!**
**_But don’t thank me yet._**
_Democrats and Radical Judges are trying to shut down all the progress we’ve made TOGETHER. They hate that I’m putting the American people first. They’d rather keep wasting your money on their radical agendas._

clean_body: These changes might definitely affect you, so I want you to be the first to hear about what I just signed into law! | | | | MESSAGE FROM THE PRESIDENT ON SOCIAL SECURITY! Friend, These changes might definitely affect you! Here’s what happened to Social Security: I just signed into LAW something I’m very proud of: NO TAXES ON SOCIAL SECURITY! But don’t thank me yet. Democrats and Radical Judges are trying to shut down all the progress we’ve made TOGETHER. They hate that I’m putting the American people first. They’d rather keep wasting your money on their radical agendas. It’s going to be hard, but in order to make this plan a reality, I’m going to need your help TODAY, not tomorrow. Tomorrow will be too late. All I’m asking is for you to respond to me, IMMEDIATELY: Thank you, Donald J.
