subject: I’m calling for Kristi Noem’s resignation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| Friend, I’m leading the call for Kristi Noem’s resignation. As the **senior-most Democrat on the House Homeland Security Committee** , I’ve seen a lot — but what Noem is doing at the Department of Homeland Security is beyond the pale. She deported a _4-year-old child battling cancer_. She detained a U.S. Marshal. She lied to Congress about Trump’s doctored photo of Kilmar Abrego Garcia. And she’s arrested one member of Congress and detained another just for speaking out against MAGA’s authoritarian regime. **Under her leadership, ICE agents are running around this country terrorizing families, masking their identities, and abusing their power at Noem’s behest.** **I’m demanding accountability — and her resignation. But I need your help.** [**While I fight to ensure Kristi Noem answers for her disregard for the rule of law on the Homeland Security Committee, will you split a contribution between me and Seth Moulton? I’m about to be in the middle of two high stakes investigations against Trump and his henchmen, so I need to be prepared to fight back no matter what they throw my way.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111380156/557036564/265156787?refcode=250712_MFC_Swalwell_Noem&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWQxYmE5OS01ZTVmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JqVYoYXh8NZ8S0onk3CtwCp62Djm3NeFbSkYXKq599w=) [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111380157/557036565/-288956247?refcode=250712_MFC_Swalwell_Noem&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWQxYmE5OS01ZTVmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JqVYoYXh8NZ8S0onk3CtwCp62Djm3NeFbSkYXKq599w=) Democracy dies when we remain silent, friend. Wife: Why not? He even wrote a song about my leadership skills
Me: Bob Marley did not write a song about your leadersh--
Wife: 🎶 "Ayesha the sherifff..."🎶 :D
Me: [facepalm]

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Release the Epstein List
body:
Epstein was scum. The things he did over the years are a parent’s worst nightmare, and it’s absolutely terrifying that so many influential people are allegedly involved.
#

Peter —
We’ve all been watching this chaos around Jeffrey Epstein, Donald Trump, the FBI, and the DOJ over the last week. They’re at each other’s throats, tearing each other apart about Epstein’s list — and I get it.
Kash Patel and Dan Bongino, the #1 and #2 at the FBI, built their entire careers around Epstein and this list. Now, they’re telling us there’s nothing to see. So, what is it?
Whatever it is, we know two things are true. **First, Epstein was scum.** The things he did over the years are a parent’s worst nightmare, and it’s absolutely terrifying that so many influential people were allegedly involved.
**Second, the American people deserve the truth.** At this point, I don’t know whether the list really does exist or if Trump’s people are scrambling to bury it and protect him. There’s tons of evidence connecting Epstein to Trump, and his comments and actions in the past and recently are more than enough to draw reasonable scrutiny.
The solution seems pretty clear to me: **They need to release the list and remove all doubt.** Make Epstein’s list public, and let the chips fall where they may. Trump’s own people have told us a million times they have it, and they’ve promised to make it public — so bring it out.
We need the truth.
[**It’s past time that we come together and demand Trump’s White House release Jeffrey Epstein’s list. If you agree, join me and add your name to this petition.** [RELEASE THE LIST](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/rg_em_sign_epstein_july25/?source=em250712-2-160&akid=3917%2E734936%2E5U8WCo) Thank you in advance, Ruben

# Opinion:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/cf7c7c3d-a13c-4d9d-b8fb-f99544d41835?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Florida under the leadership of Governor Ron DeSantis is showing the rest of the country what a state can do to help carry out mass deportations.
States using their resources to help the federal government clear out their illegal immigrant population is the only path to making any sort of dent. The common statistic cited for years is that the United States had around 10-12 million illegal immigrants, and that was _before_ the four-year long Biden-Harris border crisis. That self-made problem allowed millions more to illegally enter our nation.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..ffAllD2hhRmDjvWld2Sp_BOtadaSzkjam5oUheUCiI8?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=168150303)
DeSantis was correct to call a special session earlier this year to secure laws and funding through the state legislature to be in the best position possible to help the Trump administration as quickly as possible.
Perhaps one of the most consequential ideas made into law is requiring all municipalities in the state to go beyond not interfering with federal immigration enforcement operations. They are mandated to aid the federal government with enforcement. This has resulted in Florida being the number one state in its police departments and sheriff offices having partnership agreements with ICE, through the 287(g) program.
The 287(g) program trains local law enforcement agencies to carry out certain immigration-related enforcement during the course of their normal duties without needing a federal agent to be present. Prior to the agreements, local agencies were partnered with either ICE or Border Patrol under Operation Stonegarden.
**A message from our sponsor (Piece continues below)**
* * *
**Together with Natural Health Response**
# [Liberals laughed at RFK Jr's COVID warning... until THIS happened](https://substack.com/redirect/31141a9e-91fe-409c-8647-13d20bbe30c5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/31141a9e-91fe-409c-8647-13d20bbe30c5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Dear Reader,
When RFK Jr warned that COVID 19 originated from a lab leak in Wuhan, China... liberals laughed and called him a conspiracy theorist.
NOW the FBI, CIA and Department of Energy all agree that Covid-19 most likely originated from a Wuhan lab leak...
Once again Kennedy was proven right.
But **[RFK Jr.'s next WARNING](https://substack.com/redirect/31141a9e-91fe-409c-8647-13d20bbe30c5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** could be far worse for millions of Americans.
Before the deep state's smear campaign really revs up--**[see it here for yourself.](https://substack.com/redirect/31141a9e-91fe-409c-8647-13d20bbe30c5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/31141a9e-91fe-409c-8647-13d20bbe30c5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**(Piece continued)**
While most places in the Sunshine State have happily agreed to the 287(g) program, the few Democratic pockets have had to be cajoled by DeSantis and Attorney General James Uthmeier into entering into the agreements.
The city commissioners on Key West recently canceled their active 287(g) agreement, prompting a swift response from the DeSantis administration, reminding them it is against state law. The commissioners quickly reentered into the program despite the locals angrily protesting at the public meeting.
Beyond the arresting of illegal immigrants, the other significant way Florida has helped the federal government is solving the issue of holding capacity.
The Department of Homeland Security, as vast as the agency is, can only hold tens of thousands of illegal immigrants nationwide. The Big Beautiful Bill that is now law is supposed to address that problem, but Florida used its experience and land to get the ball rolling before the bill passed Congress.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..ffAllD2hhRmDjvWld2Sp_BOtadaSzkjam5oUheUCiI8?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=168150303)
Alligator Alcatraz in the Everglades combines the state's ability to rapidly set up temporary housing with its natural landscape to deter any escape plans or incursion efforts. The fact it has a large runway to accommodate federal deportation flights is a bonus. Activists have been concerned with detainees being held in the facility for long periods of time, but the goal is to not house them for months and months. The goal is to process them out of the country in a short period of time or confirm they can stay in the United States.
Alligator Alcatraz is meant to be an incentive for illegal aliens to self-deport. They can either go home on their own or they can be sent to Alligator Alcatraz and then still be sent home.
The Everglades facility is not the only state-run site planned for holding detainees. DeSantis said there will also be a site at Camp Blanding, located near Jacksonville.
Due to the Republican-led efforts in Florida, Border Czar Tom Homan revealed DHS is able to send their agents and officers to other parts of the country because the state is able to fill in the void.
"We don't have that problem like in Florida where every sheriff in the state is working with us. So where we're going to send our assets, we're going to send them where the problem is: sanctuary cities...We'll flood the zone with sanctuary cities," **[Homan said this week.](https://substack.com/redirect/e97adda5-d380-4cf8-8397-b70cd48e2d49?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/a0eb71fa-32f0-41cb-b6cd-06f8b995056d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
With all of this in mind, it is stark that other deep-red states have also not moved as quickly as Florida. With President Trump happily endorsing the DeSantis administration's efforts, one can hope it will spur other states into action to address this severe issue.

clean_body: | The Democrat’s fight to retake one of California’s most flippable House districts just hit a breaking point. Republican David Valadao -- the incumbent in California’s 22nd District -- shocked even members of his own party by voting for Trump’s so-called “Better Budget Balance” Act, which slashes Medicaid by nearly $1 trillion. = Nearly 70% of Valadao’s district relies on Medicaid today. Despite repeated promises to his voters that he’d never vote for cuts to the program, he backed it anyway. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Voters are furious, and this race has emerged as ground zero in the fight to defend health care access and defeat the GOP’s extremist, corporate-first agenda. The good news is that Valadao’s district is one of the most flippable in the country. It’s swung for Democrats in the past, and 2026 represents the best shot we’ve ever had to oust Valadao for good. Democrat Randy Villegas, a 30-year-old college professor and son of immigrants, is running to unseat Valadao -- and he’s not taking a dime from corporate PACs. Randy has deep roots in the Central Valley, a strong local base of support, and a real shot at flipping this seat. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = \- California Election Update | With deep ties to our community and a lifelong commitment to justice and equity, Randy is running for Congress in California’s 22nd District to bring bold, compassionate leadership to Washington. * * *
### Greg Abbott Says Only "Losers" Blame _Greg Abbott_ for Cutting Emergency Funds--Which Killed his Constituents
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8bb3114f-da86-411a-8070-48949bd02a39?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**by David Shuster**
There is a long tradition in American politics of bluster standing in for leadership, and nowhere is this more evident than in Texas Governor Greg Abbott's response to the catastrophic flooding that recently struck his state's Hill Country.
After communities and youth camps were shattered and hundreds of lives were lost (130 bodies recovered so far, another 160 people are still missing) Abbott traveled to Kerr County--not to offer clarity or accountability. But to scold the public and the media for daring to ask who bears responsibility.
"You know who talks about blame? Losers," Abbott declared, comparing the loss of life and property to a botched football game. "You know what winners do? Winners go to the locker room, they talk about what they're going to do to win the next game."
It's a revealing metaphor. In Abbott's Texas, disaster is just another quarter to be played, grief a statistic to be managed, and blame--a word he utters with a sneer--something for "losers" to wallow in. But when countless people die and others remain unaccounted for, who failed and how is not finger pointing, it's governance.
This isn't a question of partisan gamesmanship or Monday-morning quarterbacking. It is about the failure of basic public safety systems. Local officials in Kerr County admitted they received little to no warning before the floodwaters rose.
Hydrologists and emergency management experts have long called for improved monitoring systems, better communication protocols, and real-time flood gauges in precisely the places where lives were lost. Those calls were often ignored or underfunded by state leadership.
Greg Abbott has led that leadership for nearly a decade. And now, when pressed about these failures, he bristles at the notion that anyone should be held to account.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/a78bd6c9-ac40-4b74-ae37-ce19f1f743d2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Abbott has since promised an investigation--but only with a caveat: no talk of "blame." In other words, _he wants a probe that probes nothing_. The governor appears less interested in learning from the disaster than in preserving a narrative in which Texas stands tall, questions be damned.
But credible governance requires more than hollow confidence. It demands humility, the kind that admits something went wrong and seeks to fix it. Abbott's insistence that only "losers" look back and ask questions is not just tone-deaf--it's dangerous.
**It sends a message to every local official in Texas that accountability is optional, that optics matter more than outcomes.**
The people of Texas deserve better than a governor who treats natural disasters like halftime speeches. They deserve someone who understands that leadership means owning failure as much as touting success.
And in this case, failure wasn't a botched pass, or a fumble, or a missed tackle that allowed the other team to score. It was an antiquated flood warning and notification system that contributed to the deaths of countless people, with many more likely dead.
**For all of those people, including dozens of children, there will not be another game or season.**
I'd like to think Greg Abbott understands that. But I'm not so sure. His football analogy and talk of "losers" will go down in history as one of the most insensitive and disgusting moments in modern political history. Which, at this particular time in our politics, is truly saying something.
Texas deserves better. Not slogans, not football metaphors - but accountability.
And until someone demands serious accountability from GOP governance in Texas, and across the entire country, the human toll - the real heart-breaking losses - will keep piling up, as there is zero chance the storm clouds will recede.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/82b6bd77-3364-439f-9942-d499a85967e8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* * *

clean_body: Greg Abbott Blames 'Losers' While Texans Drown: How GOP Negligence Turned Flood Warnings into a Mass Casualty | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? Greg Abbott Blames 'Losers' While Texans Drown: How GOP Negligence Turned Flood Warnings into a Mass Casualty | | | Jul 12| | | ∙| | Guest post ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- Blue Amp 's building something big. We launched The Soundcheck Fund (TSF) to elevate independent voices and donated five figures to kick off the fund..! To build the ecosystem of bold, hard-hitting journalists, video producers & commentators our democracy desperately needs, we have to raise additional funds. So please support the project by ! 🔵 Subscribe now! Power indy media & ourdemocratic future Greg Abbott Says Only "Losers" Blame Greg Abbott for Cutting Emergency Funds--Which Killed his Constituents | | ---|---|--- by David Shuster There is a long tradition in American politics of bluster standing in for leadership, and nowhere is this more evident than in Texas Governor Greg Abbott's response to the catastrophic flooding that recently struck his state's Hill Country. After communities and youth camps were shattered and hundreds of lives were lost (130 bodies recovered so far, another 160 people are still missing) Abbott traveled to Kerr County--not to offer clarity or accountability. But to scold the public and the media for daring to ask who bears responsibility. "You know who talks about blame? Losers," Abbott declared, comparing the loss of life and property to a botched football game. "You know what winners do? Winners go to the locker room, they talk about what they're going to do to win the next game." It's a revealing metaphor. In Abbott's Texas, disaster is just another quarter to be played, grief a statistic to be managed, and blame--a word he utters with a sneer--something for "losers" to wallow in. But when countless people die and others remain unaccounted for, who failed and how is not finger pointing, it's governance. This isn't a question of partisan gamesmanship or Monday-morning quarterbacking. It is about the failure of basic public safety systems. Local officials in Kerr County admitted they received little to no warning before the floodwaters rose. Hydrologists and emergency management experts have long called for improved monitoring systems, better communication protocols, and real-time flood gauges in precisely the places where lives were lost. Those calls were often ignored or underfunded by state leadership. Greg Abbott has led that leadership for nearly a decade. And now, when pressed about these failures, he bristles at the notion that anyone should be held to account. Abbott has since promised an investigation--but only with a caveat: no talk of "blame." In other words, he wants a probe that probes nothing. The governor appears less interested in learning from the disaster than in preserving a narrative in which Texas stands tall, questions be damned. But credible governance requires more than hollow confidence. It demands humility, the kind that admits something went wrong and seeks to fix it. Abbott's insistence that only "losers" look back and ask questions is not just tone-deaf--it's dangerous. It sends a message to every local official in Texas that accountability is optional, that optics matter more than outcomes. The people of Texas deserve better than a governor who treats natural disasters like halftime speeches. They deserve someone who understands that leadership means owning failure as much as touting success. And in this case, failure wasn't a botched pass, or a fumble, or a missed tackle that allowed the other team to score. It was an antiquated flood warning and notification system that contributed to the deaths of countless people, with many more likely dead. For all of those people, including dozens of children, there will not be another game or season. I'd like to think Greg Abbott understands that. But I'm not so sure. His football analogy and talk of "losers" will go down in history as one of the most insensitive and disgusting moments in modern political history. Which, at this particular time in our politics, is truly saying something. Texas deserves better. Not slogans, not football metaphors - but accountability. And until someone demands serious accountability from GOP governance in Texas, and across the entire country, the human toll - the real heart-breaking losses - will keep piling up, as there is zero chance the storm clouds will recede. | | ---|---|--- David Shuster is an Emmy award winning broadcast journalist who is best known for his work at NBC News and as an anchor MSNBC. clean_body: It’s officially the time of year when online fundraising slows waaaayyyy down. Can you help us get back on track? I hate reaching out like this, Peter, but I want to be honest: We’ve officially hit the dreaded summer slump. It’s the six to eight weeks every year when online fundraising slows waaaayyyyy down. Usually, it’s something that campaigns and grassroots movements like ours are prepared for... but this year, after the slump this spring, we need an extra push to get back on track. So today, I’m coming to you directly to ask: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Thank you! Emma Team Heartland Patriots | | Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce.com). Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee.

name: Toxic Water
subject: Prepare Now: FBI reports your water supply is in danger
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.
-------------------------

SHOCKING REPORT:

CHINA ATTACKS U.S. WATER SUPPLY

[China Attacks U.S. Water Supply]
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/d9155ba6128a42fdad13cf4df5cfc178-446c1483f3844326be6dbb0ac6046fdf/63]

_FBI'S URGENT WARNING HAS BEEN ALL OVER THE NEWS_

Chinese hackers are coming for the water supply in your hometown.

Attacking city water systems, biding their time and waiting for
China's signal to strike. Experts warn that Russia and Iran are also
targeting attacks on our city water systems.

Overflowing, damaging and poisoning the lifegiving systems that we
trust to keep us safe.

Like it or not, your local tap water may be our country's weakest
link.

Deteriorating infrastructure. Systems years beyond their expiration
dates. Negligent corporations. And God-knows-what in the water we
drink.

We're up against arsenic, plastics, chlorine, forever chemicals,
hormone-altering drug residue and a host of other contaminants.

Listen, I'm not trying to be the messenger of doom...

BUT PROTECTING THE WATER SUPPLY IN YOUR HOME IS MORE IMPORTANT THAN
EVER.

If you don't take steps to be prepared, you and your family could end
up vulnerable.

Forced to choose between drinking poisoned, toxic or dirty water, or
going without water altogether.

It sounds harsh...

But the truth is that even good people with good intentions can make
serious mistakes.

Mistakes like...

GETTING FILTERS THAT CLAIM TO PURIFY YOUR WATER, BUT DON'T PROVE IT.

If a company doesn't have certifications from a third-party lab, show
lab tests or reveal how many gallons were tested... that's a bad sign.
After a couple gallons, most water filters on the market stop working
for scary contaminants and start passing them into your water.

GETTING BOTTLED WATER WITH A 2-YEAR SHELF LIFE AND RISKING PLASTIC
LEACHING INTO YOUR SUPPLY.

Not to mention all the money you'll waste, and the work required to
carry cases of water. Plus with bottled water, you never really know
what's been filtered out.

OR SIMPLY USING A PITCHER IN THE FRIDGE... WITH SLAPSHOT FILTRATION
POWER AND LIMITED CAPACITY.

Most pitchers hold a couple cups of water at a time. Not nearly enough
to drink, cook and clean in an emergency. You'll run out in no time,
just when your life depends on it.

Well we have great news to share...

Folks have been calling...

Folks have been emailing...

Folks have been leaving Facebook messages asking about our
just-released...

NEW AND IMPROVED...

NEW ULTRA-FAST MEGAFLOW ULTIMATE WATER FILTRATION SYSTEM!
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/d9155ba6128a42fdad13cf4df5cfc178-446c1483f3844326be6dbb0ac6046fdf/63]

4X FASTER FLOW RATE FOR PERFECT, DELICIOUS DRINKING WATER

[Ultimate Water Filtration System]
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/d9155ba6128a42fdad13cf4df5cfc178-446c1483f3844326be6dbb0ac6046fdf/63]

BUT HURRY – WE HAVE LIMITED STOCK, AND THIS MEGAFLOW ULTIMATE WATER
FILTRATION SYSTEM IS FIRST-COME FIRST-SERVED. WE ONLY HAVE A SMALL
NUMBER OF UNITS TO GO AROUND.

GET YOUR MEGAFLOW ULTIMATE WATER FILTRATION SYSTEM RUSHED TO YOU AT
THIS SPECIAL PRICING PLUS ALL YOUR FREE BONUSES WHILE SUPPLIES LAST!
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/d9155ba6128a42fdad13cf4df5cfc178-446c1483f3844326be6dbb0ac6046fdf/63]

The best part is...

_THIS ADVANCED FILTRATION TECHNOLOGY FILTERS THE NASTIEST, FILTHIEST,
BACTERIA-RIDDLED AND PARASITE INFESTED WATER USING NO CHEMICALS, NO
ELECTRICITY AND NO MOVING PARTS!_

It's powered by the same technology that the U.S. Military and NASA
trust to filter their water. But now available for you in your home.

You're among the first to get access to these advanced, carbon-block
water filters designed to filter water on your countertop at a
sub-micron level without power or water hookup.

SO YOU CAN REDUCE...

Harmful Bacteria – up to 99.9999%
Life-Threatening Viruses – up to 99.99%
Disease-Carrying Cysts – up to 99.9%

Plus, this table-top unit targets 140+ dangerous contaminants from
your tap water, including bacteria, viruses, toxic chemicals, arsenic,
heavy metals, pharmaceuticals, VOCs and more.

All in the same, best-selling system thousands of Americans trust in
their homes.

THE NEW & IMPROVED FILTRATION SYSTEM MAY LOOK THE SAME...

But on the inside, these proprietary filters pack an even bigger punch
than before. They're MORE reliable and easier to replace, too.

So you get safer, cleaner water for you and your family.

BUT WE HAVE VERY LIMITED STOCK, AND WE'VE BEEN SOLD OUT OF THIS
FILTRATION POWERHOUSE FOR A WHILE.

In fact, it's been a very long while. Months and months, actually.

NOW WE'VE JUST GOT A FRESH BATCH IN.
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/d9155ba6128a42fdad13cf4df5cfc178-446c1483f3844326be6dbb0ac6046fdf/63]

And if you need to take it with you? No problem. You're not tied to it
like a whole-house filtration system. That kind of thing won't do you
any good if you need to bug out.

AND YES THERE'S AN INTEREST-FREE PAYMENT PLAN! Yes, right now, you can
get your MegaFlow Ultimate Water Filtration System on a convenient,
no-credit-check, interest-FREE payment plan. We know you're good for
it.

You'll have the PEACE OF MIND knowing that you're doing everything you
can to keep your family safer, by securing your MegaFlow Ultimate
Water Filtration System today for fresher, cleaner water for years to
come.

GET YOUR MEGAFLOW ULTIMATE WATER FILTRATION SYSTEM RUSHED TO YOU AT
THIS SPECIAL PRICING PLUS ALL YOUR FREE BONUSES WHILE SUPPLIES LAST!
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/d9155ba6128a42fdad13cf4df5cfc178-446c1483f3844326be6dbb0ac6046fdf/63]

To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters

P.S. Derrick loves the convenience of his MegaFlow Ultimate Water
Filtration System:

_"It was so easy to install. Within minutes we had water that tasted
so good, we couldn't believe it. We don't like the chlorine in tap
water and we got tired of lugging around cases of bottled water."_

Customers Love Their Ultimate
Water Filtration System!

[Customers Love Their Ultimate Water Filtration System]
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/d9155ba6128a42fdad13cf4df5cfc178-446c1483f3844326be6dbb0ac6046fdf/63]

_CYNDI L.__
"No question... beats the competition. After reviewing several other
companies and seeing that I was not the only one thinking this way, as
everyone was sold out of products, I decided to go with 4Patriots.
They seem to be good people who are very helpful and their products
seemed above average to others."_

_MICHAEL B.
"Saves me a ton of money and grocery-store headaches. During the
pandemic, water wasn't always available. Not so with the Purifier. We
love it and I have 5 gallons of water on hand all the time."_

_FAITH P.
"Water you can actually trust. This is so much better than storing
gallons and gallons of bottled water. This enables us to make
existing, natural water sources drinkable. I feel really good knowing
that in an emergency situation, we'd be able to filter our water."_

_CAROL B.
"Stop worrying about what's in the water! We use our system for
drinking and cooking but you can use it almost anywhere. It's easy to
use and it doesn't take long to filter. The water tastes pure and
delicious."_

_RICK O.
"Easiest way to upgrade your drinking water. We chose this one because
it handles everything and it's affordable. You never know when things
will go out on you."_

_THOMAS P.
"Finally, I don't have to keep refilling my pitcher all day. I'm very
happy with my water filter. Not only does our water now taste good (it
tasted dirty from the tap) but the large capacity tank means I'm not
refilling small pitchers repeatedly during the day."_

GET YOUR MEGAFLOW ULTIMATE WATER FILTRATION SYSTEM RUSHED TO YOU AT
THIS SPECIAL PRICING PLUS ALL YOUR FREE BONUSES WHILE SUPPLIES LAST!
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/d9155ba6128a42fdad13cf4df5cfc178-446c1483f3844326be6dbb0ac6046fdf/63]

DCDailyJournal.com

Click Here to Unsubscribe Or Report as Spam
[https://paramountcomm.app.optipub.com/messages/opt-outs/d9155ba6128a42fdad13cf4df5cfc178?op-notrack]

This email was directed to dpwillis67@gmail.com only | Our Privacy Policy can be
found by clicking here
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/d9155ba6128a42fdad13cf4df5cfc178-88f98ad4f1ab4a87b4ca01bec71c7643/63].

525-K East Market Street # 114
City: Leesburg
State: Virginia
Zip Code: 20176

name: Stand with Bernie! (via VPP)
subject: Trump’s newest target: Bernie Sanders.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
We need you to stand up and support Bernie Sanders.
| Folks, Bernie Sanders is fighting back – _AGAIN!_ ⬇️ [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91893?t=6&akid=20551%2E878179%2E2EAFzQ) **We’re THRILLED to see Bernie stand up against MAGA extremism — but Republicans are FURIOUS.** _They HATE to see our grassroots power growing!_

While Trump attacks Senator Sanders relentlessly, we’re getting to work to protect him — _start with sending Sen. Bernie Sanders an URGENT letter thanking him for all his amazing work!_

[**You’ve been PERSONALLY selected to sign, friend, so please don’t let us down: Add your name to thank Senator Sanders now, before we hit send tomorrow at 9am! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91893?t=7&akid=20551%2E878179%2E2EAFzQ) | [**15,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED: Donate $3 to sign the letter now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91893?t=8&akid=20551%2E878179%2E2EAFzQ)
---
TO: Sen. Bernie Sanders
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: Thank you. **Dear Senator Bernie Sanders,**

__Thank you for all your hard work leading the Anti-Trump resistance!__

It’s easy to feel helpless with MAGA Republicans in charge of the House, Senate, and White House, _**but you keep us hopeful that we can fight back.**_

I know it isn’t easy fighting off Trump and the GOP’s escalating threats to take you down, so please know that Democrats _across the country_ stand with you.

**Your leadership is absolutely critical right now, and we hope more Democrats follow your lead.**

[**I can’t thank you enough for all of your work to stop Donald Trump and save our Democracy! So I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show my gratitude and to keep electing incredible Democrats who will save our democracy from MAGA extremists like Donald Trump. »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91893?t=9&akid=20551%2E878179%2E2EAFzQ) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91893?t=10&akid=20551%2E878179%2E2EAFzQ)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
\- The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20551%2E878179%2E2EAFzQ). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20551%2E878179%2E2EAFzQ).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=20551%2E878179%2E2EAFzQ) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=20551%2E878179%2E2EAFzQ). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=20551%2E878179%2E2EAFzQ)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=20551%2E878179%2E2EAFzQ)

name: Jena
subject: time and time again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2507-q3-jg?refcode=250712-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2507-q3-jg?refcode=250712-email]
Peter,
I’ve taken on Donald Trump and MAGA extremists time and time again—and won.
As Colorado’s Secretary of State, I led the national charge to defeat extremist, election-denying secretary of state candidates. I fought Trump’s Big Lie, took on his USPS to protect our mail ballots, stood up to Trump's lies on vote by mail, and worked to ensure that every voter could make their voice heard—no matter their zip code or political party.
I did all of that under threat—facing harassment, lawsuits, and even death threats. But I didn’t back down. Because defending democracy is crucial.
Now, I’m running to be Colorado’s next Attorney General, because Trump’s agenda threatens our freedoms, our democracy, and the very foundation of the rule of law. Colorado needs a fighter. Someone who’s already proven they won’t flinch in the face of extremism.
If you’re with me in this fight, I’m asking: will you chip in $15 or more right now to help me keep Colorado safe from Trump’s extremist agenda? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2507-q3-jg?refcode=250712-email&amount=15]
Thank you,
Jena

| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23210%2E4449941%2EoQI8QO) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23210%2E4449941%2EoQI8QO) [**BREAKING: Senate to vote on GUTTING _NPR_ and _PBS_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/64169?t=3&akid=23210%2E4449941%2EoQI8QO) | [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/64169?t=4&akid=23210%2E4449941%2EoQI8QO) | **We just need a HANDFUL of Republican Senators to get on board with KILLING this bill...so we need to put immense pressure on Susan Collins to vote NO!!**

[**Chip in $5 to sign our letter to Susan Collins and demand she SAVE _NPR_ and _PBS →_** ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/64170?t=5&akid=23210%2E4449941%2EoQI8QO)
---|---
Dear Senator Susan Collins,

I, a proud U.S. citizen, believe that we must do everything in our power to protect public media like _NPR_ and _PBS._

Trump wants to SILENCE media outlets who report on his crimes...we can’t let him get away with cutting their funding and shutting them down.

So when the time comes for you to vote, don’t let me down. DON’T side with Donald Trump instead of the American people.
[**That’s why I’m calling on you to do the right thing and vote NO on this bill cutting _NPR_ and _PBS_ funding →**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/64169?t=6&akid=23210%2E4449941%2EoQI8QO)
[CLICK TO DONATE $5 AND SIGN THE LETTER →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/64170?t=7&akid=23210%2E4449941%2EoQI8QO)
---

X. [ YOUR NAME HERE](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/64170?t=8&akid=23210%2E4449941%2EoQI8QO)
[](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/64169?t=9&akid=23210%2E4449941%2EoQI8QO)
Did you sign?? The Senate could vote ANY DAY NOW, so don’t delay.

_Fight for Reform_

_NPR_ and _PBS_ are not associated or affiliated with Fight For Reform and have not sponsored or approved of this communication.

name: Ann Diaz-Austin
subject: Don’t let them lock my son up for life
body:
| [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e22116426/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvaG50WXRmenQ0WA/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA3MTI/LbmNseDFCdFladg/qP2hpZHM9bmMxRG9oYXJNZnlaS0Vscw/gaHLgTw/s5mf2dccbbe)
| |
---
Dear Friend, I never thought I would be writing this email today, **but if I can’t find patriots to help us the anti-police mob in New Mexico will lock my son up in prison for life.**
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
This is a picture of my son and his little boy, my three-year-old grandson, in the picture I sent you. Like his father and brothers, my son Deputy Jacob Diaz has a servant's heart and chose to put his life on the line as a police officer to protect our community. Now, after three years of service, a special prosecutor from Albuquerque is **_charging him with first-degree murder for following his training._** Friend, this charge is shocking for me and my family, and even ridiculous as he’s already been cleared by an internal investigation. In June 2024, Jacob responded to a late-night report of a young man walking in an intoxicated manner along the median of a busy highway. When my son arrived on the scene, the individual repeatedly ignored his instructions to stay back and show his hands. Instead, the young man quickly walked towards Jacob and drew out what appeared to be a pistol. In response, my son followed his training and fired his weapon. Even after falling to the ground, the individual continued to ignore his order to remain still and started moving towards the perceived firearm. Once again, following his training and fearing for his life, Jacob discharged his firearm and the individual was killed. When I heard about the incident, I was so thankful and relieved to hear my son’s life was safe. Because as the wife and mother of police officers, I know all too well the dangers law enforcement face every time they go out on the streets. After filing the incident, an administrative investigation on behalf of the New Mexico State Police was completed and submitted – _**finding my son had followed his training and had sufficient cause**_ to stop the young man and defend his life. And because the investigation cleared him, Jacob was reinstated as an officer on the force. **_But out of the blue, an anti-police prosecutor charged my son with first-degree murder._****** You can imagine the absolute shock my family and I felt when receiving the news. Now, after four months of being cleared of any fault and being back on the force, he’s facing life in prison. Depriving my 3-year-old little grandson of his father for the rest of his life. No dad to put him to bed, no dad cheering on his sports games, and no dad to turn to for advice and rely upon as he grows up. Friend, no child should have to endure such a trial. And I start to tear up just thinking about it. I can’t tell you how afraid we all are – the thought of losing our boy for life was crippling enough, but we also face the additional burden of never-ending legal bills. I didn’t know what we were going to do until we received a call from Jason Johnson with the **Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF)**. If you’ve ever heard of LELDF, you know they’re a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Jacob. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent cops – and their families – at their lowest moments. And when Jason called, my family was at our lowest moment. Not only did LELDF decide to help my son get the legal defense he deserves. They’re also raising money to pay for the best attorneys and expert witnesses for Jacob. So I have to ask you one of the toughest questions I’ve ever asked anyone: [**Will you help my son Jacob fight the unjust charges against him by donating to LELDF?**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) My husband and I are doing everything we can to help our son, but my husband is also a police officer, and his pay is nothing compared to the overwhelming fees involved in legal battles. Friend, I can’t let a radical prosecutor take my boy from me...destroying our family and my grandson’s life. [**So if you are able, would you consider following this link to donate to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund to help my Jacob?**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) Any amount - $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or more - will help. And because LELDF is a non-profit organization, your gift is completely tax-deductible. But whatever you can afford to give, I ask that you rush it back quickly. Jacob is facing prosecution in New Mexico, which has seen many anti-police practices coming to light. This won’t be an easy fight for justice. And you and [**your $35 contribution**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) could make the difference in Jacob being acquitted or spending the rest of his life behind bars. Right now, Jacob can only rely on the good nature and generosity of kind neighbors like you. Thank you for taking the time to read my email today. And thank you - in advance - for doing what you can to help my son Jacob.
---
Sincerely,
---
Ann Diaz-Austin
---
P.S. My son is going to be locked up for life after following his law enforcement training. I can’t bear to lose my son and watch my grandson grow up without a father, but unless Jacob has the funds necessary for his defense, that’s what will happen. [**Please, send in whatever you can to LELDF today as they fight the anti-police prosecutor in New Mexico and gain justice for my son**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) _**.**_**** Thank you for giving me and my family hope and for protecting our men and women in blue.
---
|
---
_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit. And remember –Blue Lives Matter!_ © Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303
---
---

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

[Unsubscribe](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e22116426/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA3MTI/LbmNseDFCdFladg/qP2hpZHM9bmMxRG9oYXJNZnlaS0Vscw/gaHLgTw/s2h5affb4d6)

name: Hillsdale College via Victory Mailings
subject: The debt we owe America’s Founders
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj205fz18li304z1quj8w8jdnn17aixje5usytcbhmyhtroy3ojplqf9livvi5l0x2ufbhfi2klvei9jge8pv&__stmp=szb56c&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szb56c&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol00iz0y5syf2xkxjz5xr3sqpa0fjfj2awbocpazo5ba8tim0lofaft25fapil5phv1kxlnorc91743bh875098vcwbt5vde3ogu7pan349ibmbeu0fdep88w7xzexqolcitq97chltj&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szb56c&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szb56c&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szb56c&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szb56c&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol00iz0y5syf2xkxjz5xr3sqpa0fjfj2awbocpazo5ba8tim0lofaft25fapil5phv1kxlnorc91743bh875098vcwbt5vde3ogu7pan349ibmbeu0fdep88w7xzexqolcitq97chltj&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szb56c&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szb56c&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Shawn Harris
subject: I am pissed. So I’m taking on Marjorie Taylor Greene.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio House Democratic Campaign Committee, 545 E Town St
body:
|
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111381670/557041913/91018577?refcode=250712_Harris_TakingOn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2U4ZDRlZi02ZjVmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9CoEcRnYZJCgqDKBbloW26_FAUouuRQtn6E0e8wJG0E=) **I’m Shawn Harris. name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: Social Security is under attack again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
Social Security is more than just a benefit — it’s a promise we make to every American.
Donald Trump is lying about Social Security. Again. We’ve seen this pattern before: Trump’s big promises lead to even bigger headlines, but when the details come out — working families, seniors and vulnerable communities get left behind. Now, Trump is bragging that he’s eliminated taxes on Social Security benefits. But the truth? His latest bill only includes a temporary deduction for some seniors — and still leaves millions of people footing the bill. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111381681/557041953/754793466?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2025.07.12_Social-Security_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzljMWUwMy03MDVmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s78Ok3WEJHstbkKQkeIxTjoqQYvKM67i9XIgwgw5tGY=&emci=61439a34-855e-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=939c1e03-705f-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=7659029) This isn’t a serious plan to support retirees. It’s _another_ political stunt to distract from the fact that Republicans are still trying to chip away at the programs Americans count on every day. **As a U.S. Senator — and as someone who cares deeply about protecting economic security for hardworking people across the country — I refuse to let this slide.** I’m working to do what Trump won’t: ✅ Fight for a permanent $2,400 annual increase in Social Security benefits
✅ Strengthen the program for the long haul — not just for today’s retirees, but for future generations
✅ Defend the promise we’ve made to every American who’s worked hard and paid in [**_If you believe the country deserves honest leadership and stronger retirement security, add your name:_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111381682/557041954/754793466?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2025.07.12_Social-Security_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzljMWUwMy03MDVmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s78Ok3WEJHstbkKQkeIxTjoqQYvKM67i9XIgwgw5tGY=&emci=61439a34-855e-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=939c1e03-705f-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=7659029) | | [ADD YOUR NAME ››](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111381683/557041955/754793466?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2025.07.12_Social-Security_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzljMWUwMy03MDVmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s78Ok3WEJHstbkKQkeIxTjoqQYvKM67i9XIgwgw5tGY=&emci=61439a34-855e-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=939c1e03-705f-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=7659029)

subject: Trump’s “Secret Police” is real
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email06302025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email06302025&amount=25]
Peter ,
Masked, plainclothes ICE agents are raiding courtrooms, farms, and homes, rounding up our neighbors while hiding their badges, refusing to identify themselves, and operating like a militarized secret police.
And Donald Trump and his administration? They’re bragging about it.
🚨 Trump officials have privately joked about making “Secret Police” merch.
🚨 They send each other memes mocking immigrants and elected officials.
🚨 The White House is posting cartoon-style propaganda and ASMR videos of deportations.
This is not law enforcement. This is state-sponsored fear, humiliation, and abuse, designed to intimidate, divide, and distract.
And they love it .
While Trump’s orbit gleefully shares memes of crying migrants and jokes about deporting U.S. citizens, communities across the country are living in terror.
We cannot let this slide.
GOTV PAC is fighting back by flipping Congress, electing Democrats who will investigate and dismantle this abuse of power, and organizing a massive turnout operation to stop Trump’s enablers from holding onto their razor-thin majority.
Will you pitch in $25 or more today to help us fight Trump’s secret police — and the authoritarian movement enabling them? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email07122025&amount=25]

They’re bragging about it. 🚨 Trump officials have privately joked about making “Secret Police” merch. 🚨 They send each other memes mocking immigrants and elected officials. 🚨 The White House is posting cartoon-style propaganda and ASMR videos of deportations. This is not law enforcement. This is state-sponsored fear, humiliation, and abuse, designed to intimidate, divide, and distract. And they love it . name: The Real Texas PAC
subject: They can't hide from this. We're holding them accountable.
body:
Donald Trump is bragging around the country about his “Big Beautiful Bill” — a bill that rips away healthcare, kids’ meals, Pell Grants, and millions of jobs... all while handing billionaires another tax break.
This is cruelty — plain and simple.
Democrats are raising emergency funds to expose what this bill really does, hold every Republican accountable, and elect leaders who’ll restore what Trump destroyed. We can’t undo his signature — but we can make them all pay at the ballot box. Chip in now to help us fight back >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-biguglybill?refcode=071225_3]
Donald Trump is going around the country BRAGGING about his so-called Big Beautiful Bill — calling it a “birthday present for America.”
We're raising funds NOW to hold EVERY SINGLE Republican who voted for this cruelty accountable and elect Democrats who will RESTORE what’s been taken. Chip in NOW to show that Democrats are not backing down >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-biguglybill?refcode=071225_3]
Because here’s what Trump is signing into law today:
❌16 million people will lose their healthcare
❌ 25% of nursing homes will shut down
❌ 51,000 preventable deaths every single year
❌ 2 million kids will lose access to food
❌ 1.75 million blue collar jobs will be wiped out
❌ 1.4 million students will lose their Pell Grants
❌ And the ultra-wealthy will get a $975 BILLION tax break
That’s not “beautiful.” That’s a national tragedy.
Our plan is clear:
✅ Expose what this bill really does
✅ Hold every single Republican who supported it accountable at the ballot box
✅ Elect Democrats who will RESTORE what Republicans destroyed and protect working families for good
This is it. We can’t undo Trump’s signature - but we can make every Republican who stood with him regret it.
Chip in $25, $50, $100 - whatever you can - to help us hold Republicans accountable and elect Democrats who will rebuild what we’ve lost >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-biguglybill?refcode=071225_3]

Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. name: The Democrats
subject: You deserve to know:
body:
---
Derek, Today, we’re going to ask you to make a contribution to the Democratic National Committee. But first, we think you deserve to know how we will put your $3 contribution to work. Let us explain: Last week, Republicans in Congress passed the largest health care and food assistance cut in American history. **So Democrats are fighting back.** We launched our Organizing Summer program, the DNC’s **largest-ever investment in local organizing** , and as you read this email, volunteers across the country are working to register voters, spread the word about the harm Trump and his allies are inflicting on our country, and make sure people all over the country are ready to vote accordingly. This is on top of the _$1 million total monthly investment_ we are making in every state Democratic party — helping them build the year-round organizing structure that will be essential to winning races up and down the ballot this fall, and to taking back the House and Senate in 2026. And, in the meantime, we are fighting back in the courts — holding the Trump administration accountable for their efforts to suppress voters and disrupt our democratic processes. We know that the next elections might feel far away right now, but the truth is that the work to elect Democrats has already begun, and early donations allow us to hit the ground running in the races that matter most. **Every donation matters, and a LOT of our contributions come from grassroots supporters just like you, giving what they can in response to emails just like this.** [**So, Derek, could you give $3 to support our mission? Your donation will help us organize everywhere, uplift local Democrats, and support our legal team as they take on the Trump administration in court.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025?refcode=em_20250712_3940_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3940_22930333_xaiqiC&akid=3940%2E22930333%2ExaiqiC) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250712_3940_fr&refcode2=3940_22930333_xaiqiC&akid=3940%2E22930333%2ExaiqiC)**
